name: Tobias Read
subject: “Like living in hell”: President Trump says Portland will be next city to see National Guard on streets
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251217-portland-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251217-portland-pet-rs]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
After weeks of attacking our state, President Trump ordered troops to Portland.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251217-portland-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251217-portland-pet-rs]
In the weeks leading up to this decision, he has stood in the Oval Office and called Portland “like living in hell.” He has even attacked our neighbors as “paid terrorists.”
The Portland I know is a beautiful, vibrant, and resilient city. It’s a place where families build their futures, where communities come together, and where people stand up for justice.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251217-portland-pet-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251217-portland-pet-rs]
Like many other major cities across the country, Portland has faced its share of challenges. Denying this doesn’t help move Portland and Oregon forward.
At the same time, Portland is a city worth supporting — not demonizing.
Let me be clear: we do not need President Trump’s troops in Oregon. And his threats have nothing to do with protecting Oregonians. We do not need fear-mongering from Washington. What we need is support for our communities, respect for our rights, and pride in all that makes Portland strong.
That’s why I’m asking you to join me: Add your name today to say you love Portland and you reject President Trump’s hateful, divisive rhetoric. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LnPIG_b6_0G7mo74o3mtCQ2]
ADD YOUR NAME: I ♥️ PORTLAND [https://secure.ngpvan.com/LnPIG_b6_0G7mo74o3mtCQ2]
Oregon will always rise to meet the moment. And no matter what threats come from Washington, we will stand together, protect our communities, and defend our state’s values.
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Secretary of State, Oregon
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251217-portland-pet-rs]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IMahE5FQZEyEjGesjn_XSA2?unsubscribedata=pJvVfkZkMD3kCxDK0a3FwxaXtbavrN8wQkDM6jl0edJUnXu5FZjcGhdELOy8rZqyo1HjGyo2dygWxnHKqgnHxnILUxe44%2FpUkHXDPckqIGlHwm9aS2eoVxxIYA6EVAtKn5iruC5kGqOt5Fq%2B8XbHRrfdLudDcu%2Fa2kQvZOcbNtAADe40gfYNu1xNB9fybKFLFqUK7iCx9J6Zmiu2tsj1v3LL4a%2BI%2F0H9xqQil0L9gQa%2Bj9owFkX4Ut2BwT6oFOzejTVLHs2xyoKi9%2FreO5dgjvurJwQVfZdZWMn8bzzevDMrpG%2F3vV7wvIZuTzEm%2BzKrN%2BXhCIs02E9QB6x0rvVVqdiL1fsfmD0j7GmGZiy4dCW1zR%2FX%2Bg6sGdg9zmGms6aB1JUKiJYTRWNePFqatSMSvjlmZzU%2FVSDuuiAMj5f1VoNmH%2B1in6vxMLCISgS2vsrx .

name: Wes Moore
subject: There’s no “catching up” later
body:
You’ll hear this a lot.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1081%2E1086043%2EimaGRt)
Peter, I owe you an explanation.
You’ll probably get a lot of emails like this one over the next few weeks, but let me explain why **[I’m asking you for a donation and why it’s so important for our campaign.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251217-2.nXfNpO&refcode=em-20251217-2&t=2&akid=1081%2E1086043%2EimaGRt)**
2026 is an election year in Maryland — but for nearly three months of the year, I won’t be allowed to raise a single dollar so that we can focus on the important work of driving progress forward for Marylanders.
But that’s a real challenge for my team. Those early months are when most campaigns build their momentum. It’s when they get the fuel for their organizing, advertising, and ability to define the race. **And that’s what my Republican opponents will be doing the entire time my team has their hands tied.**
While we’re in the fundraising freeze, Republicans will spend every day raising money, meeting with Trump’s advisors, and collecting massive checks from special-interest donors who want to flip this seat.
That’s why the short time we have left is critical. We’ve got less than a month to bring in the resources we need to stay competitive. There’s no “catching up” later — _only a sprint that starts right now._
**[If you can chip in $10, $25, or any amount before the clock runs out, it will help us fight against anything Republicans throw our way in 2026. Will you step up before it’s too late?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251217-2.nXfNpO&refcode=em-20251217-2&t=3&akid=1081%2E1086043%2EimaGRt)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251217-2.nXfNpO&amount=5&refcode=em-20251217-2&t=22&akid=1081%2E1086043%2EimaGRt)**
Let’s cross the finish line together, Peter.
Elevate,
Wes

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251217-2&t=23&refcode2=1081_1086043_imaGRt&akid=1081%2E1086043%2EimaGRt)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=1081%2E1086043%2EimaGRt)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=1081%2E1086043%2EimaGRt)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Mark Kelly
subject: BREAKING: Escalation from Pete Hegseth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
The Department of Defense is upgrading its preliminary review of Mark Kelly to an official investigation. | Folks, Mark Kelly here.

They are escalating.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121486989/589618931/-797884224?refcode=em-12.17.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjdmYWQ4OS1hNGRiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=REoNNTCG7RymkTeHxBHpf-7_rrkI1F6jewCXer7Kx64=)
We hadn't heard anything significant since December 10th, and then they dropped this.

Honestly, we learned about this the same as everyone else. We found out that Trump called for my arrest and execution by tweet. We heard about this investigation for the first time by tweet. And now that they're escalating, we hear it by tweet — again.

Trump and Hegseth won't let this go — but I refuse to back down. And I need you with me to have any chance against them.

**[Please. If you’ve got my back: Split a donation of $3 between me and DASS.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121486990/589618935/-797884224?refcode=em-12.17.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjdmYWQ4OS1hNGRiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=REoNNTCG7RymkTeHxBHpf-7_rrkI1F6jewCXer7Kx64=)**

name: Working Families Party
subject: Take Action to stop cuts to health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Millions to lose coverage if Congress doesn’t take action now | | | Peter, On December 31st — just two weeks from today — the Affordable Care Act subsidies are set to expire. Without an extension, millions of people will see their health care premiums increase, causing around 4 million people to lose their health insurance entirely. Today, House Democrats secured enough signatures on a discharge petition to ensure a vote on a clean three-year extension on the ACA subsidies. For months, House Speaker Mike Johnson and Congressional Republicans have refused to schedule a floor vote to extend the subsidies. But today, four Republicans joined Democrats to force the vote. Unfortunately, this vote will not occur until January unless Mike Johnson allows for a vote on ACA subsidies before year’s end. The clock is ticking, and every day we wait is another day of uncertainty for millions of Americans who don’t know if they will have health care coverage at the end of the month. **That’s why we need everyone to call their Representative right now to demand the House votes on and passes this clean three-year extension of the ACA subsidies without delay.** **Dial 240-902-7773 now or text _ACA_ to 30403 to be connected with your Representative now.** For months, working families who rely on ACA subsidies have been terrified by the prospect of skyrocketing health care costs if Congress fails to act. From cancer patients having to forego chemotherapy treatments, to expectant mothers worried about paying out-of-pocket for labor and delivery, to diabetic patients wondering how they’ll afford their insulin — working families can’t wait. We need a vote TODAY. **Dial 240-902-7773 now or text _ACA_ to 30403 to tell your Representative to extend ACA subsidies today.** In solidarity, Working Families Party clean_body: Millions to lose coverage if Congress doesn’t take action now | | | Peter, On December 31st — just two weeks from today — the Affordable Care Act subsidies are set to expire. Without an extension, millions of people will see their health care premiums increase, causing around 4 million people to lose their health insurance entirely. Today, House Democrats secured enough signatures on a discharge petition to ensure a vote on a clean three-year extension on the ACA subsidies. For months, House Speaker Mike Johnson and Congressional Republicans have refused to schedule a floor vote to extend the subsidies. But today, four Republicans joined Democrats to force the vote. Unfortunately, this vote will not occur until January unless Mike Johnson allows for a vote on ACA subsidies before year’s end. The clock is ticking, and every day we wait is another day of uncertainty for millions of Americans who don’t know if they will have health care coverage at the end of the month. That’s why we need everyone to call their Representative right now to demand the House votes on and passes this clean three-year extension of the ACA subsidies without delay. Dial 240-902-7773 now or text ACA to 30403 to be connected with your Representative now. For months, working families who rely on ACA subsidies have been terrified by the prospect of skyrocketing health care costs if Congress fails to act. From cancer patients having to forego chemotherapy treatments, to expectant mothers worried about paying out-of-pocket for labor and delivery, to diabetic patients wondering how they’ll afford their insulin — working families can’t wait. We need a vote TODAY. Dial 240-902-7773 now or text ACA to 30403 to tell your Representative to extend ACA subsidies today. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Sarah McBride
subject: URGENT: Republicans want to jail parents for affirming transgender kids
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
We need to make it clear that Republicans will not get away with weaponizing trans kids as political pawns.
#
This is urgent:
GOP leadership just scheduled two votes on anti-trans bills, including one that seeks to **JAIL** parents and health care providers for affirming transgender kids and following basic medical best practices.
And at the very same time, the Affordable Care tax credits that millions of families rely on to afford coverage are about to expire — with **zero** votes from Republican leadership to extend them.
The truth is that all Republican politicians care about is making the rich richer and attacking trans people. _**They are consumed with this, and they are extreme on it.**_
They would rather have us debate a misunderstood and vulnerable 1% of the population instead of focusing on the fact that they are raiding everyone's health care in order to pay for tax breaks for the wealthiest 1%.
**We need to make it clear that Republicans will not get away with weaponizing trans kids as political pawns to distract from them stealing out of our pockets.**
As the only openly trans member in Congress, I’m fighting for the dignity, humanity, and fair treatment of EVERY person in Delaware and across the country – but if we’re going to tackle this Republican obsession, I need you standing with me.
[**Will you rush a donation right now to demand Congress focus on the real issues, not weaponizing kids’ health care?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251217-1.jmF0XY&refcode=em20251217-2596&t=1&akid=2596%2E21716%2EPIVex-)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251217-1.jmF0XY&amount=5&refcode=em20251217-2596&t=20&akid=2596%2E21716%2EPIVex-)**
Thank you,
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20251217-1&t=21&refcode2=2596_21716_PIVex-&akid=2596%2E21716%2EPIVex-)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: AOC
subject: ICE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
I want to remind you where the real crime is.
#
Trump ran on a promise to the American people that ICE would go after "the worst of the worst."
What we have seen is that ICE is _not_ overwhelmingly going after criminals. In fact, over 70% of people currently in ICE detention facilities do not have a criminal record.
**So who _are_ they going after?**
They are going after 6-year-olds in my district.
They are going after students and permanent residents for their political views.
They are going after Americans born and raised in the United States.
At every point this administration has lied to us about ICE, while some of the wealthiest actors in our country have tried to sell us a myth to defend it — including private prison contractors.
That myth, that ideology, is that our immigrant neighbors are our enemies and more dangerous than us. And they sustain that myth because if everybody believes it, they can get away with robbing all of us.
**I want to remind you where the real crime is:**
It’s in the oligarchs taking $170 billion of our money from health care, food assistance, and public programs to funnel it into a secret police program.
It’s the authoritarians trying to create a black box because, once it is established, they can put political dissidents inside of it.
But their hatred is based on a story, a myth. **And we can choose to reject it**.
Donald Trump wants you to believe that this is who we are as a country. We are here to say that it is not.
We are a country that has fought and defeated the confederacy. That has defeated a history of civil rights violations, of secret police, of fascism. We can, and will, again.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251217.5dRGn7&refcode=em20251217-10428-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10428%2E2526796%2EMq8soB)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251217.5dRGn7&refcode=em20251217-10428-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=10428%2E2526796%2EMq8soB)**
I ask us all to fight for that ideal. To fight for this legacy.
Thank you for standing with us.
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20251217?refcode=em20251217-10428-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=10428_2526796_Mq8soB&akid=10428%2E2526796%2EMq8soB)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20251217-10428-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=10428%2E2526796%2EMq8soB)**

name: Deb Haaland
subject: A request for you

What if I told you we’re entering a critical phase of this race, and our campaign is operating with fewer resources than we need to compete in one of the largest states in the country?
What if you knew that MAGA forces with deep pockets will spend whatever it takes to flip control of our state government?
And what if you knew that ANOTHER self-funded millionaire candidate just entered the race this week — making it clear that we'll need a surge of grassroots support to stay ahead?
**And what if I told you that National Republicans are already eyeing this race and watching to see if we have the grassroots power to win.**
Or what if I said that we didn’t meet our mid-month fundraising goal earlier this week, and I’m worried because we aren’t on track to hit our December fundraising goal anymore?
**We can’t let that happen — and I’m counting on support from folks like you to make sure it doesn’t. That’s why, with time running out, I have to ask:**
**[Will you step up with a donation of $5 or anything at all to help us get back on track to hit our fundraising goal this month?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2539?t=4&akid=6303%2E400544%2ESR5ccp)**

Peter,

**If you haven 't planned out your New Year's Resolutions yet, allow me to make a recommendation for you...**

**_BAN SHARIA LAW FROM EVER TAKING A FOOTHOLD IN AMERICA!_**

Radical Islamists have been flooding America, and they have no plans to assimilate.

If we stand by and do nothing, pretty soon American cities will fall under Sharia Law. Women will not be allowed to vote and will be forced to cover their faces in public. Daily morning and evening prayer bells will ring, disturbing residents. And violence will flood our streets, targeting Christians, Jewish Americans, and anyone practicing a religion other than Islam.

They already elected a Radical Islamist as New York City's mayor. Your hometown could be next.

[**That’s why I’m making it my number one New Year’s Resolution to BAN SHARIA LAW, and I’m hoping you’ll join me.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=82d132c210c7490dae619d7f6a4a2f98&_e=7WzeTP_0eVciOA80FUVaCKWqhkkOsqLJxj-jhE23L39dUAFZr53KlLj8xRLiBgAVBPoJ51uOax26Glojn2r9ITL1Bur7F8fc9Q9b9TPvmnajxVfsiNHbAbvBCrQCMYcxaJL-mjr1bV9Qy1pNW-Alr4F-EzEBrbxdY817wbtIgUbVMTQRSgOYegVyBcCN7Ncva0EFiLL4P4dbHwBS6XGof_SODq2HsvVf04FGIVeD1irh1wren9xs_r4dl6f8FKJGZVF7qktOGmanBfM4Bm1INGSoo2Y82bD4r5YQ2YiLVGPrBbnuMxUsFmHR3PmoJmlGdFZdnFKqfuiLcCJPx82H-d9VDCkQPFVuYpaAYKYcgA0DSjFRU0XBayYsBHiCEwifFK4NbRqO5euHJnXKffuhXaEDgl2wmbiE6roP5CZ3v9qu9CLQVMTRRJtoBhKqZ5uJXgXi3lKndkn2IqRcvlAPRf6K3TYSTQ_owDzjEyJ0pKgadiqQx9eoEigJsocMt4GRN23PbKxraCOnU8sPM25seuQWqHvO3ulN3Ilw5UJnG6FM7B64mjInO9xOd8wcxQjQ)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

clean_body: I'm going to need your help to follow through | Peter, If you haven 't planned out your New Year's Resolutions yet, allow me to make a recommendation for you... BAN SHARIA LAW FROM EVER TAKING A FOOTHOLD IN AMERICA! Radical Islamists have been flooding America, and they have no plans to assimilate. If we stand by and do nothing, pretty soon American cities will fall under Sharia Law. Women will not be allowed to vote and will be forced to cover their faces in public. Daily morning and evening prayer bells will ring, disturbing residents. And violence will flood our streets, targeting Christians, Jewish Americans, and anyone practicing a religion other than Islam. They already elected a Radical Islamist as New York City's mayor. Your hometown could be next. This fight is not going to be easy. It's going to take dedication and grit. But, I'm ready to roll my sleeves up. Are you? | Thank you, Coach Tuberville Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? body:
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251217_1_beshear.vcE2Jr&refcode=em20251217-1&t=1&akid=4066%2E582294%2Eo4VmFM)
Hi, it’s Kentucky Governor Andy Beshear.
The Senate seat in New Hampshire is too important to be lost in the shuffle of 2026 races. Chris Pappas has a brand-new opponent, which changes everything. **We have to do all that we can to elect Chris Pappas and bring real, commonsense leadership to the Senate.**
I support Chris Pappas because he understands that the path forward in this country is about showing up, doing the work, and delivering for all families — no matter who they voted for. **That’s the kind of leader Chris will be in the Senate.**
**[If you’re with me, you support Chris Pappas, and you’re ready to help hold this crucial swing seat, chip in any amount today.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251217_1_beshear.Xm9h9N&refcode=em20251217-1&t=2&akid=4066%2E582294%2Eo4VmFM)**
Kentucky and New Hampshire may be very different states, but the challenges we face are the same. Chris knows that public service is about lifting people up, not tearing each other down — and he’ll never stop fighting for the people he represents.
I’ve seen how hard Chris works to protect health care, defend reproductive rights, and stand up for small businesses and working families. I couldn’t be prouder to support his run for the U.S. Senate — but this won’t be an easy win.
**National Republicans are targeting this race and after recruiting their dream candidate, John Sununu, they believe they can flip this seat in 2026.** Chris can win, but he will need all of us stepping up to overcome the millions of dollars that national Republicans are planning to spend against him.
**[Chris can’t win without us. So please, will you chip in any amount today to help elect Chris Pappas?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251217_1_beshear.Xm9h9N&refcode=em20251217-1&t=3&akid=4066%2E582294%2Eo4VmFM)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251217_1_beshear.Xm9h9N&amount=5&refcode=em20251217-1&t=22&akid=4066%2E582294%2Eo4VmFM)**
Chris’s new opponent and the GOP and Wall Street money machine that comes with him will make this one of the most competitive elections in 2026. **[Every dollar you can chip in will help make sure Chris can win.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251217_1_beshear.vcE2Jr&refcode=em20251217-1&t=23&akid=4066%2E582294%2Eo4VmFM)**
Let’s do what’s necessary to get Chris across the finish line.
Thank you,
Andy Beshear
Governor of Kentucky
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251217-1&t=24&refcode2=4066_582294_o4VmFM&akid=4066%2E582294%2Eo4VmFM)**

name: Janeese Lewis George
subject: Bluey
body:
This is why I fight.
#
[](https://act.leftnet.org/go/21583?c0=leftnet_em_20251217_em.UGl87J&refcode=em20251217-1409&t=1&akid=1409%2E2118727%2ENqesga)
Friend, this is me and my son PJ celebrating his first Halloween together. 🥹
I watch A LOT of Bluey these days and parenting has made it impossible to ignore what’s just not working in DC and the responsibility government has to make life tangibly better for YOU, the residents of DC, and our kids.
**Committing myself to a life of public service was never a question for me, it’s simply how I was raised.** I’m a third-generation Washingtonian, and I grew up in a neighborhood where people fought and cared for one another. My mother was a postal worker, my grandmother was the lunch lady at Alice Deal Middle School, and they and this city truly raised me to see my neighbors as an extension of my family.
I want to be able to raise my son in the District. I want him to grow up knowing his neighbors too. He and every child across the District should feel safe and have access to more opportunities than I did growing up.
**That means investing in people, our young people, right now.**
We have a real opportunity to change DC for the better, not just for our lifetimes but for our children and our children’s children. What we achieve today sets the foundation for our future.
I’m motivated to address issues like affordability, public safety, and education. I will act boldly and with urgency, and I hope you join me.
**[If you’re with me, donate $5 or more today to help power this fight. It’s absolutely critical that we build our strength early in our DC mayoral campaign.](https://act.leftnet.org/go/21450?c0=leftnet_em_20251217_em.RUZwj2&refcode=em20251217-1409&amount=5&t=2&akid=1409%2E2118727%2ENqesga)**
**[DONATE ››](https://act.leftnet.org/go/21450?c0=leftnet_em_20251217_em.RUZwj2&refcode=em20251217-1409&amount=5&t=3&akid=1409%2E2118727%2ENqesga)**
_**A better future for DC starts now.**_
In solidarity,
Janeese 💜

**LeftNet is an online political network fighting for progressive causes and candidates focused on social, racial, economic, and environmental justice.**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leftnet.org/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=4&akid=1409%2E2118727%2ENqesga)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leftnet.org/signup/update_your_information/?t=5&akid=1409%2E2118727%2ENqesga)

name: GOTV PAC
subject: They’re breaking ranks – and they’re scared
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
The most vulnerable House Republicans are revolting over health care – signing a petition to force a vote on extending Affordable Care Act subsidies because they know what happens if premiums double for 22 million people right before an election.
They see the writing on the wall.
Let’s be clear: this isn’t courage. It’s panic.
These are the same Republicans who spent years backing Donald Trump, attacking the ACA, and siding with insurance lobbyists while families struggled to afford coverage. A last-minute signature doesn’t erase that record.

This moment proves what we’ve been saying all along: these seats are flippable. When Republicans in swing districts start openly defying their leadership, it’s because voters are catching up – and consequences are coming.
GOTV PAC is here to make sure those consequences land.

##### _Today 's video is sponsored by NordProtect._
* * *
**Amped Up with Cliff Schecter** isn't meant to be a victory lap. It's more like a working session -- three people trying to make sense of a political moment that keeps getting more dangerous, more dishonest, and frankly more exhausting.
That was the spirit of today's show.
David Shuster and I started where we pretty much have to start right now: with the glaring hypocrisy of a Republican Party that campaigned for years as "anti-war" and "America First," and now seems perfectly comfortable flirting with escalation abroad as long as it distracts from chaos at home. None of this is subtle anymore. It's loud, sloppy, and familiar -- which almost makes it worse.
Before we dove all the way in, we took a minute to talk about something practical: protecting yourself in a digital world that's getting messier by the day.
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8c708dbb-e668-4059-8466-1f31fff37f70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
##### I'll be honest with you: I finally added NordProtect because, like most of you, I've had the same email address since the dawn of the internet. And no joke--**within a minute** of setting it up, NordProtect flagged that an _old_ email of mine had a compromised password floating around out there. I hadn't touched that account in years. I changed it immediately, locked everything down, and slept a lot better that night.
##### That's what NordProtect does. It's **all-in-one identity theft protection** --dark web monitoring, real-time credit alerts, and step-by-step guidance if something goes sideways. And if the worst happens, they've got you covered with **up to a million dollars in identity restoration support** , plus help for fraud, cyberattacks, even extortion.
##### Setup is fast, it runs quietly in the background, and it's built by actual cybersecurity experts--not marketing fluff.
##### So protect yourself now. Go to **[nordprotect.com/blueamp](https://substack.com/redirect/ec06b8d4-a5f9-4d86-832a-7d0e6661cc25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** --and use code **blueamp** for an exclusive discount. There's a **30-day money-back guarantee** , so it's risk-free.
[Protect me with NordProtect!](https://substack.com/redirect/8c708dbb-e668-4059-8466-1f31fff37f70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
##### Again, that's **[nordprotect.com/blueamp](https://substack.com/redirect/ec06b8d4-a5f9-4d86-832a-7d0e6661cc25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , code **blueamp**.

##### Your identity is worth protecting--especially now.
##### --Cliff
* * *
From there, David laid out what's actually happening with Venezuela -- and why the administration's talking points don't hold up under even minimal scrutiny. This isn't about drug interdiction. It isn't about safety. It's about oil, power, and a president who's always looking for a pressure release valve when the walls start closing in.
David does what he always does best: calmly walks through the reporting, flags what's real versus what's spin, and keeps the focus on consequences rather than theatrics. It's a skill I wish more people in media still valued, and I'm grateful to get to do this show with someone who brings that kind of discipline to the conversation.
Then Hal Sparks joined us, and as usual, he brought perspective that cuts across politics, culture, and history -- without pretending any of this is normal or acceptable. Hal has a way of making big, unsettling ideas feel accessible without sanding off the danger. We talked about Trump's increasingly erratic behavior, the impulse to "wag the dog," and what happens when ego, grievance, and power collide.
The conversation turned heavier when we talked about Rob Reiner -- his work, his decency, and the ugliness of seeing tragedy turned into another opportunity for cruelty. Hal and David both shared personal reflections that reminded me why this stuff matters beyond headlines. It's not about scoring points. It's about recognizing humanity, even when the political climate keeps trying to beat it out of us.
* * *
Blue Amp Media is a reader-supported publication--subscribe for free!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.iYZAqaP6ljCnhN2WezRbCVu0LMqADqCauhjxSONMCaI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=181906510)
* * *
From there, we addressed the Epstein files -- because ignoring them isn't an option. Trump's reaction alone tells you how serious this is. When a politician is willing to absorb political damage rather than allow transparency, it's not because the truth is harmless. David explained what Congress will see, what can and can't be hidden, and why this issue isn't going away -- no matter how hard some people want it buried.
We wrapped by talking about accountability, fatigue, and the uncomfortable reality that change doesn't usually come from one dramatic moment. It comes from pressure, persistence, and people refusing to pretend things are fine when they're clearly not.
I don't pretend we have all the answers on this show. Half the time, I'm just trying to keep up with the news like everyone else. But I do know this: conversations like these -- honest, informed, and human -- matter.
If you watched live, thank you for spending part of your day with us. If you're watching later, we're glad you're here. We'll keep doing our best to cut through the noise -- even when it's uncomfortable, even when we're tired, and even when we'd rather be wrong than silent.
* * *

For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

name: Jon Ossoff for Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter—
Here’s the truth: We’re still falling behind our end-of-quarter goal after our mid-month fundraising drive. We don’t mean to alarm you, but as Republicans look for any sign of weakness in Jon Ossoff and this campaign, it’s important that we get back on track — and quickly.
So, that’s why we’re lowering our ask to $3. Nope, that’s not a typo. Just $3.
If you can pitch in $3 (or more!) to Jon’s campaign today to help us get back on track and show the strength of this team, you can chip in to this link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ossoff-em-dec25**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251217-2-f&t=1&akid=1294%2E5691347%2E2kuV9z)
Otherwise, here’s why your donation is so important, especially today:
Jon is the most vulnerable Senator up for reelection and is facing the full force of the GOP’s war chest next November.
We understand that $3 might not sound like much, especially compared to the hundreds of millions Republicans are going to spend to flip Jon’s seat red.
But five years ago, this incredible grassroots team made history by winning a runoff election and securing the Senate majority — and it was all thanks to $3, $10, and $25 donations from supporters just like you.
But Jon is facing his toughest race yet. Winning will require building the largest statewide campaign Georgia has ever seen. And to run a campaign of this size, we can’t risk falling short on our fundraising goals.
**[So we’re humbly asking you today: Can you chip in $3 — or whatever feels right to you — to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign? Your donation will power our effort to build a campaign that can win decisively on Election Day.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251217-2-f&t=2&akid=1294%2E5691347%2E2kuV9z)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.electjon.com/go/2717?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.HAAUQZ&refcode=em251217-2-f&t=3&akid=1294%2E5691347%2E2kuV9z)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://act.electjon.com/go/1526?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.3llSsh&refcode=em251217-2-f&t=4&akid=1294%2E5691347%2E2kuV9z)**
---
****
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://act.electjon.com/go/1520?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.bGqFYH&refcode=em251217-2-f&t=5&akid=1294%2E5691347%2E2kuV9z)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://act.electjon.com/go/1521?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.IZ7DFn&refcode=em251217-2-f&t=6&akid=1294%2E5691347%2E2kuV9z)**
---
****
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://act.electjon.com/go/1522?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.pWvP31&refcode=em251217-2-f&t=7&akid=1294%2E5691347%2E2kuV9z)**
---
****
| **[Another Amount](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.PyZHDd&refcode=em251217-2-f&t=8&akid=1294%2E5691347%2E2kuV9z)**
---
****
Thank you for standing with Jon.
Team Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=9&akid=1294%2E5691347%2E2kuV9z) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=1294%2E5691347%2E2kuV9z) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: Holiday Match for Our Troops
subject: We're short of our goal
body:
Act now: This holiday matching gift won't last long
[](https://www.uso.org)
[MATCH MY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/e-LPBjb28WHZ7/RWRwUHFVSmpoWlNYWVRQaTlUc21BUU5YVC9yaFg4dWdGTGI2VHRCdStvQXNqek45cGYwV2xWTGhZWDRiSXNQYUo0TUdyRjY4c1RLOW16TjJ2TzUyeGZ4M2RYYWhRVURrT3FkNnRxeitNeDQ9S0/ZFYxWUVtcVd5QmVqMlp4UWx5QUcreFBDQ1hoNnhmQkx2ajBHNlhCdGs3STk5WUFkZ1V0Z09yakFsRmloK2VyNzdkZ2ZpMjZXajJhQzNqYUVMdUhUODI1c0FTQUQ4N2RlS0)
---
[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/~8eXC02_48JGr/RWRwUHFVSmpoWlNYWVRQaTlUc21BUU5YVC9yaFg4dWdGTGI2VHRCdStvQXNqek45cGYwV2xWTGhZWDRiSXNQYUo0TUdyRjY4c1RLOW16TjJ2TzUyeGZ4M2RYYWhRVURrT3FkNnRxeitNeDQ9S0/ZFYxWUVtcVd5QmVqMlp4UWx5QUcreFBDQ1hoNnhmQkx2ajBHNlhCdGs3STk5WUFkZ1V0Z09yakFsRmloK2VyNzdkZ2ZpMjZXajJhQzNqYUVMdUhUODI1c0FTQUQ4N2RlS0)
---

[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/~8eXC02_48JGr/RWRwUHFVSmpoWlNYWVRQaTlUc21BUU5YVC9yaFg4dWdGTGI2VHRCdStvQXNqek45cGYwV2xWTGhZWDRiSXNQYUo0TUdyRjY4c1RLOW16TjJ2TzUyeGZ4M2RYYWhRVURrT3FkNnRxeitNeDQ9S0/ZFYxWUVtcVd5QmVqMlp4UWx5QUcreFBDQ1hoNnhmQkx2ajBHNlhCdGs3STk5WUFkZ1V0Z09yakFsRmloK2VyNzdkZ2ZpMjZXajJhQzNqYUVMdUhUODI1c0FTQUQ4N2RlS0)
Dear USO Supporter,
Imagine missing your spouse's birthday, your anniversary, your child's graduation or even their birth. This is the reality for many of our active-duty service members when on deployment. The holidays are often the hardest time to be deployed far from loved ones. Now imagine missing Christmas with your family.
**" Outside of missing my daughter, I really miss being able to cook my own food and have other people home cook food. It just tastes better when it's made with love," says one service member.**
Our troops are thousands of miles from everything familiar, on call 24/7, with limited food options where each day runs into the next. **For these selfless heroes, a warm meal at a USO Center, reminders from home and a phone call to hear a loved one 's voice are all they are asking for this Christmas. **
[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/~8eXC02_48JGr/RWRwUHFVSmpoWlNYWVRQaTlUc21BUU5YVC9yaFg4dWdGTGI2VHRCdStvQXNqek45cGYwV2xWTGhZWDRiSXNQYUo0TUdyRjY4c1RLOW16TjJ2TzUyeGZ4M2RYYWhRVURrT3FkNnRxeitNeDQ9S0/ZFYxWUVtcVd5QmVqMlp4UWx5QUcreFBDQ1hoNnhmQkx2ajBHNlhCdGs3STk5WUFkZ1V0Z09yakFsRmloK2VyNzdkZ2ZpMjZXajJhQzNqYUVMdUhUODI1c0FTQUQ4N2RlS0)
---
**[For a few more days, your gift will DOUBLE to help fulfill a hero's wish list this Christmas. ](https://links.e.uso.)**
When you are out finishing your holiday shopping, please keep our military heroes on your list. Remember, for just a few more days, all gifts made to our troops will be matched, dollar for dollar, up to $100,000, thanks to our friends at FedEx.
We are working hard to deliver programs like 10,000 Christmas meals and other holiday support to service members around the world. **But we are falling short and may not be able to reach all of the troops who need our support.**
**[Please rush your gift now while it will DOUBLE! Thank you for supporting our heroes this holiday season.](https://links.e.uso.)**
For the People Who Serve,
The USO
FedEx is matching all gifts to the USO up to a total of $100,000, through December 31, 2025. Your contribution will be used where it is needed most.
United Service Organizations, Inc. (USO) is a nonprofit 501(ς)(3) organization (EIN/Tax ID: 13-1610451) and not part of the Department of Defense (DOD). The appearance of DOD visual information does not imply or constitute DOD endorsement.
Photo by Spc. Salvador Castro

1-888-484-3876

[](https://www.uso.org/) [MATCH MY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.)

name: Sarah Kline
subject: Re: Only 17 days left to help our volunteers like Jamie!
body:
Peter,
Without your gift today, we will not be able to continue supporting our volunteers in speaking to voters about pro-climate candidates in 2026. Your gift to the OLCV PAC using your Political Tax Credit will be the backbone for volunteers like Jamie.
Will you use Oregon’s Political Tax Credit today to make a gift of $50 or $100 that you can get back when you file your taxes? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2]

Thanks for your support,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Sarah%20Signature.png]

Hi Peter,
OLCV volunteers lend their time and voices year after year to help us elect pro-climate candidates, and their work starts with you . Our donors are the backbone of all of our volunteers’ work of speaking to voters about OLCV endorsed candidates.
With Oregon’s Political Tax Credit, eligible tax-paying Oregonians can give $50 (individual) or $100 (couple filing jointly) to the OLCV PAC, as essentially a free donation. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2]
Give now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=R5WwQXiZ+PcgdhO+76Yk68NHDMpgELcAxP0IcVgt0Dk3V8wwG6YbNgW3UMKYedgXBvkDwjkGFIRU5MHCLSF8clTKlhlhHZR4+6z5cGFNVxm9RIy8I6HpWJK9ZdfTcVhq]
A previous OLCV intern, Jamie Hartmann from Portland, Oregon, wants to share their story advocating for OLCV endorsed candidates:
“I wanted a way to get involved in my community when it came to combatting climate change. When I discovered OLCV, I was astounded with the amount of effort they put in. Every Oregon congressperson's vote on every climate-related bill was recorded and factored into their "lifetime score", a measurement of how much good an Oregon politician has done in regards to pushing pro-climate bills forward and shutting anti-climate bills down. As a high school intern, I helped to canvas and phone bank during election season, write to my representatives regarding potential laws, and even got to be part of a team interviewing potential candidates for an OLCV endorsement. Simply put, OLCV does the hard work so the average climate-concerned voter has an easy guide to voting that aligns with their priorities. I was proud to work with OLCV, and my climate and political knowledge has been enriched because of it.”
We need the proper resources to win next year. Your gift using Oregon’s Political Tax Credit now will help us recruit volunteers to knock on doors and talk to voters about OLCV endorsed candidates in the 2026 election! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2]
Give now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=R5WwQXiZ+PcgdhO+76Yk68NHDMpgELcAxP0IcVgt0Dk3V8wwG6YbNgW3UMKYedgXBvkDwjkGFIRU5MHCLSF8clTKlhlhHZR4+6z5cGFNVxm9RIy8I6HpWJK9ZdfTcVhq]

✔ You are an Oregon resident
✔ You will submit an Oregon tax return for 2025
✔ You make less than $75,000 (individual) or $150,000 (couple filing jointly)
Thanks for your support,

name: Mark Kelly
subject: BREAKING: Escalation from Pete Hegseth
body:
The Department of Defense is upgrading its preliminary review of Mark Kelly to an official investigation.
---
Derek, Mark Kelly here. They are escalating. [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-kelly-split?refcode=em_20251217_5593_fr&amount=20&refcode2=5593_22930333_ukkX9Z&akid=5593%2E22930333%2EukkX9Z) We hadn't heard anything significant since December 10th, and then they dropped this. Honestly, we learned about this the same as everyone else. We found out that Trump called for my arrest and execution by tweet. We heard about this investigation for the first time by tweet. And now that they're escalating, we hear it by tweet — again. Trump and Hegseth won't let this go — but I refuse to back down. And I need you with me to have any chance against them. [**Please. If you’ve got my back: Split a donation of $20 between me and the DNC.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-kelly-split?refcode=em_20251217_5593_fr&amount=20&refcode2=5593_22930333_ukkX9Z&akid=5593%2E22930333%2EukkX9Z) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between Mark Kelly and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-kelly-split?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_20251217_5593_fr&refcode2=5593_22930333_ukkX9Z&akid=5593%2E22930333%2EukkX9Z)**

subject: If we stay silent, it will be at the detriment of our rural communities, seniors, and millions of voters.

This is too important to ignore.

We’re following up because this is too important to ignore.

**Trump’s cuts are already forcing layoffs of 10,000+ postal workers, and Republicans want to utilize this moment to quietly defund and privatize the USPS.**

New Dems are pushing back in Congress. But to strengthen our case, we urgently need _500 more signatures to show broad public opposition to Trump’s plans._

**If we stay silent, it will be at the detriment of our rural communities, seniors, and millions of voters.** **[If you agree that the USPS should not be privatized and dismantled, we need you to add your name before our critical midnight deadline! Trump’s cuts are already forcing layoffs of 10,000+ postal workers, and Republicans want to utilize this moment to quietly defund and privatize the USPS. New Dems are pushing back in Congress. But to strengthen our case, we urgently need 500 more signatures to show broad public opposition to Trump’s plans. If we stay silent, it will be at the detriment of our rural communities, seniors, and millions of voters. | –New Dems ↓ FORWARDED MESSAGE ↓ 1,000 signatures needed for proper acquisition of polling data The USPS confirmed that more than 10,000+ postal workers will be laid off due to Trump’s cuts. These cuts don’t just delay our mail, they hurt our federal workers, rural residents that rely on the USPS to receive bills or medication, and put voting access at risk for millions of Americans. As New Dems fight to defend the USPS in Congress, we’re hoping you’ll join us as we build a united front to push back. Thank you for using your voice! name: Voter Action Project
subject: We use the word "fundamental" for a reason
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
You can't have a democracy without voting -- period, end of story, full stop. Saying that "voting isn't a fundamental right" is basically admitting that your state isn't a real democracy. Kansas said that with this decision, regardless of the legalese they used.
This is a step backward for our entire country. Fuel our efforts to fight rulings like this and pass pro-democracy, pro-voter legislation that defends our right to vote with $25 or more right now >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=121725_3&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Witchita Eagle: Kansas Supreme Court finds Kansans have no ‘fundamental right’ to vote [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=121725_3&amount=25]
We can't forget this, Team: The Kansas Supreme Court ruled that voting is not a fundamental right protected by the Kansas Constitution .
It should go without saying, but this decision likely weakened legal challenges to future voting restrictions in Kansas and makes it easier for opponents of voting rights in their legislature to more aggressively pursue new anti-voting laws.
Hang with us while we explain how they split hairs on this decision, but -- the Kansas Supreme Court said voting is a " political right " and not a " fundamental right ". What's the difference? With a fundamental right, the government has to prove why it needs to pass new voting laws and restrictions. With a political right, the onus is on the voters to prove they are being unreasonably burdened and blocked from voting.
In short -- this decision reads like a " get out of jail free " card from Monopoly, granting a legal wink and a nudge to opponents of voting rights to make it harder to vote.
Voter suppression anywhere hurts us everywhere. Help us defend the right to vote with $25 or whatever you can today in states like Kansas where our democracy is under threat >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=121725_3&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Robert Garcia
subject: Add your name: It's time for immigration reform >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
This is personal for me
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121488706/589653435/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDk4YjU1NS1hZGRiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=anD6CtTtvk7kA8ZYHYIXVngbkwg-61wSiyXD1qyWC6I=)
Hi, it's Robert Garcia.
As a proud and patriotic immigrant, I want every kid to have the same shot I had — the shot that allowed me to give back to this country.
But today, millions of kids and families are being denied that same chance. So I’m asking you to stand with me and demand real, comprehensive immigration reform.
[ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121488707/589653436/-1909961190?refcode=251217_RG_personal-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDk4YjU1NS1hZGRiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=anD6CtTtvk7kA8ZYHYIXVngbkwg-61wSiyXD1qyWC6I=&emci=ab98b555-addb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=d098b555-addb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=16877361)
My mom brought me to this country not knowing English and without an education. But thanks to a progressive immigration law passed by Congress in the 1980s, we were able to apply for permanent legal residency. I became a U.S. citizen in my early 20s.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121488708/589653437/-1909961190?refcode=251217_RG_personal-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDk4YjU1NS1hZGRiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=anD6CtTtvk7kA8ZYHYIXVngbkwg-61wSiyXD1qyWC6I=&emci=ab98b555-addb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=d098b555-addb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=16877361)
_**That act of Congress changed everything. **_
America gave me the opportunity to go to school, to serve my community, and to become the first LGBTQ immigrant ever elected to Congress. I know my story isn’t typical, but it should be. I believe every family should have access to that same pathway to success.
Right now, Congress should be an institution that helps people — not one that blocks progress or plays politics with families’ futures. But we’re facing big, structural challenges:
* Generational poverty
* Concentrated wealth and power
* Attacks on democracy
* Systemic racism
* And a fringe minority inside the GOP is determined to stop any meaningful immigration reform

I’ve seen firsthand that coalitions can be built — even when the opposition is entrenched, ideological, and loud. We can do big things when we insist on justice and fight for opportunity.
**That’s why I need you with me. Congress cannot keep punting on this. Families cannot wait. Kids cannot wait. ****[Add your name right now to show your support for immigration reform:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121488709/589653438/-1909961190?refcode=251217_RG_personal-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDk4YjU1NS1hZGRiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=anD6CtTtvk7kA8ZYHYIXVngbkwg-61wSiyXD1qyWC6I=&emci=ab98b555-addb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=d098b555-addb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=16877361)**
[ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121488710/589653439/-1909961190?refcode=251217_RG_personal-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDk4YjU1NS1hZGRiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=anD6CtTtvk7kA8ZYHYIXVngbkwg-61wSiyXD1qyWC6I=&emci=ab98b555-addb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=d098b555-addb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=16877361)
Thank you for believing in a more compassionate, inclusive, and hopeful America.
Robert Garcia
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121488711/589653440/-309737922?refcode=251217_RG_personal-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDk4YjU1NS1hZGRiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=anD6CtTtvk7kA8ZYHYIXVngbkwg-61wSiyXD1qyWC6I=)

[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121488712/589653441/-309737922?refcode=251217_RG_personal-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDk4YjU1NS1hZGRiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=anD6CtTtvk7kA8ZYHYIXVngbkwg-61wSiyXD1qyWC6I=)

* * *

Long Beach, CA 90802

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/qRZ6a8o5k0mLm51_n1Gsaw2?unsubscribedata=b8TJ8M7VgmIHBNSt%2F4Upw%2FH2qpdRR0tNt165f5HWmKwDu53QXulquoeYLnQDxGWCjSCK8IZOuCH%2BYpFivjO34nDzasNlRZDrOLQDLAvxjPlwt94kBFTfv7FqaxnuxkSKUBBOQFY6ZmTdacAgwWCxHsrwrdgRvO4dpz3v8B3ITHIKBW0YYtOYMQaP1vVpQrazcSAaHrpkgGkh34iI56ddHNs%2FnjKByc2XVBLc98fy%2B6jNHxWrZUhMJ4H88EFHVcJLQrI5YNJH%2BjHV50SrGT1aX0gNhd9nEdDvTog0gVkN0gJnOhSdZUy2sSjq8bWIXuWqYd%2FLAMQnIFFU5VskfZ0I9PT54Pf25GMefVNVdU4fW%2FluJtOHlh0rWgy49SyJp6dX3TwUlmh5gin9%2FInPA9jJSWhjwNv6DdAZG%2BYUy7G%2BXlEO5WCEp5%2FiKv%2F9Qy96ZAFo) to unsubscribe.

**Here’s what we know:**

Trump ADMITTED that he wants to be a dictator, even claiming the American people want him in power FOREVER!

He’s ignoring checks and balances and threatening judges with arrest!
_He’s even going after key tenets of the CONSTITUTION..._
[Friend, we need to take action to remove Trump FAST before he takes over our democracy entirely. We’re counting on 25,000 signatures by midnight to strengthen our demand: Sign the petition to invoke the 25th Amendment! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment/?refcode=VPP_20251217_EMPET_E4_T0_AC&t=8&akid=22259%2E878179%2EGX6iNL)

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: Jimmy Panetta
subject: Sending holiday wishes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2026, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121488855/589657829/-2113420158?source=EM_NBI_JP_20251217_ST_holidays_0_3MO_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTQ0MzZiYy1hZWRiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CPBD3IeJEhnqPMcBpfEe43AMGLKRZKMR2WTrqOZxiMw=&emci=844436bc-aedb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=aa4436bc-aedb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

In California’s 19th Congressional District, the holidays are a reminder of what we stand for as a community. We are a place that welcomes, supports, and lifts up each other through good times and tough times.

This year tested working families, but it also revealed the strength of the people and values of our congressional district. That includes our healthcare workers and caregivers who give more than they receive, our farmers and farmworkers who put food on our tables, our hospitality and small business owners who keep our communities running, our first responders who help us stay safe, and so many more.

As we celebrate this Holiday season, let's be reminded about our friends and neighbors who make our home an extraordinary place with so much beauty, bounty, diversity, and dynamism. I’m humbled and honored to serve you, and I look forward to continuing our work together.

Wishing you and your loved ones a warm and joyful holiday season.

— Jimmy
---

name: Mark Kelly HQ
subject: He’s really obsessed with us
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Hegseth thinks that if he can look tough and make an example out of Mark Kelly, he’ll scare everyone else into silence and obedience. Straight out of the authoritarian playbook.
#

Team — the Secretary of Defense is tasked with running the largest organization in the United States.
He manages millions and millions of uniformed personnel and civilian contractors, relationships with our global partners, hundreds of billions of dollars in funding, and the most complex and fast-moving threat environment in any of our lifetimes.
It’s arguably the most important job in the country after the President. That’s Pete Hegseth’s job, and this is what he is focused on:
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec25/.s2Rl9G&refcode=em251217-3-1mil&t=1&akid=6302%2E6688874%2EjMdaaw)
Hegseth wakes up in the morning, looks in the mirror, and rehearses the lines Trump writes for him. He books hero dress-up photo shoots for himself. He does right-wing media hits with his friends. And, apparently, he sits on Twitter posting about Mark Kelly.
It’s all about optics for this guy. He’s trying to project strength and stamp out dissent. He thinks that if he can look tough and make an example out of Mark Kelly, he’ll scare everyone else into silence and obedience. Straight out of the authoritarian playbook.
**One problem for Pete: It’s not going to work.**
Mark Kelly won’t be silenced. No chance. No way.
[**And to help him continue fighting back against Trump and Hegseth, we’re humbly asking you to make a donation of any amount.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec25/.s2Rl9G&refcode=em251217-3-1mil&t=2&akid=6302%2E6688874%2EjMdaaw)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: My work on the January 6th Committee with Zoe Lofgren
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Hi Peter – It’s Adam Schiff.

January 6th, 2021 was the first time in American history that extremist insurrectionists attacked the constitutional transfer of power in Congress and almost overthrew a presidential election.

My work with Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren on the January 6th Committee helped to uncover and hold extreme anti-Democratic forces to account.

Now, extreme MAGA Republicans are spending unreported funds to take her out of Congress.

We cannot afford MAGA extremism to triumph over Zoe in her district.

Peter: It’s Senator Adam Schiff. Please click here or the button below to donate directly to Rep. Zoe Lofgren’s reelection campaign.

DONATE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q42025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_2_2025-12-17_ASF_ZOL_ES-38680_RS&amount=25]

Donald Trump’s rhetoric is dangerous. Zoe and I have been sounding that alarm since his first campaign.

He resents truth-tellers. Public servants. And anyone who dares to hold him to account.

He admires autocrats in other countries and has repeatedly broken the democratic guardrails we have in place so no president can abuse their office.

That is why he loathes Zoe and I — because we investigated his abuses of power on the January 6 Committee.

My work with Zoe on the January 6th Committee was critical to unmasking the root causes of the insurrection and exposing those who created political violence on that day.
California – and Congress – need a true Democratic fighter like Zoe.

And I’m happy to help her win reelection once again next November.

Please join me in keeping Zoe in Congress by donating directly to her campaign today.

DONATE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q42025?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_2_2025-12-17_ASF_ZOL_ES-38680_RS&amount=25]

Thank you,
Adam Schiff

Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help.
Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q42025?refcode=emfooter&amount=25]
Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
Lofgren for Congress
PO Box 913
San Jose, CA 95113
United States

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Cancelled
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40583%2E3422442%2ESW_orv)
Peter,
**A radio station cancelled an interview with Katie Porter because they knew she would go after Donald Trump** and hold him accountable for all his terrible actions that have been hurting Californians—and they were scared Donald Trump would come after their station.
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251217_1_ak.5Rc6zA&refcode=em20251217-40583&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40583%2E3422442%2ESW_orv)
Think about that for a second, Peter.
They didn’t cancel because other news came up or for some scheduling reason. **They cancelled because Katie speaks truth to power** —because she asks the questions powerful people don’t want answered, and she doesn’t let anyone squirm away from reality.
Katie has taken on Big Banks, Big Pharma, and powerful special interests. She’s fought the Trump Administration before—and won. Katie’s not afraid of a fight, and she’s never been for sale.
So if this radio station won’t give Katie a microphone out of fear of the Trump Administration’s wrath, we’ll do what we’ve always done: take our message **directly to voters** —online, on the ground, everywhere.
**[Can you chip in $5 right now to help us respond fast, reach more Californians, and make sure Katie can’t be silenced?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251217_1_ak.5Rc6zA&refcode=em20251217-40583&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40583%2E3422442%2ESW_orv)**

Every grassroots donation helps us organize, communicate, and hold Trump and his allies accountable—no matter who tries to shut us out.
Thank you,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251217-40583&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=40583_3422442_SW_orv&akid=40583%2E3422442%2ESW_orv)**

body:

Prop 50’s win last month was an incredible win for democracy – _but the fight doesn’t stop here._
That’s why today, we’re excited to announce our **California Turnout Fund **to elect Democrats around the state ahead of the critical 2026 midterm elections.

| |
Peter, the 2026 midterms are shaping up to be some of the most competitive elections in history.

That means Republicans have _four_ opportunities to expand their Senate majority.
Donald Trump’s allies know their majority is razor-thin (**4 seats, to be exact**), so you can bet they’ll pour millions to try and flip these seats. If we don’t act now, it could take us years to regain control of the Senate.
We can’t let that happen. We need to build our war chest early to defend must-win seats like these — and we’re counting on you.

That means Republicans have four opportunities to expand their Senate majority. Donald Trump’s allies know their majority is razor-thin (4 seats, to be exact), so you can bet they’ll pour millions to try and flip these seats. If we don’t act now, it could take us years to regain control of the Senate. We can’t let that happen. If there's anyone who has a record worthy of this, it's you. First of all, Congratulations! This is reserved only for top supporters of our movement. But I have to say, you've been so outstanding in your record of support that you've built up a profile that falls within the TOP Tier of GOP Patriots. one of House GOP's most trusted patriots, and you deserve to have the status to reflect that! And before you click, I want to let you know that we'll be leaning on you for your opinion on matters as we move forward. I'm putting this deal on the table because we can't afford to lose our most trusted allies when our majority is as thin as it is right now! You, God Bless You and God Bless America! name: James Talarico
subject: My story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
Before I was a politician, I was a public school teacher. I taught sixth grade Language Arts at Rhodes Middle School on the westside of San Antonio.
The westside is a beautiful, historic Mexican-American neighborhood. It’s also one of the poorest zip codes in Texas. Every day, my students struggled heroically to overcome poverty and systems designed to hold them back.
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251217-1-ak&t=1&akid=324%2E1347274%2EPW9k2w)
Growing up, I saw that same fight in my mother — a preacher’s daughter from Laredo who left home at 19 and met my birth father, whose drinking problem sometimes led to violence.
One night, he became abusive again, but that night, my mother’s love rose to meet it. She packed all our stuff into her little Ford Escort and took me to the hotel where she worked. The manager let us stay in one of the rooms until we found a small apartment of our own in East Austin.
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251217-1-ak&t=2&akid=324%2E1347274%2EPW9k2w)
Like my students, my mom was a fighter. And she passed that fighting spirit along to me.
I first ran for the Texas House in 2018 to fight for my constituents — people like my mom and my students. It was a district no one thought we could win, but together we flipped a district Donald Trump had won just two years earlier.
As a legislator, I’ve passed major legislation to fund our neighborhood schools, expand job opportunities for young adults, and lower the cost of child care, housing, and prescription drugs.
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251217-1-ak&t=3&akid=324%2E1347274%2EPW9k2w)
I’ve led the fight against the billionaire mega-donors that have rigged the system against working Texas families. And I’m the only member of the Texas Legislature who has never taken corporate PAC money.
Now, as those same billionaire mega-donors take over the federal government, we need more fighters in Washington who will take power back for working people.
I’ve fought for working people — and won. Now, I’m running to take our fight to the U.S. Senate.
[**If you believe we need a fighter for the people in the U.S. Senate, will you consider making a contribution to our campaign today? This fight requires all of us.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251217-1-ak&t=4&akid=324%2E1347274%2EPW9k2w)

[**Please consider making a contribution to support our fight today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jt-em-launch?refcode=em_footer&t=30&refcode2=324_1347274_PW9k2w&akid=324%2E1347274%2EPW9k2w)
James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=31&akid=324%2E1347274%2EPW9k2w).
clean_body: Peter — Before I was a politician, I was a public school teacher. I taught sixth grade Language Arts at Rhodes Middle School on the westside of San Antonio. The westside is a beautiful, historic Mexican-American neighborhood. It’s also one of the poorest zip codes in Texas. Every day, my students struggled heroically to overcome poverty and systems designed to hold them back. Growing up, I saw that same fight in my mother — a preacher’s daughter from Laredo who left home at 19 and met my birth father, whose drinking problem sometimes led to violence. One night, he became abusive again, but that night, my mother’s love rose to meet it. She packed all our stuff into her little Ford Escort and took me to the hotel where she worked. The manager let us stay in one of the rooms until we found a small apartment of our own in East Austin. Like my students, my mom was a fighter. And she passed that fighting spirit along to me. I first ran for the Texas House in 2018 to fight for my constituents — people like my mom and my students. It was a district no one thought we could win, but together we flipped a district Donald Trump had won just two years earlier. As a legislator, I’ve passed major legislation to fund our neighborhood schools, expand job opportunities for young adults, and lower the cost of child care, housing, and prescription drugs. I’ve led the fight against the billionaire mega-donors that have rigged the system against working Texas families. And I’m the only member of the Texas Legislature who has never taken corporate PAC money. Now, as those same billionaire mega-donors take over the federal government, we need more fighters in Washington who will take power back for working people. I’ve fought for working people — and won. Now, I’m running to take our fight to the U.S. Senate. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** James Paid for by Talarico for Texas Talarico for Texas PO Box 14508 Austin, TX 78761

body:

Like I said: view all political developments for the rest of the week in light of the fact that the Epstein Files are supposed to be released on Friday.
House Republicans just suddenly cancelled the Congressional session for Friday and are sending everyone home Thursday evening.

We deserve so much better than Republicans who will do anything they can to delay the Epstein files from being released.

subject: That was some weird shit

body:

Tonight Donald Trump took over national TV news sets to spew a bunch of random bullshit about “transgender for everybody,” “affordability is a made up term,” “sinister woke radicals in our schools,” and a long list of other lies.
It reminded me of President Bush’s reaction to Trump’s inaugural address.
**_“That was some weird shit.”_**
One thing is clear: the Democratic Party needs to run the best possible candidates in November. And we need to effectively end this presidency's reign of terror.
We’re working to elect a new generation of progressives who are ready to offer a real alternative to Trumpism and deliver the change that Americans want to see. With a new generation coming into power who are ready to fight back against Trump and refuse corporate money.
Our candidates are fighting for affordable housing and health care, solutions to climate change and gun violence, and human rights and dignity for everyone. And they are building a bench of progressives that will shape power for years to come.
