name: Ron Wyden
subject: We’re now closer to the cliff
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
We need a majority ready on Day One to pass meaningful, lasting health care legislation that stabilizes costs and expands access.
|
---
| | Last week, **Senate Republicans blocked the passage of a bill that would have extended the ACA tax credits that keep health care costs down for millions of families.** We're now ever closer to the health care cliff, and the fact we're in this situation speaks to the **cost of having Republicans in charge.** When these tax credits expire, health care premiums are going to go through the roof. By letting these tax credits expire, Republicans are sending the message that they couldn't care less if you and your family can afford health care. So while I continue to fight for the ACA credits as the clock ticks down on 2025, I'm gearing up to make sure we **flip Congress blue in 2026. Time to send failed Republican leadership packing.** We need a majority ready on Day One to pass meaningful, lasting health care legislation that stabilizes costs and expands access. [**Will you help me build that majority by donating $3 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121489335/589664425/-2044921950?refcode=2025-12-17-aca&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=b3329e29-c1db-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzMyOWUyOS1jMWRiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YIZYgPtlO63k31wSS5MMP9WwLIgd2VF0NLH3y6miVvA=) Thank you, _Ron_ Forwarded Message | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121489336/589664426/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzMyOWUyOS1jMWRiLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YIZYgPtlO63k31wSS5MMP9WwLIgd2VF0NLH3y6miVvA=&emci=95b65ce5-9fdb-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=b3329e29-c1db-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9818364)
---
A runaway train is barreling toward our country.
Earlier this year, Republicans voted to raise monthly health insurance premiums for tens of millions of families across the country.
For years, Republicans have been targeting the Affordable Care Act, with seemingly no plan to replace the coverage that millions of families would lose. Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans repeatedly claim that they have _"a plan,"_ but all they have to offer is concepts of a plan.
Earlier this year, I spoke with a couple in Eugene, Oregon, who will see their monthly premiums go from around $400 a month to over $2200 a month. That's a price increase so staggering it leaves you speechless. No one in the United States of America should be expected to pay what amounts to a second mortgage for their health insurance.
Millions of families just like this one will be forced to make tough choices between keeping their health care and covering their rent and groceries.
There's a simple solution to stop this runaway train barreling toward our country: Republicans need to join Democrats and vote for our legislation that will stop this price increase from going into effect on January 1st.
**By refusing to vote for our bill to keep costs down, Republicans are pushing millions of families to the edge of an economic cliff.**
From their trillion-dollar blow to Medicaid to voting to raise premiums, 2025 has been the year Republicans took a sledgehammer to health care in America.
I'm under no illusions that our system is perfect. I think we can all agree that health care costs and insurance companies are spinning out of control, and more needs to be done to rein them in. But the solution is not kicking millions of people off their health care.
That's why I'm working around the clock to keep costs down for families _now_. But then it's time to drastically overhaul the for-profit system that puts profits over patients.
More soon,
_Ron_

| | ******If you are a listener of the Karamo Report, you have heard me discuss technocracy and AI. AI is a tool that is NOT inherently evil and has many potential benefits. However, the individuals who are developing our AI systems in America have documented ongoing relationships with organizations that are coordinating the globalist-cult infiltration and take down of the United States of America. Oracle’s CEO, Larry Ellison, who is part of the Stargate Project, has publicly stated that AI will ensure citizens will be on our “best behavior”. And there is a push to centralize all AI mandates nationally, preventing citizens from determining how much AI intrudes into our lives, all under the guise of winning the AI arms race. This opens the door for severe Constitutional abuses. Don’t forget MKULTRA, the CIA project where unwitting American citizens were drugged, sexually abused, and experienced other forms of torture in mind control experiments, which was justified as a matter of national security as part of the effort to win the Cold War. History has shown us we need to be vigilant regarding how AI will be integrated into our individual lives and communities.** ****
**Jay Jusino is on a remarkable mission to educate Christians on how AI, technocracy, and The Great Reset line up with Bible Prophecy; AND that these should not create a scenario where we throw up our hands and think that because these aforementioned events and many others line up with End Times, we should just cruise and wait for Jesus to return. We are to organize with people in our city, counties, and state to resist this system lawfully and peacefully, even if we have to suffer.****
****Jay is an educator and has a website,[www.equippingteachers.org](https://link.kristinakaramo.com/campaigns/er234zwx6g861/track-url/rb99335sg3c36/cdb7244ede5cd98966678c3edc0fe9b63d4bcdda)[,](https://link.kristinakaramo.com/campaigns/er234zwx6g861/track-url/rb99335sg3c36/f9388da3409216805cbd8b9c4ab81960e8fd2426) where he provides resource materials for Christian parents and teachers. ** ****
**Be sure to visit[www.thekaramoreport.com](https://link.kristinakaramo.com/campaigns/er234zwx6g861/track-url/rb99335sg3c36/b5eb4ad8cf2cc379d21f134bf34a2b1cccc7d347) to stay informed and share the content we create to support this project, disseminating critical information that equips people to save our nation and secure our children’s future.**
**To God Alone be the Glory,****Kristina Karamo**
**"And do not fear those who kill the body but cannot kill the soul. Rather fear him who can destroy both soul and body in hell."****\- Matthew[10:28](https://link.kristinakaramo.com/campaigns/er234zwx6g861/track-url/rb99335sg3c36/5e898e29020279642843650bcfd67bcf7ea7ee7a)**

clean_body: | | | | | | RESISTING THE BEAST | | | | | | ****If you are a listener of the Karamo Report, you have heard me discuss technocracy and AI. AI is a tool that is NOT inherently evil and has many potential benefits. However, the individuals who are developing our AI systems in America have documented ongoing relationships with organizations that are coordinating the globalist-cult infiltration and take down of the United States of America. Oracle’s CEO, Larry Ellison, who is part of the Stargate Project, has publicly stated that AI will ensure citizens will be on our “best behavior”. And there is a push to centralize all AI mandates nationally, preventing citizens from determining how much AI intrudes into our lives, all under the guise of winning the AI arms race. This opens the door for severe Constitutional abuses. Don’t forget MKULTRA, the CIA project where unwitting American citizens were drugged, sexually abused, and experienced other forms of torture in mind control experiments, which was justified as a matter of national security as part of the effort to win the Cold War. History has shown us we need to be vigilant regarding how AI will be integrated into our individual lives and communities. ** Jay Jusino is on a remarkable mission to educate Christians on how AI, technocracy, and The Great Reset line up with Bible Prophecy; AND that these should not create a scenario where we throw up our hands and think that because these aforementioned events and many others line up with End Times, we should just cruise and wait for Jesus to return. We are to organize with people in our city, counties, and state to resist this system lawfully and peacefully, even if we have to suffer.** Jay is an educator and has a website, where he provides resource materials for Christian parents and teachers. ** Be sure to visit to stay informed and share the content we create to support this project, disseminating critical information that equips people to save our nation and secure our children’s future. To God Alone be the Glory,**Kristina Karamo "And do not fear those who kill the body but cannot kill the soul. Rather fear him who can destroy both soul and body in hell."\- Matthew | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | The Karamo Report PO Box 721123Berkley, MI48072 | |

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Children need to know
body:
Sadly, most Americans – and especially our children – have come to believe that the rainbow is a symbol of the LGBTQ+ movement.

| | |
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,If you agree that it’s time for Christians to boldly and unashamedly lead our schools and our culture back to our country’s founding values......will you help me teach children the true meaning of the rainbow?The Bible tells us that God gave us the rainbow as a symbol of his covenant with the earth:
---
**“I have set my rainbow in the clouds, and it will be the sign of the covenant between me and the earth.” Genesis 9:13**
---
Sadly, most Americans – and especially our children – have come to believe that the rainbow is a symbol of the LGBTQ+ movement.After all, it was back in 1999 that Bill Clinton first recognized June as “LGBTQ+ Pride Month.” And LGBTQ+ “rainbow” flags now fly year-round in stores, libraries, schools, and the halls of Congress...and even in some churches. **[That’s why I’m hoping you will take just one simple action today to help me teach children the true meaning of the rainbow and God’s word.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8buqa7j8pk6br4s9uu2m3r8415u52qounk4vdf0_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c1imaor1c9h2bs)** With Christianity under attack in America, our nation desperately needs Christians who are willing to stand up and defend our faith.My name is Kirk Cameron.Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Monumental.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me.I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandfather, and a Christian.When I saw the anti-God, anti-family, and anti-America messages the Left was pushing on young parents and children, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **BRAVE Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.But that’s not all they are doing.BRAVE Books is giving parents, grandparents, and teachers the necessary tools to combat the Left’s hijacking of our children’s hearts and minds in schools, libraries, and elsewhere.And now, because of faithful Americans like you, God’s Word is being heard in the public square once again.Friend, I’m used to receiving hate mail from atheists and radical Left-wing activists who don’t like our faith message.But their responses make me realize just how much the LGBTQ+ community has changed our culture in just one generation.In the past, the gay community largely claimed they just wanted “tolerance.”But now that’s not enough.Today, they want everyone to celebrate and approve of their lifestyle – and they’re accusing those who don’t of “hate speech.” But by not standing up for God’s Word, Christians have allowed the Left’s indoctrination to creep into our churches, schools, and into our nation.And now we’re seeing the terrible effects of our inaction: our young children are being corrupted and led astray from the Faith. Think of all the drag queen story hours being held in public libraries, or the soft porn being promoted as teen reading, or even the classrooms where leftist teachers are sharing their “sexual orientation” and pronouns with kids as young as 5-years-old.More and more people are calling good evil...and evil good (Isaiah 5:20). My heart is heavy when I think of what’s in store for this nation if we don’t protect our children from these demonic influences.Never before has our culture so desperately needed parents and teachers to point our children towards the truth and away from the lies of man.
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z97pfnigd94trhruaoqq0t9b18obm331c49u0bog_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c1imaor1c9h2bs)
---
| That’s exactly why **BRAVE Books** started the “See You at the Library” movement and my children’s TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” -- to boldly, publicly and unashamedly remind Christians and non-believers alike of the truth of God’s Word and the Christian values our country was founded on.
---
| | That’s exactly why **BRAVE Books** started the “See You at the Library” movement and my children’s TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” -- to boldly, publicly and unashamedly remind Christians and non-believers alike of the truth of God’s Word and the Christian values our country was founded on.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu9tircgt2i97g1bvtudf0m77rj6upigkg610t18_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c1imaor1c9h2bs)
---
| | Our national “See You at the Library” movement has reached tens of thousands of children in thousands of libraries across the country – including the Library of Congress!At each event, we pray together, say the pledge of allegiance, and read books that instill Godly and patriotic values in our kids.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvmu53ntjh5ma7j67o1rih16u65rmsoi8e32s6s8_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c1imaor1c9h2bs)
---
| | Our national “See You at the Library” movement has reached tens of thousands of children in thousands of libraries across the country – including the Library of Congress!At each event, we pray together, say the pledge of allegiance, and read books that instill Godly and patriotic values in our kids.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmtbvs9usc80eto3n83pfrt72qo2ot41ecftm4n8_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c1imaor1c9h2bs)
---
| | Just the thing we need to counteract the evil “Drag Queen Story Hours” and every other leftist lie.And with our TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” we are reaching hundreds of thousands of families with timeless Christian values.Giving parents and kids an alternative to the filth being shown on screens today. As you can imagine, secularists despise our mission. They do not want us engaging the culture with biblical truths. And they are doing everything in their power to discredit, shame, and silence us. If you agree that we must introduce thousands of more children to the truth of God’s Word in these troubled times, [**then I would like to invite you to be a part of our life-changing mission here at BRAVE Books.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3d8746jdrllqvkpkekhbrgn2rhk4veo2712ad3o_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c1imaor1c9h2bs) Will you help us teach children Christian virtues and proclaim truth to a hurting world that needs God’s Word more than ever?So many children simply don’t know the truth about God or His love for them. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll help us reach even more families through **BRAVE Books** ’ crucial projects, like our Christmas “Mouse in the House,” a Godly alternative to that secular “elf” game that so many families use, or producing the next season of “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” giving children wholesome content that entertains while building their character. [**Would you prayerfully consider making a gift to BRAVE Books today?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8gg0moj2mq0sqcjqv25p8ll8e7md13pdnsplfio_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c1imaor1c9h2bs) America’s public schools are “normalizing” the ungodly agenda of the radical Left by decorating classrooms and hallways with “Gay Pride” rainbows, filling library shelves with LGBTQ+ books, and pushing movies and TV shows that glorify sinful behavior.They’re leading our children away from Christ...and toward an empty, godless and hopeless secular doctrine. But **BRAVE Books** is giving parents and grandparents a way to fight back and teach the next generation that God’s word is GOOD. Thank you for supporting BRAVE Books – and for helping us protect our precious children and grandchildren!
---
| | Sincerely,
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4n2gaj5rk8sfbkssdsqithre7eamql6j21h2n4g_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c1imaor1c9h2bs)
---
Kirk Cameron
---
[ **DONATE ** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2j0d66obh2lihcd16c7oi5cm32n8aaf6oplc4a8_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c1imaor1c9h2bs)
---
|
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhns2l97tic0anclf5u9pnm374f8tp586tlp6f48_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c1imaor1c9h2bs)
---

name: AMAC Action
subject: American elections should be decided by American citizens
body:
It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.

| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrhkohtkjjni819j6ris9g7r9ma69bfidn4vm5ho_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c1im6pb6cjh2bs)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcfjlrd53qul7lmj0bk575rdni9th2dn8b80mme0_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c1im6pb6cjh2bs)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrmvhhg2c04kmhjiph51m57184fv1uje1qukqcdg_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c1im6pb6cjh2bs)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsnf2a7n5d1v1c4jjja1b1sgaruvfil4oduhieg0_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c1im6pb6cjh2bs)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze73n3biaprjb5se3coobe9e23euoqnqb9ntcpo8_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c1im6pb6cjh2bs)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmnd1kblria72bbchk5h6irmlga4nqni4ed85p38_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c1im6pb6cjh2bs)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztc80vfq19u5g2h06bqdtelu7dsa9da8kma3efj8_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c1im6pb6cjh2bs), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvns3c0dt53usp0mko5ohqrml98r6qnb2004nlmo_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c1im6pb6cjh2bs)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote
---

subject: If they can silence voices, what else can they erase?
body:

| (855) 644-6215 [Candace Owens] Why I Choose Goldco! Don’t miss these special offers from my trusted partner - Goldco | | | | [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=c4879a20478d8d35c5c8c6bdd7adc6923762309d4db7f2588f22e10038a3e899790b6d5fd5fd3af00a391078cbb6a5222c7924213dd685f6a207531c5a318de8)
---
| | **It’s Candace Owens.**
---
**When my friend was recently assassinated, the cruelty spoke volumes.**
---
Instead of mourning, elites mocked. **Some even celebrated.
** _That’s not free speech._ That’s erasing a voice. By force. **By death.**
---
**And the hypocrisy doesn’t stop there.**
---
| | [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=c4879a20478d8d35c5c8c6bdd7adc6923762309d4db7f2588f22e10038a3e899790b6d5fd5fd3af00a391078cbb6a5222c7924213dd685f6a207531c5a318de8)
---
**Jimmy Kimmel laughed when Roseanne Barr lost her career.**
---
**He cheered when Tucker Carlson was taken off the air.** But when HE was fired, suddenly it was about “free speech.”
---
**We all know the rules. If you are on the “approved” side, you’re protected. If you’re not, you’re silenced. Or worse..**.
---
[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=c4879a20478d8d35c5c8c6bdd7adc6923762309d4db7f2588f22e10038a3e899790b6d5fd5fd3af00a391078cbb6a5222c7924213dd685f6a207531c5a318de8)
---
| | **Google recently admitted that the Biden administration pressured them to take down YouTube content that didn’t even break the rules.**
---
They called that pressure “unacceptable and wrong.” The only reason they are admitting it now is because President Trump will not **put up with their nonsense.

** Banks have **openly canceled conservatives.** Melania Trump. Kanye West. If they can target public figures, what chance does the **average person** have?
---
[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=c4879a20478d8d35c5c8c6bdd7adc6923762309d4db7f2588f22e10038a3e899790b6d5fd5fd3af00a391078cbb6a5222c7924213dd685f6a207531c5a318de8)
---
**So here’s the truth...**
---
If they can pressure platforms to **censor** , if banks can **cancel accounts** , if the IRS can **weaponize audits** , what makes YOU think your savings are _safe in their hands?_
---
**Based on what we have seen recently, we are at a turning point.**
---
Institutions are showing _they will not hesitate_ to use their power.

**I may be targeted next. Or it could be you...**
---
| | **So I will _never_ trust my family’s future to people who have _already_ shown they will use any tactic, no matter how dirty.**
---
[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=c4879a20478d8d35c5c8c6bdd7adc6923762309d4db7f2588f22e10038a3e899790b6d5fd5fd3af00a391078cbb6a5222c7924213dd685f6a207531c5a318de8)
---
That is why I keep part of my savings in GOLD and SILVER.
---
Assets that _cannot_ be censored, deleted, frozen, or murdered.
---
**If freedom still matters to you, protect your voice and protect what you’ve earned!**
---
[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=c4879a20478d8d35c5c8c6bdd7adc6923762309d4db7f2588f22e10038a3e899790b6d5fd5fd3af00a391078cbb6a5222c7924213dd685f6a207531c5a318de8)

name: Robert, RSLC
subject: My worst fear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
I was reviewing our Republican State Leadership Membership Rolls and my heart sank when I saw your 2025 Republican State Leadership Membership Card has lapsed.

Friend.
I was reviewing our Republican State Leadership Membership Rolls and my heart sank when I saw your 2025 Republican State Leadership Membership Card has lapsed.[!!️UPDATE YOUR MEMBERSHIP >>
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb8u5gq3jfkl6i9eouver56fcpgmmpv72j09tej8_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c1im9oj2chh2bs)I remember the day you joined us, the passion and energy you brought to our team. We shared a commitment to Conservative values and a vision for a better future. But now, it feels like that's all slipping away...
Life gets busy, and sometimes things fall through the cracks. But the thought of not having your voice, your support, and your commitment to our cause is a hard reality to face.
That's why I'm reaching out to you today, one last time. [I want to personally invite you to renew your membership for 2025.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg0q1lch802g3f9kquv6kqacsj96bolm2kbg01qg_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c1im9oj2chh2bs) It's not just about the money; it's about standing with us against the Radical Left and fighting for what's right.
If I don't hear from you, I fear the worst.
I fear that we'll lose another vital voice in our fight for Conservative values...
Please, don't let that happen.
Renew your membership and send a message that you still stand with Republican State Leadership TODAY! [!!️UPDATE YOUR MEMBERSHIP >>
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk7ej80kl3nun6afmlr9s0n6d0p4d5af2u3ujb58_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c1im9oj2chh2bs)Sincerely,
Robert, Republican State Leadership Membership Services

clean_body: I was reviewing our Republican State Leadership Membership Rolls and my heart sank when I saw your 2025 Republican State Leadership Membership Card has lapsed. Friend. I was reviewing our Republican State Leadership Membership Rolls and my heart sank when I saw your 2025 Republican State Leadership Membership Card has lapsed. remember the day you joined us, the passion and energy you brought to our team. We shared a commitment to Conservative values and a vision for a better future. But now, it feels like that's all slipping away... Life gets busy, and sometimes things fall through the cracks. But the thought of not having your voice, your support, and your commitment to our cause is a hard reality to face. That's why I'm reaching out to you today, one last time. It's not just about the money; it's about standing with us against the Radical Left and fighting for what's right. If I don't hear from you, I fear the worst. I fear that we'll lose another vital voice in our fight for Conservative values... Please, don't let that happen. Renew your membership and send a message that you still stand with Republican State Leadership TODAY! , Robert, Republican State Leadership Membership Services * | By providing your mobile phone number, you are consenting to receive calls and texts and P2P messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from RSLC and its affiliated PACs. subject: House passes GOP health care bill without Obamacare subsidy extension
body:
The House passed a Republican-led health care bill Wednesday evening that does not address expiring Affordable Care Act tax credits, putting the Obamacare subsidies on a path to expire at the end of the year. The bill, dubbed the Lower Health Care Premiums for All Americans Act, was passed in a 216-211 vote, with just [...]...Click to read more | [](http://trk.libertyledger._ZD01In0/w7rwjG8tfh9GKrG-edV7jA)

# **[House passes GOP health care bill without Obamacare subsidy extension](http://trk.libertyledger.)**

The House passed a Republican-led health care bill Wednesday evening that does not address expiring Affordable Care Act tax credits, putting the Obamacare subsidies on a path to expire at the end of the year. # **[Senate sends annual defense bill to Trump's desk](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/ExNxRnNHk9EbSBpIhac6Dg)**
---
Congress met a year-end deadline to pass the National Defense Authorization Act on Wednesday, marking the 65th consecutive year that lawmakers have approved the bill, a rare show of bipartisanship. The Senate passed the NDAA, which sets the policy priorities of the Pentagon, in a 77-20 vote, handing troops a 3.8% pay raise and authorizing [...]...Click to read more

# **[Catholic bishops speak out as New York governor pledges to pass assisted suicide bill](http://trk.libertyledger.-WW6aRQ)**
---
New York Gov. Kathy Hochul, (pictured on Nov. 25, 2025, with Cardinal Timothy Dolan at a Catholic Charities Thanksgiving event to hand out turkeys and other foods), said she will sign a bill legalizing assisted suicide in the Empire State. / Credit: Michael M. Santiago/Getty Images CNA Staff, Dec 17, 2025 / 16:45 pm (CNA). New York Gov. Kathy Hochul will sign an assisted suicide bill that Catholic leaders have ardently opposed, making New York the 13th state to allow the practice. Hochul, who called it an “incredibly difficult decision,” said she will sign the bill after lawmakers add some “guardrails.” The bill allows doctors to give terminally ill patients drugs to end their lives.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.-WW6aRQ)

# **[Pope Leo Expected to Appoint Pro-Life Bishop Ron Hicks to Lead New York Archdiocese](http://trk.libertyledger.-5A)**
---
Pope Leo XIV is expected to appoint pro-life Bishop Ronald Hicks of Joliet, Illinois, as the new archbishop of New York, replacing retiring Cardinal Timothy Dolan. Cardinal Dolan has been an eloquent and outspoken defender of the pro-life position so pro-life Catholics hope his replacement will have the same pro-life perspective. The good news is [...]

# **[House Judiciary to hold private interview with Jack Smith](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Former Justice Department special counsel Jack Smith is set for a closed-door interview with House Republicans on Wednesday after lawmakers rebuffed his offer to testify publicly about his investigations into President Donald Trump. The private deposition is part of an ongoing investigation by the Republican-led House Judiciary Committee into the Justice Department’s criminal inquiries of [...]...Click to read more

name: Mark Kelly
subject: BREAKING: Escalation from Pete Hegseth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
The Department of Defense is upgrading its preliminary review of Mark Kelly to an official investigation.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TWcC90LIhct1GJQlp4DhIn-KZElSQDkgIxLzp5bpzci8O5MCVLtOz5-0UQrK4v2_k-OVXs5RkL7NAjeagzXsA-zdm_W-kyEbygka1qJK7DzKAiXLgjJcNDLb2Qa_IV9H7kKkVa_LY54-wRZhI85YIBazTdWOzOclJE66CdJLRvoKxe3bl3REycWv3h594ATZAeAohGm6x3DvnbAnUGzAnpXBddR0k0jFwNMhQhGIZj3pejDCvAlEPQ==&c=YTQS7yEcFY0QJ6Hp3rfJkstnH1i11k9Z-14V0ULi48jAaZEVnX5A9Q==&ch=NgLyG7Zh4UUhFhISDuVc_dI9ZQzXavtLYnflRgMAOcSLqDbvgNo3Ww==)
---
|
Peter, Mark Kelly here.
They are escalating.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TWcC90LIhct1GJQlp4DhIn-KZElSQDkgIxLzp5bpzci8O5MCVLtOz5-0UQrK4v2_k-OVXs5RkL7NAjeagzXsA-zdm_W-kyEbygka1qJK7DzKAiXLgjJcNDLb2Qa_IV9H7kKkVa_LY54-wRZhI85YIBazTdWOzOclJE66CdJLRvoKxe3bl3REycWv3h594ATZAeAohGm6x3DvnbAnUGzAnpXBddR0k0jF0aWs8e21Vwt614hmGXekLg==&c=YTQS7yEcFY0QJ6Hp3rfJkstnH1i11k9Z-14V0ULi48jAaZEVnX5A9Q==&ch=NgLyG7Zh4UUhFhISDuVc_dI9ZQzXavtLYnflRgMAOcSLqDbvgNo3Ww==)
---
We hadn't heard anything significant since December 10th, and then they dropped this.
Honestly, we learned about this the same as everyone else. We found out that Trump called for my arrest and execution by tweet. We heard about this investigation for the first time by tweet. And now that they're escalating, we hear it by tweet -- again.
Trump and Hegseth won't let this go -- but I refuse to back down. And I need you with me to have any chance against them.
[Please. If you've got my back: Split a donation of $25 between me and Trisha Calvarese.](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TWcC90LIhct1GJQlp4DhIn-KZElSQDkgIxLzp5bpzci8O5MCVLtOz5-0UQrK4v2_fQPAm9IcRCdDBw9f1IEb2xSzXuLqULPWGmX3i5nw5bcTpdoi__fl5-MV5vx6BshTASnQRwAA6vSE3uQaPBvLcjpSB-iwlaNOJ_v3JTYqUQ6KIjrO-iuKEvlrj2s_P7SAafz-cAbPX2b-ToUqVDCHPv97V4nE3xWSbJ74jN6fP48yBJ02B3qffBxxkGMSIhLY&c=YTQS7yEcFY0QJ6Hp3rfJkstnH1i11k9Z-14V0ULi48jAaZEVnX5A9Q==&ch=NgLyG7Zh4UUhFhISDuVc_dI9ZQzXavtLYnflRgMAOcSLqDbvgNo3Ww==)

Honestly, we learned about this the same as everyone else. We found out that Trump called for my arrest and execution by tweet. We heard about this investigation for the first time by tweet. And now that they're escalating, we hear it by tweet -- again.
Trump and Hegseth won't let this go -- but I refuse to back down. And I need you with me to have any chance against them.

|
Peter,
Donald Trump and JD Vance are out here calling the economy "A+++."
That's a joke.
We are on the brink of recession. Mass layoffs. Prices exploding across the board. Groceries. Rent. Housing. Childcare. Working families are drowning, and MAGA is handing out gold stars to themselves.

| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qgeSt14RN02jOOky9IauCCaq06yJMYOIr0GtKnKKXcD5JngxFOvnlFBSZPTMMftbmVj0MsznJjvbYRQS20Mmk6mFcDFB4R2amMoOrOcFub62bkhIOl3D1LXCJLxkAPzWd6VMK2wQf0LQQ7ca2DSVp8i72iwrl0acAIDsBmP6_nWEKpVJOPetsdsyBIy1RDUvvn-q60513KsOybeeQBSuyXFGgvYA5LSI&c=syOsTambMuqnpiMStPZYbEwV1Zk8J1wc3AzTnYXV8rXphgNF8o_DFQ==&ch=UXrThkAQs8ymqi0hKGnQWAZzyswMe4hDsdnyr1d_X-sIzhCH48-Y3g==)

| We've seen this movie before. Republicans take power, the economy crashes, working people get crushed--and Democrats are left cleaning up the wreckage. Over and over and over again.
But here's the truth we Democrats can't ignore anymore: band-aid solutions aren't enough.
We don't just need Democrats who will take us back to the status quo. We need a new generation of Democrats who will finally fix what's broken.
That means: Medicare for All, real affordable housing, student debt forgiveness, free college and vocation school, and breaking up monopolies that jack prices up and rig the economy against us.
That is what I will fight for in Congress.
But the MAGA billionaires who helped engineer this looming collapse are already circling the drains in this race, searching for a politician who will protect their profits, shield their failures, and sell out working families when things fall apart.
[I'm running to stop them and build a true working-class movement in Congress. clean_body: We’ve seen this movie before. Republicans take power, the economy crashes, working people get crushed—and Democrats are left cleaning up the wreckage. | | | | | == | Peter, Donald Trump and JD Vance are out here calling the economy "A+++." That's a joke. We are on the brink of recession. Mass layoffs. Prices exploding across the board. Groceries. Rent. Housing. Childcare. Working families are drowning, and MAGA is handing out gold stars to themselves. | | == | We've seen this movie before. Republicans take power, the economy crashes, working people get crushed--and Democrats are left cleaning up the wreckage. Over and over and over again. But here's the truth we Democrats can't ignore anymore: band-aid solutions aren't enough. We don't just need Democrats who will take us back to the status quo. We need a new generation of Democrats who will finally fix what's broken. That means: Medicare for All, real affordable housing, student debt forgiveness, free college and vocation school, and breaking up monopolies that jack prices up and rig the economy against us. That is what I will fight for in Congress. But the MAGA billionaires who helped engineer this looming collapse are already circling the drains in this race, searching for a politician who will protect their profits, shield their failures, and sell out working families when things fall apart. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | Same movie, same villains. This time, we flip the script. | == Bushra Amiwala Democrat for IL-09 | | == | | | | == | Mail checks to: Bushra for Congress PO Box 911 Skokie, IL 60076 | | == | | | | Bushra for Congress | PO Box 911 | Skokie, IL 60076 US | |

name: Republican Party of Wisconsin
subject: COMING SOON: The Governor Who Stole Christmas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN** NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-anldly-didthutlhu-r/) Patriot, Just like the Grinch who hated Christmas, Governor Evers can't stand the idea of families keeping their money. He's the one who slithered and slunk in that infamous 400-year veto, striking digits and dashes to lock in automatic school revenue increases until **2425**. While the Grinch tried to steal presents, Evers is stealing from your wallet, driving [**skyrocketing property taxes**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-anldly-didthutlhu-y/) that hit families hard right when holiday bills pile up.And that's not all. Evers' policies have led to repeated utility rate hikes approved under his watch, [pushing **energy bills higher**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-anldly-didthutlhu-j/) for every Wisconsinite. Your heating and electric costs are climbing, dimming the lights on holiday cheer and leaving homes colder and wallets thinner.The Grinch puzzled and puzzled till his puzzler was sore, wondering how Christmas could come without ribbons, tags, packages, boxes, or bags. But Evers? He's not puzzled at all; he's delighted to steal Christmas joy and your hard-earned cash. [HELP US SAVE CHRISTMAS AND WISCONSIN](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-anldly-didthutlhu-d/) Enough is enough. Democrats' hearts keep shrinking while Wisconsin families pay the price. We need a Republican Governor in 2026 to reverse these taxes, freeze the hikes, and restore affordability. Unlike the Grinch, who finally learned the true meaning of Christmas, Democrats show no signs of change.Help us save Christmas, and Wisconsin for good. Unlike the Grinch, we can put a stop to this holiday heist.**Will you chip in [$25, $50, $100, or whatever you can today](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-anldly-didthutlhu-h/) _?_** -Team WisGOP | **PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN** NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. www.WisGOP.org Republican Party of Wisconsin **|** 148 E. Johnson Street**|** Madison, WI 53703 [Preferences](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.updatemyprofile.com/y-anldly-931243C5-didthutlhu-k) | [Unsubscribe](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-u-anldly-didthutlhu-u/)

---
Make no mistake: YOU made this happen. We should feel great about what we did together.
Defend Our Courts assembled a nationwide coalition to protect the highest court in the most important swing state from MAGA's plot to keep Trump in power past 2028.
As if to acknowledge the truth of our message about the stakes in the race, Trump just issued pardons to Rudy Giuliani and 76 other senior aides, lawyers, and consultants that planned and carried out the attempted 2020 coup to keep him in office.
---
| [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wdwu63OkEv9Pno7vmSuWOnWogxwGkZC7vllRmQE4QD7uq3u_TkTzHMaGm3dbTgwmQZCQB6P_DRISGb6gwjGuJ-QsyXyjPjLA7PZvIG6MwmbH7FRQbBIDfUkfvoKETqmaBNTxj7QxGH4bfsaaFnBjjGwMVCjmATZBZo-2WXoLUdQh88kZiySrfml0bQT1AKhnjKIs0lnc5b-0PtBFouvMyQ==&c=oRw3rBP3_1Lfp4dPzGasFkLIgkSi753urI2ZUQXU4IDCaFJDJU7Zog==&ch=s1On5cuLm3nqh85TRMuQVt7fHCRf9ulXVHGt_tYEkEbD65CsKYwFJA==)
---
It's no exaggeration to say that together we saved Pennsylvania--and perhaps the nation--from the clutches of MAGA for the foreseeable future.
But right now, we have to be honest. We're celebrating, but we're also hurting. We gave literally everything to this cause. And we made promises and signed contracts that we knew would put us in a bad situation, but we did it because the moment demanded no less than total commitment.
You stood with us to win this crucial court. You fought for democracy, justice, and fairness when America needed us. We worked together to deliver a big win and send a message to MAGA: hands off the courts.
Now that the dust has settled we really need your help. So that we can move on to defending the next courts that MAGA is targeting in MI, GA, and AZ, we need to retire our debt and pay what is owed to every member of our team who worked hard until the very last minute polls closed fighting for this incredible victory.
[Can you chip in even just a $5 donation or whatever you can spare right now to help Defend Our Courts get back on the right footing and prepare for the critical battles to come?](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wdwu63OkEv9Pno7vmSuWOnWogxwGkZC7vllRmQE4QD7uq3u_TkTzHMaGm3dbTgwmQZCQB6P_DRISGb6gwjGuJ-QsyXyjPjLA7PZvIG6MwmbH7FRQbBIDfUkfvoKETqmaBNTxj7QxGH4bfsaaFnBjjGwMVCjmATZBZo-2WXoLUdQh88kZiySrfml0bQT1AKhndo-q-xQwAZ1pm9qrG-nHwg==&c=oRw3rBP3_1Lfp4dPzGasFkLIgkSi753urI2ZUQXU4IDCaFJDJU7Zog==&ch=s1On5cuLm3nqh85TRMuQVt7fHCRf9ulXVHGt_tYEkEbD65CsKYwFJA==)

name: Walk the plank
subject: Lauren Boebert votes to TRIPLE health insurance costs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
This is exactly the kind of self-defeating Republican policies that could tip this election. We have to be ready to turn this into a wave that we can ride to victory.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001llD28GE4COC6XrStiRxdZCrzMnN0vAl4h2-_r9UB_G7Cd34Mi35xEW_CN0NXr7ecOGoHFBIekXcmwFNrlGfzRYP-osTlp3WeKr-jynC069a7g_iwGEL_eju3t3HRce3xPYFMlIbBkgmxyslC7q1IBd1xGQYwqkLB25eyokgVu-LEyZX2wriNkJl-4Bq1y69DPVfwvYRfaRmmUD9rGe6bL48TLjuW2I2c&c=ZAbI93sCa5XaS_7yip6iVgsItTu_ZTcNmxMwRW32xLiDwbNmLHPmxQ==&ch=MVNgGCDI0O_wfGu7N7Qu18P3VfaxQQKdiOWgTdIEL2GJjegIQpcEvg==)
---
|

Peter,
House Republicans just decided to send health insurance premiums for over 24 million Americans soaring as high as THREE TIMES as much as they are now starting in 2026.
Speaker Mike Johnson lost four GOP moderates as they defected to the Democrats' position: pass a clean 3-year extension of ACA subsidies to make sure Americans won't be forced to choose between food on the table or health insurance coverage.
But MAGA politicians like Lauren Boebert have done everything in their power to ensure that any extension of these subsidies will never pass the House--at least not in time to stop premiums from skyrocketing.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001llD28GE4COC6XrStiRxdZCrzMnN0vAl4h2-_r9UB_G7Cd34Mi35xEW_CN0NXr7ecOGoHFBIekXcmwFNrlGfzRYP-osTlp3WeKr-jynC069a7g_iwGEL_eju3t3HRce3xPYFMlIbBkgmxyslC7q1IBd1xGQYwqkLB25eyokgVu-LEyZX2wriNkJl-4Bq1y69DPVfwvYRfaRkbQBaVr3LD-j2PKb-Dg4DZ&c=ZAbI93sCa5XaS_7yip6iVgsItTu_ZTcNmxMwRW32xLiDwbNmLHPmxQ==&ch=MVNgGCDI0O_wfGu7N7Qu18P3VfaxQQKdiOWgTdIEL2GJjegIQpcEvg==)
---
This won't only affect Obamacare plans. Healthcare costs are set to rise for everyone. And insurance companies will see Congress' failure to regulate them as a blank check to raise premiums and lower reimbursements across the board.
That's why health insurance lobbyists and Big Pharma bankroll Boebert's political campaigns with hundreds of thousands of dollars in donations.
Boebert is only in Congress because of a 546 vote margin. In 2024, her Democratic opponent, Trisha Calvarese had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts as Boebert underperformed Trump in every single county.
Boebert fighting to increase health care costs and destroy working people's access to care is exactly the kind of action that could tip this election. We have to be ready to turn this into a wave that we can ride to victory.
[We are currently falling short of hitting our end of quarter fundraising goals, critical benchmarks that will show Boebert that she is going to lose this election. Can you help us get back on track with a donation of $5, $25, $50 or more?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001llD28GE4COC6XrStiRxdZCrzMnN0vAl4h2-_r9UB_G7Cd34Mi35xEW_CN0NXr7ecgtTO5ruOOGnPO-MPjRJWBDVkXv_rozf32NI6AR0WQBsBE_7xAic56-W1iRg9yzoHeU2Nqh8ZHdZwI-JQ1KRwBDrqpDZEOclVFMZZ-JLBj3W3v_zVgWYJJki15qQF0WjXdvdDESN3JuyouDXRNhYAN9pjEdKzilxsDE2xmLZObnM=&c=ZAbI93sCa5XaS_7yip6iVgsItTu_ZTcNmxMwRW32xLiDwbNmLHPmxQ==&ch=MVNgGCDI0O_wfGu7N7Qu18P3VfaxQQKdiOWgTdIEL2GJjegIQpcEvg==)

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1620, [the Mayflower anchored](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uhDAQxfHTmM4ID19O4SIN3aZNiQY8XjsxGNmzi7h9tFFukPonPT39P2_zDUMM-_0DNzLs0rzTWSIxU545P7ajHESrX6jwPTg-Mx5HmKGBXiqQSs8WQ7zmrrLGEQG1FRk1DkPT93ocKm8QV4390g8DrBbGxcGoNbauVdo6a8cqmNeaAqWVarq2r99QgevcuFir18Wi6BqygVOuv1LY2ZOLV3pSrte0VdF45qOI9l3AJGA6z7P2oXDK18sFTOxDkRYvGXb5JwImSyttC2WptIBpw8vFdFKWNq3fRSLLI15berCXHvOScpWNPc4QYyjDKLrmvmGIvw_4X9meBn4CAAD__9xchTY) in Plymouth Harbor, Massachusetts. While passengers prepared to establish Plymouth Colony, a small group of sailors went ashore to explore the area. In today’s edition, we feature a new poll showing that about [six in 10 Americans](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O5CAUhE9jZ7QA8-eAYJPOetMNLcx7tFlhg4Bpy7cfea4wYamkUn3fv9fycjHF4_3X7Wh7yMuBZ0vYO9al16-9tILotxVbf8fQz-pKiQunXBLGCTMLuJiuRYxgAyLHaUTLtFJUSqPVuNlJaodaTGwGCYZRPwtjJo9CBebDysZo7zXGmWGMikk-Zsd4EEGvAMav4AZBEWLP9fE_x6NvGNKVP1gfPu9jslvvpQ3Tn4E_B_505Qa4qzvUHn3CgT-3nCK4i9wMjXjXNlJySuTAk1zoKlm1cMqgEkyjMJJP4IEaNGDojLCqsVooZ0wpNqUHQd-7i-nnQf-Vto_l3wEAAP__q9KBPQ) say cash or gift cards are acceptable holiday gifts, especially among younger adults. Do you give gift cards? And how do you feel when you receive one? Reply to let us know. **Major Flyover Announcement!** We’ve completely reimagined _The Flyover Podcast_ —still delivering the same fact-based, unbiased coverage—but now in a faster, high-energy format with new features that make the news more engaging. If you are a podcast viewer, you are going to love it. If you haven't watched before, today is the day to do so! [Watch today's new episode here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuqzAYRp8GNhA2YDuDh6vbokpNqkxtmsUy-Hdwa8Cy_wTRp6_SPkKnb_ikc6TzdlAH7bybLy96Aol2UTOsyQMiRIXxOoUUAIaxh4QXZ3GNOgSnaEXbgtCCCGW085tqciMtAIU6B0k4Y1XbCs7yUWrRQltTQ1vBdSM0ET3TjLLKsoFwK3In7zRCiSCkauq23GlCbWN5b4wYeqOzpgLjcInlx-JmHMH6bblBLIdlyr0cEUPK6n8Z7TLaretabssVrz3c_4x2wevNu4RZ3f3Ow3H_-JreT_h89P-P56-nLp54sQ_nqD6ruSCG7_IoTVid9y4xnjXVZdLO__jwT5Fukn4HAAD__w_we-Y), and reply to let us know what you think! If you’ve ever wished you could invest in a breakout company _before_ it became a billion-dollar unicorn, today's sponsor, [EnergyX](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u3CAQhZ8Gd2vxZ2ALikhX2920KRE2Y3siwAjwbvbtI99EeYG053yaOfp-fLpPjxHz9t0nsH09XIZXi9A7VNfrmUorAMs-Q-sbrv1VfSnoOOXTjfEbMy54jG8nh2BXAA5iAMu0UnSajFbDbgO_GzCz5pRRrbhkoBaml8ClZlyqdUB7XWOcGcaoFNN494yvctVzCGaZgyeSQsB-1PHngbnvsMb38YQ6Lkcaot17L42Ib4Q_CH9gfkLrI2So2_vXhVy5eJw9uXacdQEiPiB5jISrK0wQ8ExEfBSP4VZ87Rlq27H87RefisctfxH_SmboTUzC_XFwZuzeCaEE00zeJzNUG8oLY8SmNJF0ux5-7e3_Jflp-e8AAAD__zZCkS0), may be the rare chance to get in while the upside is still on the table.

## Trump Defends Record in National Address
President Trump delivered a rare primetime address Wednesday, saying he "inherited a mess" from former President Biden and has made historic progress over 11 months. [Watch it here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFu6yAUxvGnwVssH8A2d2C4UpQuTdWto4V9DjEVjhGcGOXtq_QVun6f9Bv-X9fp6kIM99uH28iy36c71RKJmfLE-bGlkoiWdabCt-C5ZpdSmGQn-xPIE5gJXYjPSTdoPZEk1ZCFcRi6vjfj0KwWBg8GO41-ht4pg3IBJ2c1Ug84GN0E-9JAggHotOrbfw6k136cEc0yoxO6Iwy85_Z7D3deycfnflBul31rol2ZUxHqv5AXIS-11va5P_gx0-t_LY6XVajLIdT5nN6Pt-2TGEuTLaYaYgxlGIXubpsL8ZfkP3U4rPwJAAD__xC6cqA). The president used charts showing price decreases in gasoline, airfare, and hotel rates alongside real private-sector wage growth averaging $1,048 under his administration. [See the charts here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO3CAQhJ8Gd5zMGhunoEjj7k-b0sKw2BuBjWD_u9zbR75XSDPNSJ_mm99f65ejROf-y2W0HK_1xFdLyIx15fqdSyuI_tiw8U6RX9WVQiv0MEoFUs1rcJTeq-6CjYiAQ4dWmWnqx3E2U3fYHsyG07Rp77WfcZ4GM8II2gxuDlFBR_amKVCzUr0exscPpyDqaLYQZr8FJ3SPgfiqjz8XnXxgTO_rifXhr9wlezCXJoafAhYBy_kuV-O7ErDcYAGLgjuMgOW7ydtPwPJxk4wpNekyVvJOUpaR_tK5y40Cnk1mbE3SKf3hKstIKWGQpVJGpozShVCx3bSu2lBelBK1yQjd79lR-uzj_zr1aeFfAAAA__8dOoyT). Additionally, Trump announced [$1,776 "warrior dividend](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u3CAURleDO48A8-MUFGncvbQpLQzX5iZgLLhvRrP7yLOF1J90Pp3z-2v98pjxPH75Ao72up7w6hmIoK3UvsvVL4CQNuh04E6v5q8LV8mlHoUcxbxGj_m9qiG6HUDCNIAT1hiu9WzNkJwIIMBqblX0QQhuBUQzGx6s2fzO1YDupgkpZiG4mvTjhxdyV7vdYpzDFj1THCJSbY8_FU9KsOd3fUJ7hFqG7BLR1dn0k8mFyYUSJMz53phcUi1wCzG5-FjwxE7NE9aTyUUbrSajx4_leDUsQFhg9DE26H1M9bvjeYwhQfh7E4bm4vXCnLEbyxQ_isfP0UD_Ve7p5L8AAAD__0zQhMM)" checks for 1.45 million military service members, funded by tariff revenue. He previewed 2026 initiatives, including the TrumpRX website for discounted medicines, and teased naming a Federal Reserve chairman "who believes in lower interest rates by a lot."
## US Announces Venezuela Oil Blockade
President Trump [announced a blockade](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3O3CAURJ8Gd6zMj423oIgUWUrxpU1pXcPFJsFgwd1dbZ4-8r5C6tEczZlfX8sXxBTz9hMOtBTKkvHVEhJhXag-jrOdiG5fsdEWA70qnGdcZC8HLiQX0-IhpveiO28DokTVoRVmHPthmMzY7Xa6e6OVChOsgDhoI00wyt1DGEelRd9Fe9GEFJMQvVbD7Q5CBh3M6v3kVg9M9-gjlXr7XWKmHUN6lyfWmytHl-xOdDamvjE5MznD6i6D21aumMn5RyasGSiWDInJ-SPFIefyyA4bp0KQuCvHmZCQr6m4P-CRN8juKqHnT8z494EJMi_xYjQq9c3UHD1T34WctOmHUXTV-vMVU4ptNEz32wExfUbSfz37tPJfAAAA__8DCJAr) of all sanctioned oil tankers entering or leaving Venezuela after saying he's designating its government as a "foreign terrorist organization"--a move that would make it illegal for Americans to provide support to the regime. The U.S. currently has 11 warships in the Caribbean--the most in decades--though experts say that's not enough for a traditional military blockade, which would effectively be a declaration of war. Venezuela, which has the world's [largest proven oil reserves](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L3unDAQBPCnMR3IXsBwhYs0dJc2JfLH-tjIYMvsHbq3j8gr_JtpRvqNNH-e69NSouP12-5oOOb1wOtMyIx15frey1kQ_ebw5BdFvqothVaQMLYKWjWvwVL6rkMTTEQE7Bs0atJajuM86WYz0Ot5CDbIWUkH4IOdMGo99g6kd4--IXNrCtSslBz6sXtYBXGIkwth9i5YMUgMxLl2fzMdvGFM3_zB2vm8N8lszOUU_S8Bi4Dluq7OH87fpYDlpgUsCu6YBCy-vgO2mVJbKnk8W87BfruN99RUE8pFKdGpJzHI124p_R_hHz3zMfAvAAD__zeKdwc), called Trump's move a "reckless and serious threat" that violates international law. Oil prices rose slightly on Wednesday after falling to near four-year lows earlier in the week.
## Map: Homeownership Rate by State
A new analysis of U.S. Census data found that West Virginia has the [nation’s highest homeownership](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAUAL8Gb1iAsU0Hhi7e0rWjhc0jfhU2CF6C8vdV-gvdT3fSfd_Wm8OI1_3LnWAppPWCViMQQVmpPM5cM8B-bFDpjoFacTnjqoQauVRcmtU7jK9Vd94GAAVDB1bO0yTG0cxTd1gzKTGaHcQevJ6FG8AYMNrIyQCAHju0b5tU0kgp9DD2H06qoMO8eW_2zTumBXikVPqfhBcdEOIrPaH0ezq7aA-iXNnwydTC1NJa659YHy7uLiO5iJXeIFPLg1d-pBNSu6DUAzMvjqDy7cUrOQKmlq5YnxvGiHWamRb302H869C_5jyt-g0AAP__XnB7XQ) rate at about 76%, while Washington, D.C., ranks last at roughly 41%. Homeownership is strongest across Appalachia and much of the Midwest, where lower prices and steadier markets make buying more attainable. Coastal states like New York and California post some of the lowest rates, driven by high home values and tight housing supply. Nationally, about two-thirds of U.S. households own their homes, but younger Americans remain far less likely to buy than baby boomers were at the same age. The president used charts showing price decreases in gasoline, airfare, and hotel rates alongside real private-sector wage growth averaging $1,048 under his administration. . Additionally, Trump announced " checks for 1.45 million military service members, funded by tariff revenue. He previewed 2026 initiatives, including the TrumpRX website for discounted medicines, and teased naming a Federal Reserve chairman "who believes in lower interest rates by a lot." US Announces Venezuela Oil Blockade President Trump of all sanctioned oil tankers entering or leaving Venezuela after saying he's designating its government as a "foreign terrorist organization"--a move that would make it illegal for Americans to provide support to the regime. The U.S. currently has 11 warships in the Caribbean--the most in decades--though experts say that's not enough for a traditional military blockade, which would effectively be a declaration of war. Venezuela, which has the world's , called Trump's move a "reckless and serious threat" that violates international law. Oil prices rose slightly on Wednesday after falling to near four-year lows earlier in the week. Map: Homeownership Rate by State A new analysis of U.S. Census data found that West Virginia has the rate at about 76%, while Washington, D.C., ranks last at roughly 41%. Homeownership is strongest across Appalachia and much of the Midwest, where lower prices and steadier markets make buying more attainable. Coastal states like New York and California post some of the lowest rates, driven by high home values and tight housing supply. Nationally, about two-thirds of U.S. households own their homes, but younger Americans remain far less likely to buy than baby boomers were at the same age. . subject: Lauren Boebert votes to TRIPLE health insurance costs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
This is exactly the kind of self-defeating Republican policies that could tip this election. We have to be ready to turn this into a wave that we can ride to victory.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GF01PutGPaZetM8ZgzFEnWum-6dTLt6f5xBp6O6D01eQvPnJHlk58TVyHdQmL7OGori3SU-UW47YIcc5lPBtQOR6lz69Qys2P9NElbqVvkzObNWmEiWdrmNlu2p2toLgByydUxI2nKlRRt-vuCYcxrCAtEKUHY2W2RML3kbUD7TwlqL8lcDQ9DgVqybW-Z7IWDHvtBdy_H7vVgLYhxGYI34KBDnK9DHe&c=yxP-qldq3VAr15PhabX5tOUbPxiuTZahkinolP6ItQtPXAXSxOOy5w==&ch=D-Z7Xp8bK6d0DLLuwpp00F_HFxnSVIOVKwMcfjLBHlawq3TCwkoDNA==)
---
|

Peter,
House Republicans just decided to send health insurance premiums for over 24 million Americans soaring as high as THREE TIMES as much as they are now starting in 2026.
Speaker Mike Johnson lost four GOP moderates as they defected to the Democrats' position: pass a clean 3-year extension of ACA subsidies to make sure Americans won't be forced to choose between food on the table or health insurance coverage.
But MAGA politicians like Lauren Boebert have done everything in their power to ensure that any extension of these subsidies will never pass the House--at least not in time to stop premiums from skyrocketing.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GF01PutGPaZetM8ZgzFEnWum-6dTLt6f5xBp6O6D01eQvPnJHlk58TVyHdQmL7OGori3SU-UW47YIcc5lPBtQOR6lz69Qys2P9NElbqVvkzObNWmEiWdrmNlu2p2toLgByydUxI2nKlRRt-vuCYcxrCAtEKUHY2W2RML3kbUD7TwlqL8lcDQ9DgVqybW-Z7IWDHvtBdy_H6mykSsY3SvRCwc_K4zT4n3&c=yxP-qldq3VAr15PhabX5tOUbPxiuTZahkinolP6ItQtPXAXSxOOy5w==&ch=D-Z7Xp8bK6d0DLLuwpp00F_HFxnSVIOVKwMcfjLBHlawq3TCwkoDNA==)
---
This won't only affect Obamacare plans. Healthcare costs are set to rise for everyone. And insurance companies will see Congress' failure to regulate them as a blank check to raise premiums and lower reimbursements across the board.
That's why health insurance lobbyists and Big Pharma bankroll Boebert's political campaigns with hundreds of thousands of dollars in donations.
Boebert is only in Congress because of a 546 vote margin. In 2024, her Democratic opponent, Trisha Calvarese had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts as Boebert underperformed Trump in every single county.
Boebert fighting to increase health care costs and destroy working people's access to care is exactly the kind of action that could tip this election. We have to be ready to turn this into a wave that we can ride to victory.
[We are currently falling short of hitting our end of quarter fundraising goals, critical benchmarks that will show Boebert that she is going to lose this election. Can you help us get back on track with a donation of $5, $25, $50 or more?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GF01PutGPaZetM8ZgzFEnWum-6dTLt6f5xBp6O6D01eQvPnJHlk58TVyHdQmL7OGlEKf92TOYcUJfb35NpFGtmlhryGFiJIlgMakq2kxzyKPgOhQ3WBAEWYKdcb46RCYSpIKLh2ciLqAS-lB8FqDcEx7rkhgGrhbgIOBuvhElTs9U9j47KF7onl5r_Ja9Y0iv6mpPCfy_EwiFY8bMjQphTXhXl-PurrvIhosfX6Xj28=&c=yxP-qldq3VAr15PhabX5tOUbPxiuTZahkinolP6ItQtPXAXSxOOy5w==&ch=D-Z7Xp8bK6d0DLLuwpp00F_HFxnSVIOVKwMcfjLBHlawq3TCwkoDNA==)

subject: Why Eye Drops Fail (But This Works)
body:
---
| | | | | |
---

---
| | | **Dry Eyes? The Problem Isn’t on the Surface**
If you’re constantly reaching for eye drops, you’re not alone—but you might be treating the _wrong problem_.
Most Americans are told to “just use drops,” yet chronic dry eye often begins inside the body—rooted in inflammation and a lack of critical omega-3s. That’s why drops offer a few minutes of comfort... and then the burning, itching, and irritation return.
What actually makes a difference? Not generic fish oil—your body can’t absorb enough of it. The key is **high-absorption omega-3s paired with the antioxidant astaxanthin** , shown to support natural tear production, calm irritation, and protect delicate eye tissue.
It’s no wonder thousands of Americans are finally finding real, lasting relief—without living bottle-to-bottle on eye drops.
If you’re tired of temporary fixes, this short report explains the truth behind dry eye—and the solution that’s helping so many people:
[👉](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1213843/VaHR0cHM6Ly9mYi5uYXRpdmVwYXRoLmNvbS9yZC9yLnBocA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTg/LbmNsRFpRU3I4YQ/qP3NpZD0xNzE0JnB1Yj0yNDA1NzMmYzE9MjAyNTEyMTctQUZXUi0wJmMyPUFJREUmYzM9QUZXUg/gaUPkHw/s3o6ae3a236) **[5 Reasons Drops Won’t Work (and What Actually Does)](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1213843/VaHR0cHM6Ly9mYi5uYXRpdmVwYXRoLmNvbS9yZC9yLnBocA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTg/LbmNsRFpRU3I4YQ/qP3NpZD0xNzE0JnB1Yj0yNDA1NzMmYzE9MjAyNTEyMTctQUZXUi0wJmMyPUFJREUmYzM9QUZXUg/gaUPkHw/s3o6ae3a236)**

Most Americans are told to “just use drops,” yet chronic dry eye often begins inside the body—rooted in inflammation and a lack of critical omega-3s. That’s why drops offer a few minutes of comfort... and then the burning, itching, and irritation return. What actually makes a difference? Not generic fish oil—your body can’t absorb enough of it. The key is high-absorption omega-3s paired with the antioxidant astaxanthin , shown to support natural tear production, calm irritation, and protect delicate eye tissue. It’s no wonder thousands of Americans are finally finding real, lasting relief—without living bottle-to-bottle on eye drops. If you’re tired of temporary fixes, this short report explains the truth behind dry eye—and the solution that’s helping so many people:

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1860, Texas Rangers under the command of Lawrence Sullivan Ross attacked a Comanche hunting camp at Mule Creek, capturing three people. One of them was determined to be [Cynthia Ann Parker](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0EGOrCAQgOHT4E4DJSK9YPE27vptZ2lKLaUiDR0gbfftJzNXmAv8f_J93ec7cuB4_McHufre0xzpKoFqpTzjcTBdHEv19Eq80snryfFYZ5AwtApaZecNOXxm3WxukdtNNeTUaIwcbmBV453eUa9jTzjSru1iYZAIElW_G7CLUQ27n5gCZRVIpcZOL1abflzI9DAMJIWWtHFNuaueKr2x7OGTXpS7NT2a4HytzyL6fwImAdN1XV0tHlMMHKlL-RAweYzbktIpYKJYM1MRMD0xn5Tb9ROrZ2wxxia77XlxCFzMKLQ8Hsjh91L_ZvNy8B0AAP__86d5iA), who was kidnapped by the tribe as a child nearly 25 years prior. ## Man Boards School Bus to Kidnap Ex-Girlfriend
A 20-year-old man was arrested after he allegedly [boarded a Spring ISD school bus](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL_OozAQxJ8Guo3wQvhTUKShOOm75oorkWNvyOozNvIu4cvbn8grXDejkX6amb9f85flwHH5bVca9eeR5kiHBFKlPNtlYTo4ij7pldjRN7tvjoubscIrGATTz95yeM9N6cd75QdT0mi6tq2uA_amfI6DaXpfD_gg1zZ919a1McZ3A1bY9INzJY8nzKDpDVbGdJfm3jdt3d2prfF6papoKvKsKV_0SUo_Vh7hnV6ULy6tZRifqpsU9a3AqcDpOI7LKvHMCpwowi4FTueoAqePXm0E69wu5CE9YEscleMCyx4hRZAtn47Fw30XsDmTKHnwLJrZKeybgJDbM-sbVrKyZzq5NsPtZv7oL4tlHv12cAgsbVc01bJaDp-6-n8nv0b8FwAA___Oi5Jm) with a gun and tried to kidnap his ex-girlfriend on Monday. According to court documents, the student boarded the bus while being followed by her ex-boyfriend, David Madison, in an SUV. Madison [forced the bus to stop](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD3O2zAQRE9DdWuQq18XKtKo-9KmFChyJS1Mkwa5suzbB8oV0kw1mMF7f37mH8uB4_bbPmmUz5rmSGcJJEJ5ttvGdHIsstM7saMHuwfHzc2osQWDYIbZWw7fuan8uGh_NxWNpu863d5xMNU-LkZr1zX1QPdWG792vqu9QW96a4baLhWP15hBMxjUxvS3Zhmaru4X6mpsW9Kq0eRZUr7JTkIfW9bwTW_KN5eeVRh3kVdR9S-Fk8LpPM-bC-weuKejSIpXS-F0YSmcQnI2KJyuT4WTwSs6hROHABsJfNMBwQpleNoIS7LZk4fyyhw34OJhOQqcLDtsRwTJTB4kwesIAYocnqJAWldw6cgCmVzKvkCxX4VTlUf_OjkELl2vGr09LYd_FPJ_7t8j_g0AAP__sAWZkg), pointed a rifle at the driver, and boarded the bus, grabbing the student by the arm before eventually letting her go and telling her, "_I’ll get you later_." Twenty-four other students were on the bus at the time of the incident. Madison was captured by the U.S. Marshals after fleeing the scene, and he is being held on bonds [totaling $6.9 million](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAURb9GOww8EbWg2MZutt3SgDz1ZRCM4Djz9xv3F7a6zc29OefnMT4MeQrLt9lQ5_ccx4BX8pgzHqNZFsKLQsorviJN-KTpSWGZRuDQMAFMdKMz5D-jLJ223PWiRC1apXjTQyfKVfdW9s52Vk2zFJLXLRjjWuN4O4Pg6ErS95gA0QngQrSVtJ1UdWtR1dA0yAvJ0VGOR5VXzPg2afaf-MKjmuJWer3mvKei_ipgKGC4rqua4xvUGs-UY7hLBQw3VQFDOtOOU2Y2BscSZqZYvzEzZzyYjeZwFBaW9uMOSo7ZM7HlDOWh3X6R95RUW0i-bIb8333-n7SXht8AAAD__2wRgpU). "_I knew I was gonna die_ ," [said the student](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u4yAURleDOyK4_JgUFNO4e9NOaWG42FchxjIkfm_3o8wWpv6kT-ecP1_zV6BC-_o7PNH371znHa9WsHc857CuhBftrW_4rhTxQfFB-xpnEGC4BC7dnAKVn1kPyS8i3eWAXo7WCnMHJ4fNa2ET5GRUuKtslkWisC6kFKVKmBMO5D9nEqSTIKQcb3px2qpxQavAGBRMC0zU63nrG3b8Di2Xn_rG8xbrcyh-6_1oTP1iMDGYruu6Pbb6-owMpnB2igUZTB8vBlOpMRQGUztO2ldOLfEWt1oLX16Nr6_9qLR3BhM4w6URKqXkeNZZcG2V4M5kye9CBQMhjNLgcPp0XFQKNTsyLdZnoPIPrf9f0LeHvwEAAP__mrSIMA). "_I knew he was going to try to do something_."
## Texas A&M's Aiden Ross Wins _The Voice_
Texas A&M sophomore Aiden Ross [won season 28](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OnTAQRp_GdIPs4cdQuLgN3UaKUiQdMngWRmvsK9uBvW8fcV8h3UhHOprv_P6YPyx7DtsPe5Ap359xDnRlT6VQmu22MV0cctnpjLzSF69fHLZ1RokdKAQ1zM6yf81t5cwi3agqMkr3vexGHFS1m1U3q9TjojWOC1l02jUah2boOuewsRWbW6ZQDQqlUrpul6HtG71Q32DXkRStJMclprrsVOjb5k__iieleo1H5c1eyjOL5iFwEjhd11UfOdxM4EQB_maBUzkFTvey-74VYOGAHJ97PGIisOwoQIr5Bmv0njaCXGzhGCDYwifBHQLKTvBOAZlsjgFwEDjZBI-H-nWlPz-rZNzzYu8591q0cjss-_en5f_6ngb_BQAA__9vwZBt) of NBC's _The Voice_ on Tuesday, singing renditions of [JVKE's](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LuK6zAQxvGnkbsYaeRroeLAIV22WBbCVkaXsT1EsYI9sZK3X7yvsO33wa_4Xy_DxVKkZfqwdzT8GtOwYN4iMuM62GkizLRsPOOeyOON_I2WyQ8goT4pOKluCJbie6iKYJwMvSrQqLZpZN1Dp4rZBNe7WlcOUDvfIlrZ6LEdZdeDC1bagsyBKVCdAqlUW1auqxrdOmw01DVKUUkMxGkteUbGl93G-E47rqVP9yKamfmxCf1PwFnAOedcvtOTnw6P_1gs-1no8y70__Cpx_V6u6av72I14ZEpRtqaVlRyuluKvyT_LcRu4CcAAP__XLlyTQ) “golden hour” and [ABBA's](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uszAUxvGrMVuQj7H5GDy8b6sMldK13ZCxD3AUB0dwgpO7r-gtdH0e6Tf8vy79xVGkZfp0N7T8HFO_YN4iMuPau2kizLRsPOOeyOOV_JWWyfdKKnMCdYK2D47iq9dFsIMMHRRooalraTrVQjHbcXBNVbeAAxqjutBI1MF3AbTXLZhQkD0wUNCCkgBNqYdW11UzYF0pY1AKLTEQp7XkGRmfbhvjK-24lj7dimhn5vsmqn9CnYU655zLV3rwY8DjPxbHfhbVeRfV-5g_vu__VXgL12K14Z4pRtrqRmg53RzFX5L_FmK36icAAP__495xsg) "The Winner Takes It All." The 20-year-old student [grew up](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uqzAQhJ_GdEbexT-kcHEbutz2lMjgDazi4AhbIXn7I_IKp5lmpG_0zc91vAZOvC3_w4N8fd_yuNFREtVK-xiWhengrdSVXplnuvN8522ZR1RoJKCEfoyB02fUTfSTihdoyIOzVpkL9tCs3sw3RdARYu8mZ8CEaI2OHRk7xQvphv0JA4QeUAG4Vk-9tp2byHZoDCmhFUWueW_rSpXeodzSJ79ob-f8aJJfa30W0f0TOAgcjuNo71N9n6XA4WQLHADPcAKHlOeQZOFtoV0GjrTJPZciT035lRQ4NLuPz4NT4mKd0Gp5BE7fufq3k14efwMAAP__mkh5pg) on his family's strawberry farm near College Station and is studying industrial engineering. During the season premiere in September, Ross got a "chair turn" from [all four judges](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGupDAQRE8DWY_sxoAJHGxC9jfdEBnT4NY3eIR7hz-3XzFX2PipSlXvz9f05Tnxsf32Ozn5WfN00FUSidA5-W1juvgoEumVOdA3h28-tjChwhY0grbT4jm9J1MvblbLoGtyuu861Q5odR3d0Nq-CYM11gbCGb3pVkXKGmr6RjdUs7vLNGqrUWndP8xsTdf0M3UNti2pyihaWPL5kEhCP76s6Z1fdD5C3uvkosizVM2vCscKR4k0e5GbVTgmXgn8KeUmdxT8DiU_Y97zSeB5oQPOXApc-SoQsg-RCuQDJBJ8PkMhX_IBaGGh-a9UONanW54Xp8Sl6yujtt1z-qyR_3P4cvgvAAD__1G3hv0) when he performed Adele's "Love in the Dark." Ross chose former One Direction singer Niall Horan [as his coach](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOwyAQRL_G7tYCAsYpKK5Jl2uvtBazsVchEBkUkr8_JfcJV45mNJp5P-f5jBw5rd94I1eflzwnaiVSrbTPuK5MjVOpGz0yL3Tl5cppXWYllAGpQE5zQI6vWffBeRGOsicn7TgKc1ST7DdHcgpaLN6bUSNp8gGttagMmtFYHXp27zKp5CSVkNIO2k96PFhP40EZQ6LTggLXvA91o0pPLJf4yg_ahyXf-ui2Wu-lO3x16tSpU2ttSH55e506Jb8Ap8KB9rdijBG2vGOCnKBuBCWntUDdsEKkAMiBEuy5FKgZGv-FPt-hEJacQE397sK9cYxcRttpsd6Q42dM_R_Ch1O_AQAA__-ZcodY), saying he "writes and makes music that is most similar to the type of artist that I aspire to be." He said he plans to finish his degree but is open-minded about his future career path. "_If something in music pops up that is a viable opportunity, I will jump at it_ ," [said Ross](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGuqzAQRVcDnSN7bAwuXPwmXX77SjTAAKM4NrKtkOz-KdnCq690z9H5uY035MBx-48P8vW1pjHSWQLVSnnEbWM6OZa60zPxTHee7xy3eQQJnVAg1DAuyOE9mnbxk1ycasmr3lrZORhUu3tDk3G6c5OeYbbOaI0Ore414WpRry37z5kCNSiQSvUXMw3G6n4iq6HrSDZG0sI15UvdqdILyxre6Un5MqdHG_xe61Ea_a-BawPXg9IR6DM1cD33JLiIupP4-otCWFIUMIiTY6QskBeKIqdShFJDL52DNvvlODkELrZvjNweyOHLqn8r9PTwGwAA__8EgnnQ). "_If there’s a spark, I’m gonna fan that flame_."
## Stranded Dolphin Rescued
A young bottlenose dolphin [trapped by a sandbar](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHSpCAQhJ8GMy1mRNCA4BKyvfRCC2FWqWXFAm7dffsr9x7hTyaZ6v66-89tvtkQw77-tk_S9X1P805niVQr5dmua6Az7KVu9ErB0SO4R9hXNyPHoQVsYZy9DfEzi8brhfsJGtKgpOTDhCM0m3ayB0fe98JKNdFopRWIzi33CTzA0AR9mQHCCMgBVCeWUcheLSR7HAbiTHDyoabc1Y0qvW25x096Ue5cejZRb7UehfW_GBqG5jzPztkY_78ZmlJT_jA0Vy-GJiZnI0NzQRkawOsohiYn9zhSru0X0Zaa7e7Jtz7FYwt7m6m4v-QZmlGpSUwCOb90Tdb-OEOMoUjFBF-fNsRvtPqzQV8a_wUAAP__zXCH4w) in shallow waters near Aransas Bay was rescued by a team of volunteers on Saturday. The dolphin was stranded in a 20-acre body of water no more than four feet deep for more than a week. After examining tide forecasts, experts determined the dolphin would not be able to return to Aransas Bay on its own. "_Time was of the essence to ensure the animal's health and survival_ ," [said Heidi Whitehead](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMGOmzAURb8GdhPZL7ZxFl6kM40qpalauki7QsZ-wFMMZsDBk359lf5CV3dzdXR0rpfmYinQ1H-zI5r00cVmwrwGTAmXxvY9YaZpTQNukRzeyN1o6l0DDOQLhxeuG28pPBpRetMyf-AlGl4pxeQBNC8HA0o6zm2n0DJtpfMHoS06Bwio9tKXZJ4wDlxzYJxXO9FqofZVi2oPUiIrBENPKS67NGDCD7t24RE3XHYujmUwQ0rzWuyPBZwKOOWcd5112MZ4ex4KOB3r85WCD9RhjYNtCzjNcU3rc7uWPIP823_Zzvj69uP4du3GKbmvesL7NuM7__w6e117-eenSNU9PT69k0hVfT8eMvzy3-1lO4tQLsbPmUKgVVWFYP1oKfzzS_9XdTPwNwAA__9tSY0P) of the Texas Marine Mammal Stranding Network (TMMSN). Volunteers from TMMSN, NOAA Fisheries, SeaWorld of Texas, and the Amos Rehabilitation Keep corralled the dolphin, conducted a thorough veterinary examination, and relocated it using a specialized floating platform. "_This successful rescue shows what’s possible when organizations and communities come together for marine wildlife_ ," [Whitehead said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ8GOpB3sQ0ULv4mXf72SmTsDV7Fwcj4QvL2J6J7g-s-zUjfSPN1na6WI6_Lf_sgU163NK107JFKoTzZZWE6eN1LoGdiR3d2d14XN6FA1QA2MEzecnxPsvZmFn6Emgz0Wgs14gB1MBI7IYX2YuxBDVqNVs4jDuOsBIDuoGZzygBhABQAfSvnQequn0l3qBSJSgryXFJuS6BCL7vf4js9KbcuPepoQinbXnX_KrxUeDmOo3Uhp_VsK7xEvtEZc_S_aHNhF0_Kyd23lEvzsTY-xS3w2mTa3Tc1CCjVMHbtFrY6G78dHCPvuq-kWB6W42e__O21p8GfAAAA__92on_q).

According to court documents, the student boarded the bus while being followed by her ex-boyfriend, David Madison, in an SUV. Madison , pointed a rifle at the driver, and boarded the bus, grabbing the student by the arm before eventually letting her go and telling her, "I’ll get you later." Twenty-four other students were on the bus at the time of the incident. Madison was captured by the U.S. Marshals after fleeing the scene, and he is being held on bonds . "I knew I was gonna die ," . "I knew he was going to try to do something." Texas A&M's Aiden Ross Wins The Voice Texas A&M sophomore Aiden Ross of NBC's The Voice on Tuesday, singing renditions of “golden hour” and "The Winner Takes It All." The 20-year-old student on his family's strawberry farm near College Station and is studying industrial engineering. During the season premiere in September, Ross got a "chair turn" from when he performed Adele's "Love in the Dark." Ross chose former One Direction singer Niall Horan , saying he "writes and makes music that is most similar to the type of artist that I aspire to be." He said he plans to finish his degree but is open-minded about his future career path. "If something in music pops up that is a viable opportunity, I will jump at it ," . "If there’s a spark, I’m gonna fan that flame." Stranded Dolphin Rescued A young bottlenose dolphin in shallow waters near Aransas Bay was rescued by a team of volunteers on Saturday. The dolphin was stranded in a 20-acre body of water no more than four feet deep for more than a week. After examining tide forecasts, experts determined the dolphin would not be able to return to Aransas Bay on its own. "Time was of the essence to ensure the animal's health and survival ," of the Texas Marine Mammal Stranding Network (TMMSN). Volunteers from TMMSN, NOAA Fisheries, SeaWorld of Texas, and the Amos Rehabilitation Keep corralled the dolphin, conducted a thorough veterinary examination, and relocated it using a specialized floating platform. name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Dear Venezuela: We're sorry our president is a moron
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Dear Venezuela: We're sorry our president is a moron](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7237dc1b-d969-4fee-8606-09bfa28ce95a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4041efd8-647e-4fee-bbbf-0377afad066a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | [**Dear Venezuela: We’re sorry our president is a moron.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc2034765-8e3a-4138-a107-462975baac58/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _The people of America have zero desire to go to war with you, and we have no idea why our president (who is a moron) is pushing so hard for one._ _We know you’ve got some as well, and we wish you luck sorting out your own affairs (and we’ll need luck ourselves)._ _But neither one of our countries needs a war, and we will do our best to keep our moron president from launching one._ _**Sincerely, the people of America**_ ([add a comment on the page if you want to show your support](https://default.salsalabs.org/T36e97ec8-7121-40c7-b880-7d7ea429f7f7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T59947333-0762-4585-9a63-42a0e0efc07b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Note, this letter is posted on our new Substack page, which we are using for some new functionalities (not a big deal, its just a different back-end, so will look a bit different). While you're there, you can [check out other actions](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5233c376-52b6-4696-a2cf-670ab82ce605/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), try our new ["caption this picture" contest](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taf9a9417-8c70-42eb-b080-d8939a56fca0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), or see what it would look like if [Donald Trump sat on a porcupine](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9c09db10-566b-4f28-9ef0-2d473e1870d1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). Finally, Substack has a paid subscription option built in, and if you want to do that to [help us cover expenses](https://default.salsalabs.org/T772766a7-7dd0-4488-aeb2-1584c90c78a4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), great. But this is 100% optional (and we thank you for your support and activism either way) Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---
| | | | | **Other things you can do:**
* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3013978d-234d-4bcd-b0f5-a6bbf34a4430/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T349833b2-4b24-45d7-b01c-b99e0a3ce47a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T92a6f005-8ecb-4569-896c-897196eab109/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
Follow Us | [](https://Facebook.com/LeftAction)
---
| LeftAction
Washington, District of Columbia
info@leftaction.com

|

Peter,
While her fellow Republicans in Congress dressed up as jedis, Taylor Swift, and zombies, Lauren Boebert could not help but go the racist route for her Halloween costume.
She donned a sombrero and wore a vile sign, meant to be read in a crude Mexican accent that stated, "Mexican word of the day: Juicy. Tell me if juicy ICE coming."
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VKzsZtxxNOc_gK1Oc_wo7Gibpf2qyGynMxF_QxtAlxPO5JZDrexhnm_jfaMu9Cde1CXZ4W-clFjS5bZOC7hSk3GS4jifZXD0GHUKzKTlBAfOaeKBjZI-q-urXEaDf5GqYTykm9_LDj6wc04JcNyOFzshZG_7lcWjogUWS9QicMogDCzs5Mx91W9UDHXATgBo7ZXg5TChLF9JYh2alC-mj02aODY6kataqOxv12VG7v_Apw2FnsNPDA==&c=C1DY8Cdyr1K56Tf-YWXKDS6iwV7BThUqIO-xPCCdODPYnL3adYu0Aw==&ch=35bT1xrNfqIJJ99x2JnAcNvNQynw60G4LESrnBiIltfZYuspjwLPDg==)
---
2025 has been ICE's deadliest year in two decades. Migrants are being tortured, deprived of food and water, and disappeared. Boebert can't help but mock them.
Boebert and her costume embodies the rot that has festered within the Republican party and threatens to turn our nation into a totalitarian hell. They are devoid of empathy, compassion, and any decency toward their fellow man.
Boebert is in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024 when she went head to head with her Democratic opponent, labor leader Trisha Calvarese, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district overperforming VP Harris by six points while Boebert lagged behind Trump in every county. Now Trisha is back to finish the job in 2026.
These violent delights have violent ends. Tell me if juicy ICE coming." | == 2025 has been ICE's deadliest year in two decades. Migrants are being tortured, deprived of food and water, and disappeared. Boebert can't help but mock them. Boebert and her costume embodies the rot that has festered within the Republican party and threatens to turn our nation into a totalitarian hell. They are devoid of empathy, compassion, and any decency toward their fellow man. Boebert is in Congress because of 546 votes.
