| Fellow Patriot,
---
| Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...
---
| [ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bbe8778620b543d086e1c14de08e9e8b&_e=fXrWXeLnFNM4z9PKwGjjgLI0GlDCYoM9RttqzYCUQm-N-a85ieFaPqCPQVnqtET8v9rA70yVdev1Zad6Ce8mhRNFNGZcXhcRWLF-gWjxgrgb33fVScRIqWSz9qrzu58YVyVs6ZaqlT40HQ6F091B5XdbvLRLDoeTGS9dN0dk8AcnF-3HrhN5D912MJ-f_QTw7jLnNHbPiTfG5zPBuJhHb1egMbc2CZMs0H-Ylo8qJQWmuDVUCcYdvN_tGN9-qi0X3nfWP6o_6Lda-b5jnRrHXb0Ur6nmKWFqsF4UQETZnLmeoRHANoEhZJqI8plbb8yIgInnxVVFzeCJ4l4X4EEe7fcCkTj_JU_SwRf7Ttfru5BHVBh2TvB7jsuefQNdoIA74KkrXR15Ow12cTqwp_rJD16XJfJphdchq6TclHY2UXVARCbVME0hD588_yU2a0a_jn5sCvmuYHDRJXIn5L2G00TG6fnynzIvT2Ra50oXl6QCtlHvqFQ4_EyAaRZH0-MvD7MnSte1UciTsOgUc4jnmzXDCxf-l1oBrXmVNAA2y9HVb5bQpJEcGvLmQ-cKEFVwgrHeDqqLblJtppTvbVPP5yO-8AtNBBhem41hy-gSexR52BX3Prciz4tchdW-gHiyKEj4U8IvU7wT2DJUBebTqDL2ni6MeOhj3WXN3X8DMEzlW2MentpIg_nYJz7ontQV)

A book not about politics... but about peace.

**It 's called: _Stop, in the Name of God._**

| Fellow Patriot, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book.

It's not a culture war manifesto.

It's a call to stop.

To rest. To breathe. To return to God.

**Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. **

Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away.

Trust that God is in control.

Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship.

**In _Stop, in the Name of God,_ you'll discover: **

🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout

🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer

🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again.

That's the heartbeat of his final message.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bbe8778620b543d086e1c14de08e9e8b&_e=fXrWXeLnFNM4z9PKwGjjgLI0GlDCYoM9RttqzYCUQm-N-a85ieFaPqCPQVnqtET8v9rA70yVdev1Zad6Ce8mhRNFNGZcXhcRWLF-gWjxgrgb33fVScRIqWSz9qrzu58YVyVs6ZaqlT40HQ6F091B5XdbvLRLDoeTGS9dN0dk8AcnF-3HrhN5D912MJ-f_QTw7jLnNHbPiTfG5zPBuJhHb1egMbc2CZMs0H-Ylo8qJQWIJwR6d3IUzdQCnG1wwfDqOEEXwj9ZUFVOPCuROdqkXNklyp2G2TQuZVcndMhELT9aETy-F2uNMcXZCKEQqJumr75R3aymw-lBCTeCDPO0mKeIzBdi0naBheGi17UdSOBlVoPwfan8gRXGthcRAu444Os5QGnpFyph_sqlCiv93pmQgB2JnrBgUe5mJupoKl2H6nZjsKK-obI3B5OMjcOWwXEJH-md5sV8W5iI-7rs3saHTBrAxAYhk7H7wFwb9Njuxe-pHilVUakhioUvLcvE-iKwnA6xaYAJGBDECsIGk70Is3PLPKMuFtp7G047tE0I0U_gRAPZbN5zidufKI1bJ2rPu-MRi8QSYbwkxl7kzhbSOI87_acNY2k7gb1EtrhJUheDfE1pTCcZKdCx_wyI8LzmMal93wKZwVwCCxM76_UmnTeUaTy_GYydGdS5CAPNTlAtNDsuXd5Iz1gkdqKT)**

| Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth.

He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth...

For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal.

Fellow Patriot, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage.

These are the very things Charlie gave his life for.

May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God...

A stronger love for your family...

And a renewed peace in your own soul.
---
| **For Charlie, **

**Justin Streiff **
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA

clean_body: he wrote this... Charlie’s final message—support Turning Point USA & receive his last book. | | | Fellow Patriot, | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud. He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus. He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness. And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible. I saw it up close -- Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything. He started observing the Sabbath. Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance. But as an act of obedience. As a way of saying, " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped. He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield. No email. No media. No work. He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children. It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much. But over time, it changed him. And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned... | | This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust. A book not about politics... but about peace. It 's called: Stop, in the Name of God. | | Fellow Patriot, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book. It's not a culture war manifesto. It's a call to stop. To rest. To breathe. To return to God. Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away. Trust that God is in control. Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship. In Stop, in the Name of God, you'll discover: 🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout 🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again. That's the heartbeat of his final message. | | Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth. He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth... For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal. Fellow Patriot, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage. These are the very things Charlie gave his life for. May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God... A stronger love for your family... And a renewed peace in your own soul. | For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA | | | P.S.Stop, in the Name of God is Charlie Kirk's final message -- written in obedience, shaped by Scripture, and grounded in trust in the Lord. | | 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw

Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

How?| | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | Breaking: Ukraine Downs Russian A-50 with AI, Shaking Global Military Landscape! name: Vanessa Lachey
subject: Make a difference for our troops: Your holiday gift will double
body:
It's important to support America's troops.
[](https://www.uso.org)
[RUSH A GIFT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/E89~Cy7vA9CLL/czROdlI2RUdnSlAwY0xKNmV5NG16UlR3RjNzbkczYllSTG12MnZqN09xTUEvQzZYUlF5bUNRL1pzRm9BRzhHc0htVmlhMVpZQ3NkaUVuLzRQSzhISEVKcUl3NGcvWUk3M1BuRzIrbWVoNHc9S0/WTFiTVpPcG5iOWh0WTJGRGwvZTZvSTF6NzdyOGkzc0wrTFJxREpoVEplYzBYSTYvOXhxZW93a08zVDZRenJ3azZaajJxSk9oMEM5UStMNHovTERYbENxYXczQ3JPTWJpS0)
---
I was born on a United States Air Force base in the Philippines and watched both my dad and stepmom proudly serve in the USAF. Growing up as a military kid, the holidays were always a little different for my family. I saw the sacrifices service members make, the missed birthdays, the empty chairs at the table, the holidays spent apart.
That's why the USO means so much to me. They bring families closer, even when they're thousands of miles apart. And right now, you can help make a difference in the lives of service members and their families. **[This holiday season, your gift will be MATCHED to support our heroes when they need it most.](https://links.e.uso.)**
[**DONATE NOW AND HAVE
YOUR GIFT MATCHED **](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/KAeVs70r-4h_/czROdlI2RUdnSlAwY0xKNmV5NG16UlR3RjNzbkczYllSTG12MnZqN09xTUEvQzZYUlF5bUNRL1pzRm9BRzhHc0htVmlhMVpZQ3NkaUVuLzRQSzhISEVKcUl3NGcvWUk3M1BuRzIrbWVoNHc9S0/WTFiTVpPcG5iOWh0WTJGRGwvZTZvSTF6NzdyOGkzc0wrTFJxREpoVEplYzBYSTYvOXhxZW93a08zVDZRenJ3azZaajJxSk9oMEM5UStMNHovTERYbENxYXczQ3JPTWJpS0)
---

Your generous gift can help bring comfort to service members -- holiday meals, calls home and care packages that remind them they're never forgotten.
As someone whose life was shaped by military service, I know how much your support means. **[Will you join me and make a holiday gift to support those who serve?](https://links.e.uso.)**
[MATCH MY GIFT NOW](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Together, we can make sure our military heroes and their families feel the warmth and love they deserve this holiday season.
With gratitude,
Vanessa Lachey
USO Global Ambassador
A group of donors is matching all gifts to the USO up to a total of $10,000, through December 31, 2025. Your contribution will be used where it is needed most.

name: Roy Cooper via Able Dems
subject: Sorry to interrupt your morning…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I just had a check-in with my team. | | | Hi there — I’m sorry to email so early, my team and I are having frequent check-ins on the progress to our December fundraising goal. Believe me, I wish I didn’t have to ask for your support so often, but we will not succeed without your help. Republicans are already investing heavily against me, and we expect them to spend _hundreds of millions_ more in the months to come — this could potentially become the first U.S. Senate race ever to cost a billion dollars. They’re lining up PACs, dark-money groups, and mega-donors to write endless checks to benefit my opponent. _Talk about absurd_. We need to be able to take them on — dollar for dollar. That’s why missing this month’s fundraising goal could set us back significantly, but I know that our team will step up before time runs out. ****[**I’m personally asking for your support right now. Please split a contribution between our campaign and Able Dems that fits in your budget.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOtOHdsv29RoW51tJGOGXf9PZ-Uv4n9uHU1E-Uvc-f0MlrJ91CiUQ9f6O8XuMhGUjiPUQiTDkrswrt_ph2rOyktyeRVRSQlFi1nJh17IOc2a4YKQAWHK10lAn99YBtHkCoZggkUznDTy4Fl5tOYZWAzEY4y0DRIAls7Z-NzfTOLgO6gviVFAnZFaLmgEzk599KAAt6NwIJyuJvihBU6sDjde-twA4p9gorm4JegR-0EAJInrlJA2Tp02gLSGgvD5mlX7c20H-rnef3bxEiTPTgWok_GHGVfKRCazrWFN4JcEGfI84VF3y-y1MuPOUfJbax8JzTzyRZnKoX7RiFiDeEgQ/4mj/dDzEL3C8Q0a-GhJdFN3uFw/h0/h001.ngSXkTlHZrkoJpWgz8Jpnb-KOeGEqCvcje-vu83Wo3A)**** **** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split with Roy Cooper and Able Dems immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: I just had a check-in with my team. | | | Hi there — I’m sorry to email so early, my team and I are having frequent check-ins on the progress to our December fundraising goal. Believe me, I wish I didn’t have to ask for your support so often, but we will not succeed without your help. Republicans are already investing heavily against me, and we expect them to spend hundreds of millions more in the months to come — this could potentially become the first U.S. Senate race ever to cost a billion dollars. They’re lining up PACs, dark-money groups, and mega-donors to write endless checks to benefit my opponent. Talk about absurd. We need to be able to take them on — dollar for dollar. That’s why missing this month’s fundraising goal could set us back significantly, but I know that our team will step up before time runs out. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split with Roy Cooper and Able Dems immediately. ** I deeply appreciate all your help, Roy Cooper elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. # A Winter Update from Your National Committeeman & Committeewoman
---
Dear Republican Friends,
The Christmas season is always a special time, and this year in Washington was no exception. Over the past few weeks, we had the chance to take part in Christmas gatherings across the city, attend trainings and meetings, reconnect with old friends, meet new ones, and, of course, keep fighting for Massachusetts.
The Political, Media, and Data Trainings held by the Republican National Committee were top-tier and focused on making an immediate impact. One particularly memorable evening was a Christmas reception at Vice President JD Vance's residence. How fortunate we are to be part of this moment in our country's history! As with all the events, the best time was spent sharing stories and celebrating the good work you all do each and every day here at home.
As the year winds down, these moments are a welcome pause and a good reminder of why we do this work, and how very important you are in the fight for the future of Massachusetts.
THANK YOU!
Cheers to 2026,
---
| | Janet R. Fogarty MA RNC National Committeewoman MA GOP State Committeewoman
---
| | Brad Wyatt MA RNC National Committeeman

Updates from Washington
> DEMOCRATS ARE TRYING TO SHIFT THE BLAME FOR OBAMACARE PREMIUMS
> Democrats are the ones who voted to expand Obamacare subsidies when they controlled Congress in 2022 and to set the expiration date for those subsidies at the end of this year. This is a crisis of Democrats' own making, which they are now trying to blame Republicans for.
* Democrats are once again blaming Republicans for problems [they created](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dns5pc2SR2lWO0S1vlESIpvmU_FX2Ne-12rJNv147o5FdB6s4PZFG5L1kch_abQe9ItK8eKDO9gJV6ntO18tkTx_RbYrlZ6y7HYiktBXnzc79V7u5Wg6ap1Rd6iEe1uQP-3hD06X25Acq44Own9Fm3yEG2yM7Dmeo6QyUrS2f6qo0vKHMvThsZMUbRIW0yvjUCmi1PtSfR4U6k_jdxwFO60trjN2ToAfyl5sj-AYji5ZgkYaDmmPuL87ANwUg9xa5cAdEKqnShIYaBVg0tM3Ok5aD4rKAL8-tUf0FeSGM5nB-T0aw8kIxg==&c=h3qkQmK0CTMAREB1j1QCNH-IusRpZsZ8_xd4RxUmc0aXh4UsHq5JqA==&ch=IrF0ymwseo3FzicADEg-SwIovwJVNX9PuryxzOirpG3Lf2THlKJLwg==).
* When Democrats were in control of Congress under Joe Biden, they created new Obamacare subsidies and [set them to expire](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dns5pc2SR2lWO0S1vlESIpvmU_FX2Ne-12rJNv147o5FdB6s4PZFG5L1kch_abQeMpuabCV70fGXiksV8Mn3E5rTe7cmpFeYafhdCWr2eguLxCCVG5qPr2pmHmKgwSfSGtqQh_An0kNhhW1fXRllaUcpJ_40lgsQ2VYwbmeCpRpvkpZeV0pQE0Kt85CfgOt3eiFk6AI4W8QRfzIioBxdOCcN3lCqlQG7b_iMSo9xRkox9chmVa-AC8j5dMYaP0aKeSHKqAr0ggVVS6KL74EOXnXpra0Nc_rp8k8kpj9vrpCEpG3ccqV9YA==&c=h3qkQmK0CTMAREB1j1QCNH-IusRpZsZ8_xd4RxUmc0aXh4UsHq5JqA==&ch=IrF0ymwseo3FzicADEg-SwIovwJVNX9PuryxzOirpG3Lf2THlKJLwg==) at the end of 2025 without a single Republican vote.
* These extended Obamacare subsidies were put into Biden's Inflation "[Reduction](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dns5pc2SR2lWO0S1vlESIpvmU_FX2Ne-12rJNv147o5FdB6s4PZFG5L1kch_abQeB8fOk6_TAOdtBCzXTzvYZ_p1pGTWposXasi1AAdNrg5b5ONVy0ulR5Q0z-rTfsuk8g-F2LQGcrI08-XItNkL7Q_iJ6TcJRfBXiQPwFz-GVFvL1ctzJvai1gKzREfFH5scIbfr3hpt8xfnq6AoeD5P_rgyXwwW8O4n6IuIZ4F5EAuXlHrQ98X5AZ4FRrkKsj0-HmLus2I8DikJqkE5ODc-n2RpPcjp4ADHtUXxJNAAcs1gG9BbDU_Og==&c=h3qkQmK0CTMAREB1j1QCNH-IusRpZsZ8_xd4RxUmc0aXh4UsHq5JqA==&ch=IrF0ymwseo3FzicADEg-SwIovwJVNX9PuryxzOirpG3Lf2THlKJLwg==)" Act and Democrats' multi-trillion dollar stimulus that caused prices to skyrocket and wrecked the U.S. economy.
* This is a crisis of the Democrats own making.
* [The text of the "Inflation Reduction Act"](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dns5pc2SR2lWO0S1vlESIpvmU_FX2Ne-12rJNv147o5FdB6s4PZFG5L1kch_abQeCURMxL6fxOGkc3FeK_qn86T5-yi0oA2-ys23UQw9me41IWYPAj1ChymQ_ARhJW9sKO1NaK4tz68sr8ZQcf2oX7qGcNd3L4-U3GT47Ca1UZcUO33-5Q0nT-DPhjxjcE6XZyaVL-plRLL4X0VRu1nDHZuZsHn3TYvBKZRoX2iw6Aqhd66hkh6Pa9Lrn-Q3hFdJA8WJLLR17y35jz6URBXuwfN6kx1kTSiiNyPeIWZ3b3jd2EaCXlmAdg==&c=h3qkQmK0CTMAREB1j1QCNH-IusRpZsZ8_xd4RxUmc0aXh4UsHq5JqA==&ch=IrF0ymwseo3FzicADEg-SwIovwJVNX9PuryxzOirpG3Lf2THlKJLwg==) - which Democrats [wrote](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dns5pc2SR2lWO0S1vlESIpvmU_FX2Ne-12rJNv147o5FdB6s4PZFG5L1kch_abQesyWgPmkPpBRp9vuCFk0GM2egYBFKz_CMYwXQc0O7sLMEqWRDCYpUmyDCLPiQrU5Gn7AW6AkMp-4LaI6zf6NZCOPR4Ff8BxxdOkCeMxIrUuUYMi6NDhlkafRIM2WwmYB7JAl0KM1p5RAw_tSkHSY5ZsJPc-Pvn25YpKNnPj7-bOHzEPPV5qjhyRXU2gk1lLzh_GF_i5dX7feSVdu5LrHPpiotFYZGU6Df-GoE5HkoJqLEU6ZzBkmN6Q==&c=h3qkQmK0CTMAREB1j1QCNH-IusRpZsZ8_xd4RxUmc0aXh4UsHq5JqA==&ch=IrF0ymwseo3FzicADEg-SwIovwJVNX9PuryxzOirpG3Lf2THlKJLwg==) and voted for - created this expiration date.
* Not a [single Republican](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dns5pc2SR2lWO0S1vlESIpvmU_FX2Ne-12rJNv147o5FdB6s4PZFG5L1kch_abQe4qAKvlvS5uNIn0OGTpIcFmeQ3YjoLuUYaEbZCotsE0w29ttzKwHqpSnXaQN6mmDrUaG9CWtMNZAzxaCHBe9K5k4bVOxkvXyeq3xIDxPclmmUn5fPQmtVUSmLF6qOAb-ytSAb8F9tarA4bnEMvqbnmm8BqRQwx5nogonXEbPT9UwZLrFeHy3rfW6MjP7wSHiFn4QdqQQGUVnLruNhxb38X-e5VUwZd61ugTvZocbTxVQD_SdRbtpPMA==&c=h3qkQmK0CTMAREB1j1QCNH-IusRpZsZ8_xd4RxUmc0aXh4UsHq5JqA==&ch=IrF0ymwseo3FzicADEg-SwIovwJVNX9PuryxzOirpG3Lf2THlKJLwg==) voted for this bill; it passed with only Democrat votes.
* These subsidies were originally created as part of Biden's wasteful stimulus package - the so-called "[American Rescue Plan](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dns5pc2SR2lWO0S1vlESIpvmU_FX2Ne-12rJNv147o5FdB6s4PZFG5L1kch_abQemPJcoWFHrmWHpKoxbZ66aka5xeFBuIMSylGsI81rKmRkCrJQA6avIf2vQd3P2DcrB2MBBnDmHAOefxZ9GBEh-izVR90earFLECYTRP7N8AtX_weGKy1Vg2btIaRW_xoOLHfyHNE9bgmAW7EH-xSvlWQAULq35IIiUxFTRuH08zKtNoRobXiEdtD1ASaBbST74fcczHgPiHJwiwHMQV0S7t8fAJpMwy0tb0sI80YIE_eHgxMwqbinEw==&c=h3qkQmK0CTMAREB1j1QCNH-IusRpZsZ8_xd4RxUmc0aXh4UsHq5JqA==&ch=IrF0ymwseo3FzicADEg-SwIovwJVNX9PuryxzOirpG3Lf2THlKJLwg==)" - which also was [written](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dns5pc2SR2lWO0S1vlESIpvmU_FX2Ne-12rJNv147o5FdB6s4PZFG5L1kch_abQehfcabGWONfs2Z0T1ygpESqjR_KxBaB_7O7VaW4QqRH-EtJ6vWrmfywqGh6zERE04k-TjBfiaY6KQRUMesIeOYyRbc1R4LN1jqt8ikVjBPfuBjkLWNtXJ73CWlSay1PxlBv5P8AuAHdaq_IlRc46jrR4UNaL0MkjhD6E2fqSmZUV9NrO_vmr4YROybkA5evggQiZHNI5ZvVEEOjIMpUyKhNCpXnoacttlSuyG8LkAfkwNqGnSYLnxGg==&c=h3qkQmK0CTMAREB1j1QCNH-IusRpZsZ8_xd4RxUmc0aXh4UsHq5JqA==&ch=IrF0ymwseo3FzicADEg-SwIovwJVNX9PuryxzOirpG3Lf2THlKJLwg==) and passed by Democrats with no [Republican votes](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dns5pc2SR2lWO0S1vlESIpvmU_FX2Ne-12rJNv147o5FdB6s4PZFG5L1kch_abQeGIuwCmcN-NoQicB_3TnKFIgurbnF3pb_oqPBJXM0t_yOGJFjX138NREB9mASf8cx54Y6Xh3cIo4EmroPkMGqgWFia0UXqmJNaNVuE2RhxKHkWhNp-xQLp81VO1Lkba5Kx04HILDJcbVJGaMR66yifrY8Twspb_iVyO5Uyau-ko6afi_E_oWuZzVmUAz3PNUUzEaQdfoeReamq8004UXogM-L83IeydrmQCi_FiauVkMkS4lj_v14Zg==&c=h3qkQmK0CTMAREB1j1QCNH-IusRpZsZ8_xd4RxUmc0aXh4UsHq5JqA==&ch=IrF0ymwseo3FzicADEg-SwIovwJVNX9PuryxzOirpG3Lf2THlKJLwg==).
* Democrats are now blaming Republicans for this and actively [refusing](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dns5pc2SR2lWO0S1vlESIpvmU_FX2Ne-12rJNv147o5FdB6s4PZFG5L1kch_abQeAAI6QzC6TG_7u97ccIFdqQxP26w8kOotCH7DsbQoO_34s5JGBny_5s4T6Sm9cDyA8RQHYFbWBoldt5aCrzepLdhhDVz4kGPu7DejT5RWHz2matnP2X_wGsCeJCbxbhAJLAOcf6Dvr9a3Qmnb3GgUKA8sG9Ioj635wbXMuTnMv1xFaG5dKwqTVfxN0re5MntxJFg2oYqRH3qeo5ERCZwXwp5_UAZ81fJDbz-Kas1Jxs2vw7Rfmm9f8A==&c=h3qkQmK0CTMAREB1j1QCNH-IusRpZsZ8_xd4RxUmc0aXh4UsHq5JqA==&ch=IrF0ymwseo3FzicADEg-SwIovwJVNX9PuryxzOirpG3Lf2THlKJLwg==) to work with Republicans.
* Last week, the [DNC voted](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dns5pc2SR2lWO0S1vlESIpvmU_FX2Ne-12rJNv147o5FdB6s4PZFG5L1kch_abQeuNUJJsSmaKcscLS71c4Q_Ai_eVY_C-MtunS4RMQC-fpTLotRRzM7I5TBrytACrxTmSmtLqN5r2bX-ZI5ZPlTKr2qdZEnPTEB9FLgQn82bAEKq4RTIOvimF3NOF0ogrW97dc1vj49UhA8mjWt11h37ydi3G6fE0ld7SBRqYaG3Avrn0UrLk4vlasRb53PYQ0fcJpyk9Q5yyfGe7qBGfK-I15bmu1Gv8AYVLy29UgeFOx65UoMZ8qhOw==&c=h3qkQmK0CTMAREB1j1QCNH-IusRpZsZ8_xd4RxUmc0aXh4UsHq5JqA==&ch=IrF0ymwseo3FzicADEg-SwIovwJVNX9PuryxzOirpG3Lf2THlKJLwg==) to pass a resolution saying Democrats should refuse to negotiate with Republicans on healthcare.
* Meanwhile, President Trump and Republicans have worked to deliver [lower prices](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dns5pc2SR2lWO0S1vlESIpvmU_FX2Ne-12rJNv147o5FdB6s4PZFG5L1kch_abQe8OY_wOZkZfmsDHpBePh5OJXCMi47fWR3EihO17ZNIt4_fHKZtRllxb1ppVnu4ZuvNaT6TYARpZ9L5rQu2wzmOxka5Ljuy7K9OcZqAC4jKsTDgTHZe039c91XjAnYeRmeN0hwrq7q4Z92o3XR4P9Fn1XCJnLUVHPJcl9fajFjflTtTWwCZRNqMd2DStHRl21mkGInpuES6y3oEISUzy-FUdLAb0AIsOvvgG_09MAF6wIhzsrN_7zpAg==&c=h3qkQmK0CTMAREB1j1QCNH-IusRpZsZ8_xd4RxUmc0aXh4UsHq5JqA==&ch=IrF0ymwseo3FzicADEg-SwIovwJVNX9PuryxzOirpG3Lf2THlKJLwg==) and make healthcare more affordable for all Americans.

* President Trump [announced](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dns5pc2SR2lWO0S1vlESIpvmU_FX2Ne-12rJNv147o5FdB6s4PZFG5L1kch_abQeEzBwTdbA571E1DkgQCN7Em5Mr_p-MiQq78jYgvLx4kYrwAfR5rqN9-YbV0WeyoDyyzY4S1R6FzK_7Nustj4aIWHUj9NtpDV7whblnwDDxbJ04us5Y4rCWOp8FSaCaC0i6xPjSsJoGCHdH1CAbOFl88cBKqiS-9gMU5naayYSudAYduVFdYhTW6_Vf7tZCvadXbyOvHMlhEzZvslbJqmc64sLznjQIHDEAzXVPy3RVPK46iRj7PgSgA==&c=h3qkQmK0CTMAREB1j1QCNH-IusRpZsZ8_xd4RxUmc0aXh4UsHq5JqA==&ch=IrF0ymwseo3FzicADEg-SwIovwJVNX9PuryxzOirpG3Lf2THlKJLwg==) he is providing $12 billion in relief to American farmers to deal with temporary disruptions in agricultural markets.
* American farmers are still facing the consequences of four years of disastrous Biden administration policies.
* These payments will help farmers until historic investments from the Working Families Tax Cuts and the President's trade deals go into effect.
* Of the [$12 billion](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dns5pc2SR2lWO0S1vlESIpvmU_FX2Ne-12rJNv147o5FdB6s4PZFG5L1kch_abQepXeBGA0kfTcL8Oz62sCaYkKN-GNP3HxKHrchVySKzb8LAsJ-x_6UQEh8y4JpQPsEl8ZLD9CfH5ltlmCAa2pdw0xWazHWh0AAGHV3o5V9WR8Z597gfv0M-JE9sMMj2HiqZ71pkxaoX1eEfFJlSOJXCh-IDghT7gLfC9GnHlA-Gir5ki9XXCjNZ_ObML_rxSDOk8yzK21mFkcoFaDSYZPoVEQs390s0QLP_QnpTgWBBeOO8EcKtT1Cog==&c=h3qkQmK0CTMAREB1j1QCNH-IusRpZsZ8_xd4RxUmc0aXh4UsHq5JqA==&ch=IrF0ymwseo3FzicADEg-SwIovwJVNX9PuryxzOirpG3Lf2THlKJLwg==) provided, up to $11 billion will be used for the Farmer Bridge Assistance (FBA) Program, which provides relief to U.S. crop farmers.
* FBA will provide relief to farmers from market disruptions, higher input costs, and foreign competitors engaging in unfair trade practices that prevent American farmers from exporting more of their products.
* The remaining $1 billion will be reserved for commodities not covered in the FBA Program.
* President Trump is ensuring our great farmers can see quick relief while our new trade deals take effect.
* President Trump is fighting to bring down costs for farmers, reverse the effects of Bidenflation, and stop foreign countries from cheating in trade.
* Maximizing farm production in the United States is a big part of how we will bring down grocery prices for American families.
* [President Trump](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dns5pc2SR2lWO0S1vlESIpvmU_FX2Ne-12rJNv147o5FdB6s4PZFG5L1kch_abQeiMmHrdHp8nmE0GZFi3la97or-_QP-YjMXmoOiQH6GgHyqskG9iIYvWCD_UCxOD7bnUjWuTcYsw7Ti_DWnuNV5Xd4ybWZYQ3cE0N5XC_JCHe8FwEOrbH0C0zEOXvo24w0xoAqCP1A0HqwZK9V20Oh8BiGz6ryAmssNLvAnjM1YpxB5GlFjZ_Ml5q-Bk-HxBH2tZS-6IU3bWdjhWZXbM39E1krwIQKLH7HNrNQUCJZiqu1ybjdD8N5oA==&c=h3qkQmK0CTMAREB1j1QCNH-IusRpZsZ8_xd4RxUmc0aXh4UsHq5JqA==&ch=IrF0ymwseo3FzicADEg-SwIovwJVNX9PuryxzOirpG3Lf2THlKJLwg==) : "Farmers are an indispensable national asset, part of the backbone of America...I've always felt it so strongly. They are so important."

name: Mark Warner
subject: Pete Hegseth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/39262?t=1007&amount=15&akid=3419%2E52803%2E6wGheh ]Mark Warner

I won’t mince words, Peter. Pete Hegseth has demonstrated
repeatedly that he is in over his head.

He doesn’t know how to do the job of Defense Secretary. He continues to
make egregious mistakes. And these missteps have and will continue to
jeopardize our national security.

The truth is a Fox News studio is not where you learn to run a three
million person organization, and it certainly does not prepare you for the
huge responsibility of leading our nation’s troops.

This is an individual more concerned with getting likes on social media
than protecting our country's national security.

The Senate should have NEVER confirmed Hegseth in the first place – but
too many of my Republican colleagues caved to Trump’s demands, despite
knowing how dangerously unqualified Hegseth was for the job.

It’s clearer than ever: The midterm election is our ONLY chance to put an
end to the chaos, corruption, and incompetence that have defined this
Trump administration.

We’ve got to flip the Senate and elect leaders who will put transparency
and accountability above loyalty to the president.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/39262?t=1008&amount=15&akid=3419%2E52803%2E6wGheh ]And I’m urgently asking you to join me and Senator Angela Alsobrooks in
this effort. Please, split a contribution between our campaigns to win in
Virginia and flip the balance of power in Congress.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/39262?t=1009&amount=15&akid=3419%2E52803%2E6wGheh ]Chip in $15 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/39262?t=1010&amount=30&akid=3419%2E52803%2E6wGheh ]Chip in $30
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/39262?t=1011&amount=50&akid=3419%2E52803%2E6wGheh ]Chip in $50 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/39262?t=1012&amount=100&akid=3419%2E52803%2E6wGheh ]Chip in $100
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/39262?t=1013&amount=200&akid=3419%2E52803%2E6wGheh ]Chip in $200 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/39262?t=1014&akid=3419%2E52803%2E6wGheh ]Custom Amount

The fight continues,

Mark Warner

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/89?t=1001&akid=3419%2E52803%2E6wGheh ][IMG]

An important update from Team Alsobrooks:

Angela is so thankful for this grassroots team’s support and is eager to
get to work for Marylanders in the Senate. That’s why you’ll be receiving
fewer fundraising emails from us moving forward, in an effort to not clog
up your inbox for the next six years.

Instead, we’d rather send you emails you want to read – like updates on
Angela’s work in the Senate, or rundowns of key issues and news stories
from Washington.

But to make this possible, we’re relying on supporters like you to
consider making a small, monthly recurring contribution of $3 or even $5
to keep our operations running while Angela is busy fighting for Maryland
families.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/33703?t=1002&akid=3419%2E52803%2E6wGheh ]Make a recurring contribution to Angela Alsobrooks' campaign here.
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=1003&akid=3419%2E52803%2E6wGheh ]click here.
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4693?t=1004&akid=3419%2E52803%2E6wGheh ]Chip in a one-time donation
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4694?t=1005&akid=3419%2E52803%2E6wGheh ]Chip in a monthly recurring donation!

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3419%2E52803%2E6wGheh

Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
Alsobrooks for Senate
PO Box 6058
Largo, MD 20792

body:

name: Parler Sponsor
subject: If they can silence voices, what else can they erase?
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | | | [View in browser](https://view.parlermailer.com/?qs=aa6106b6c44fbb0c5677512ec37bde634c731a284cb5515b62610bae30a96ebad36f1d77450b92ee2e5febb2755f817dd74c109e406638b425ca8b4f3ee891e75505e83b2e264be8ba56834c9d4ed474 "View in Browser")
---
_**A Special Message from our Sponsor**_ _Please note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of_ _Parler_ _and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by_ _Parler_ _._
---
| (855) 644-6215 [Candace Owens] Why I Choose Goldco! Don’t miss these special offers from my trusted partner - Goldco | | | | [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=7d39fbf28b7b9b25b1898051704f79f609d61c3429e860601b6bc3d9c640b013c5f3be7e8370d5902a2b3dff12a2a9acf15785611573da9a6442b3500724ee2d)
---
| | **It’s Candace Owens.**
---
**When my friend was recently assassinated, the cruelty spoke volumes.**
---
Instead of mourning, elites mocked. **Some even celebrated.
** _That’s not free speech._ That’s erasing a voice. By force. **By death.**
---
**And the hypocrisy doesn’t stop there.**
---
| | [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=7d39fbf28b7b9b25b1898051704f79f609d61c3429e860601b6bc3d9c640b013c5f3be7e8370d5902a2b3dff12a2a9acf15785611573da9a6442b3500724ee2d)
---
**Jimmy Kimmel laughed when Roseanne Barr lost her career.**
---
**He cheered when Tucker Carlson was taken off the air.** But when HE was fired, suddenly it was about “free speech.”
---
**We all know the rules. If you are on the “approved” side, you’re protected. If you’re not, you’re silenced. Or worse..**.
---
[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=7d39fbf28b7b9b25b1898051704f79f609d61c3429e860601b6bc3d9c640b013c5f3be7e8370d5902a2b3dff12a2a9acf15785611573da9a6442b3500724ee2d)
---
| | **Google recently admitted that the Biden administration pressured them to take down YouTube content that didn’t even break the rules.**
---
They called that pressure “unacceptable and wrong.” The only reason they are admitting it now is because President Trump will not **put up with their nonsense.

** Banks have **openly canceled conservatives.** Melania Trump. Kanye West. If they can target public figures, what chance does the **average person** have?
---
[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=7d39fbf28b7b9b25b1898051704f79f609d61c3429e860601b6bc3d9c640b013c5f3be7e8370d5902a2b3dff12a2a9acf15785611573da9a6442b3500724ee2d)
---
**So here’s the truth...**
---
If they can pressure platforms to **censor** , if banks can **cancel accounts** , if the IRS can **weaponize audits** , what makes YOU think your savings are _safe in their hands?_
---
**Based on what we have seen recently, we are at a turning point.**
---
Institutions are showing _they will not hesitate_ to use their power.

**I may be targeted next. Or it could be you...**
---
| | **So I will _never_ trust my family’s future to people who have _already_ shown they will use any tactic, no matter how dirty.**
---
[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=7d39fbf28b7b9b25b1898051704f79f609d61c3429e860601b6bc3d9c640b013c5f3be7e8370d5902a2b3dff12a2a9acf15785611573da9a6442b3500724ee2d)
---
That is why I keep part of my savings in GOLD and SILVER.
---
Assets that _cannot_ be censored, deleted, frozen, or murdered.
---
**If freedom still matters to you, protect your voice and protect what you’ve earned!**
---
[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=7d39fbf28b7b9b25b1898051704f79f609d61c3429e860601b6bc3d9c640b013c5f3be7e8370d5902a2b3dff12a2a9acf15785611573da9a6442b3500724ee2d)
---
| | [(855) 644-6215 **Here's How I Do It**](tel:\(855\) 644-6215)
---
[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=7d39fbf28b7b9b25b1898051704f79f609d61c3429e860601b6bc3d9c640b013c5f3be7e8370d5902a2b3dff12a2a9acf15785611573da9a6442b3500724ee2d) Goldco, 24025 Park Sorrento, Suite 210, Calabasas, CA, 91302, United States Click [here](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=7d39fbf28b7b9b2555ef135d4b5cc99408a6eea1414d520a8cae67f695194e450fd632a99474329e1530bdf6d5a2a46d1ee3ab05042558946b1e07ba0112f936) to unsubscribe from Goldco mailings

subject: These matching funds will be GONE FOREVER if we don’t act!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elise for Governor
body:
We can’t afford to miss out...
We can’t afford to miss out...
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e10183671/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvVXRVd1hKcTVCOQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMTg/LbmNsQUJsRjRLNQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNXR0tDb1l3Rkc1NFdscw/gaUQOyA/s9i9ff5a676)

| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Friend,
---
The State of New York unlocks matching funds at a rate of 6-to-1 once a candidate hits the fundraising benchmarks written into state law.
---
**Zohran Mamdani used that secret weapon to raise over $11 MILLION in matching funds, which was key to his shocking victory in the New York City mayoral race.**
---
Now, our grassroots campaign is turning that same playbook _against_ Mamdani and his puppet governor Kathy Hochul by unlocking the **_LEGAL_ _MAXIMUM_** in matching funds from New York State!
---
**But our effort to secure these vital funds is becoming increasingly urgent...**
---
**_If we don’t qualify for these matching funds, they’ll be _GONE_ _FOREVER_! _**
---
_To FIRE Kathy Hochul, we can’t afford to leave any stone unturned. Missing out on these matching funds would be a MASSIVE wasted opportunity!_
---
Also, these critical funds become available as soon as we qualify – so the sooner we reach our benchmark, the sooner we can put them to use to help us WIN this toss-up governor’s race!
---
That’s why I’m going all in to ensure we reach this critical benchmark as quickly as possible...
---
_...But we won’t get there without support from thousands of grassroots conservatives like _YOU_! _
---
[**So please, make a grassroots contribution of ANY amount to help SAVE New York – and help us unlock these critical matching funds before they’re gone for good.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25 >>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50 >>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

We can’t afford to miss out... | Friend, The State of New York unlocks matching funds at a rate of 6-to-1 once a candidate hits the fundraising benchmarks written into state law. Zohran Mamdani used that secret weapon to raise over $11 MILLION in matching funds, which was key to his shocking victory in the New York City mayoral race. Now, our grassroots campaign is turning that same playbook against Mamdani and his puppet governor Kathy Hochul by unlocking the LEGAL MAXIMUM in matching funds from New York State! But our effort to secure these vital funds is becoming increasingly urgent... If we don’t qualify for these matching funds, they’ll be GONE FOREVER! To FIRE Kathy Hochul, we can’t afford to leave any stone unturned. Missing out on these matching funds would be a MASSIVE wasted opportunity! Also, these critical funds become available as soon as we qualify – so the sooner we reach our benchmark, the sooner we can put them to use to help us WIN this toss-up governor’s race! That’s why I’m going all in to ensure we reach this critical benchmark as quickly as possible... ...But we won’t get there without support from thousands of grassroots conservatives like YOU! Thank you, Elise Stefanik Paid for by Elise for Governor PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: My decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
#

_Let me lay this out, clear as day:_
I am the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won in 2024.
And this Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation.
If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight –– please rush $5 to my reelection campaign today.
**Here’s the link to donate:**[**https://act.electjon.com/go/donate**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251218-1-f&t=1&akid=1296%2E5691347%2Ezd6J_X)
Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent.
Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution.
More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation.
Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning.
I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible.
I also ran — years before the _Dobbs_ decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is.
**Now this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history:**
* He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf.
* Purged independent watchdogs across government.
* Stacked key agencies with loyalists — and called on them to investigate his political opponents.
* Defied and threatened federal judges.
* Undermined the press.

Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government.
This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes.
**In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.**
Now we must win again. And we _will_ win again.
Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
So I’m asking:
[**Please make a contribution to my reelection campaign today, of $5 or any amount that works for you.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251218-1-f&t=2&akid=1296%2E5691347%2Ezd6J_X)
The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.
All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today.
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251218-1-f&t=3&akid=1296%2E5691347%2Ezd6J_X)**
Thanks for being part of this team.
As always,
Jon Ossoff
[
---

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=5&akid=1296%2E5691347%2Ezd6J_X) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=1296%2E5691347%2Ezd6J_X) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

---
Gabby has an incredible life story. She has been through more than anyone should ever have to endure – but she turned her pain into action.

**Gabby has survived cancer three times.**

Born in Santa Cruz, Bolivia, her life was threatened at the age of 7 due to a diagnosis of Ewing sarcoma, a rare cancer affecting bones and soft tissues.

In 1996, she arrived at St. Jude Children’s Research Hospital in Tennessee unable to walk due to the tumor’s pressure on her spinal cord. She was accompanied by her twin brother, Alejandro, her little sister and her parents.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121519878/589720028/-855912670?refcode=EM_F_251218salinas_N_CD_NO_10_NG_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjY2Q5NjJiLTIwZGMtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gJQFys6HKYxfsJLxWNi13jYpCjvBZMWAnipVPPPOsaE=)
---
Before running for office, she had a career at the St. Jude Department of Chemical Biology and Therapeutics – the same institution that saved her life as a child. Then, she made history as the first Latina Democrat and the first LGBTQ woman elected to the Tennessee House of Representatives.

Gabby’s life story has made her believe that, together, we can make the impossible possible. We couldn’t agree more.

**Plus, here is what Gabby has to say about protecting abortion rights:**

_“I am pro-choice and have served on the board of the local Planned Parenthood Affiliate and now serve on the Planned Parenthood Federation of America board. I worked against the constitutional amendment that took away abortion protections here in TN and my voting record as an elected reflects my long history of fighting for abortion rights in my state and beyond.”_

[**As a reminder, TN ranks among the bottom in the nation for maternal health outcomes, and women in TN are living under a near-total abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest. It’s critical that we protect pro-choice leaders in this state as we work to chip away at the anti-choice, male majority. Help us support Gabby Salinas by pitching in a split $20.26 or more contribution immediately.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121519881/589720032/-855912670?refcode=EM_F_251218salinas_N_CD_NO_10_NG_N_L2&amount=20.26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjY2Q5NjJiLTIwZGMtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gJQFys6HKYxfsJLxWNi13jYpCjvBZMWAnipVPPPOsaE=)

Together,

Colleen Davis
Endorsements Manager
Her Bold Move
---

name: Heidi Campbell
subject: This is Important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Lee Jones, treasurer
body:
Can you chip in?
| |
---
Peter, As we approach the holidays, I know you are probably thinking about shopping for last-minute gifts for family, friends, and coworkers. It's a season of joy, togetherness, and giving. I hope it's also a season when you are thinking about your end-of-year giving. As we come to the end of 2025, I hope you consider making an end-of-the-year contribution to my campaign.
---
[ Donate ](https://89ef5d2784b2dbb4a67d22ed19089030.us-east-1.resend-clicks-a.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fheidiemail2025%3Frefcode=decmidmonth/1/0100019b31ee981c-d2cc73b4-f75b-4dcc-92a8-951d26ce6347-000000/sNeHDyAnO69GVPcINOftTKhjOqcOETVE7Cs4fAcVWwI=436)
---
Once the legislature goes into session in January, I will be unable to fundraise for my campaign until we adjourn in the spring. The next month is crucial to ensure I have the campaign funds to fight for you in the legislature. name: Adam Schiff
subject: The gravity of the situation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS
body:
We can’t afford to disengage or turn away. | | | |
---
Hi team, this is Adam Schiff.
Lately, I’ve been thinking a lot about the gravity of the situation we’re facing.
**[I want to share some thoughts with you — but before I do, will you pitch in any amount to my campaign and the Nevada State Democratic Party before our end-of-quarter deadline?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu_hjK98iroObSdPglX9oSTsp6wrz3hMvfKE7NxvZvheTsu_Dl_oGvcQaUfZMq-cPgSjwa0I97R9W2c_gfZxaIto5tOacGgF1H5I75vrhlwiBRYmcuBoxHCdp_SYUQUUS-TzgWgLuVriR9z2CLjhfLdaykXWxenv4ookm47WzTc0MvfwE5c5tS2pp5F-xUp5JPtRFljTLqq6agSOLn8NEOPXQ18XzpVPlMYOhsmog3nfSyXa7GnMNhiQfakBHuxDihLDNiv_GjFURO1qd80shV94FNfa_5_pKOPD6-gIJjcbxAIypy5D-jN9ISynGPwt5__VCpvHbTPcTwUFrU5pUFdm7lECcKYjOuXiOt87iKK3yt68pePiVygm3uHkhkZ1qyhDBYr-9LIcUVhQ1-4RHiG/4mj/j4-0eX7aSSuB0rgNjAY9yg/h0/h001.2NKFuOXX_S197FKKoU1wP9CajacWXfWZ0b_MxR4_JEs)**
[Pitch In](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu_hjK98iroObSdPglX9oSTsp6wrz3hMvfKE7NxvZvheTsu_Dl_oGvcQaUfZMq-cPgSjwa0I97R9W2c_gfZxaItfLYeo94_Qksiq7MDTjyhQn7w51kehmZUNQGZpvhluMQ2Ou2t1L20UHFiJIi8jwZHrRyielZj1q3uhtihskhk4thPPXU8qWryDPm46sgmZPojOaptTAUQnxHcSkprXZ9MgEmZiaFWu2s_j-4wkmK5eihaAkpMFK2gSCLjeU-dqMFRy3KZsEjE-VidMpWiNjKWuiId9KCSCIZTmf9msaScQ99La1vuSbTijuOSRVEZ87Pqx5AM_bg6RVPwWRDh-pNVxJz0qMp7GRooFvIGcsXNRyZKrSnkwfRUgqeEXCRsJv22RLb0BynmBZgqQE0tUsrM/4mj/j4-0eX7aSSuB0rgNjAY9yg/h1/h001.UiBGJGk2sWANWbQp1b5-rct-xxCcikrU5xPxoNFXf-8)
---
We are living in unprecedented times. Never before has our country faced such deep threats to our democracy.
Health insurance costs are ballooning because they took money out of health care for a tax cut for rich people. People are worried about making ends meet. Housing costs are skyrocketing.
Meanwhile, Trump and his allies in Congress are more interested in going after their rivals than fixing these economic crises.
**It's a lot, and I understand why you might want a break.**
But we can’t afford to disengage or turn away. There are too many important fights that we must continue to wage — for an economy that works for everyone, for our democracy, and for the health and safety of us all.
**The future is not set; it is up to us, and we can make all the difference.**
And there are good reasons for hope. Millions of Americans have come out to protest against the president. Courts are ruling in our favor. And we scored important victories last month in California, New Jersey, and Virginia.
**[To prepare for the battles ahead, I'm humbly asking for your support today. So please, can I count on you to chip in any amount you can to the Nevada Democratic Party and me to support my fight to defend our democracy and deliver for working people? Your support makes a huge difference ahead of our quarterly deadline.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu_hjK98iroObSdPglX9oSTsp6wrz3hMvfKE7NxvZvheTsu_Dl_oGvcQaUfZMq-cPgSjwa0I97R9W2c_gfZxaItcwaFLguJmaocXJfhTl4plnI4T59IDXxdlIau2mPFgQvttnSMKezSiD87WNQv9HVdH1LrJ5EATcPsUC0ehfoY6QjeucSR1WfscOS6ajAaROqxZYluF1PHzxtnx-2dwrnKE93H_AwBnXIfMwv3WtsRgQDbWT6gR7pY1E-LoskoMSkS5lcQpK2dsVtzBrzHtNqj9T-flrybJaREDeQEfNFRQycWRLvM6NppxejbRiwsF8qBAc91-PeX2lhwnc0UgDTKlKvmObuEGccnFFdH_we1kgSudjzY94LlufVgFVuWheHkr9veltR4wEk5qE0c5ZZN/4mj/j4-0eX7aSSuB0rgNjAY9yg/h2/h001.6JRQCy4e5z0AgkeUIECmSAbYARpfuj1G3Cu9ApWx70c)**
Thank you for being part of this grassroots team and having my back every step of the way.
— Adam

The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. We believe that we are stronger together than on our own, and that America succeeds when everyone gets a fair shot, everyone does their fair share, and everyone plays by the same rules.

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Never Trump Group’s War on Republicans – Time to Fight Back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
Fake Republican, Never Trump group pledges to spend more than $100 million in 2026 races

| | | [](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Never Trump, DC Swamp operatives who spent $90 million attacking Republicans in 2020--are back with a vengeance. They've launched a new dark money super PAC, "Save America Movement," pledging up to $100 million across 60 House races to flip Congress to Democrat control. Their goal? Block every Republican achievement--from border security to economic growth--and hand the gavel to the radical left. These aren't principled conservatives; they're a machine fueled by dark money, recycling failed tactics that cost us swing states last time. I've put together a quick battle plan memo for you--your eyes only: **[<<Read Before 9:00 P.M. Tonight>>](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-UMWMWMU3gsaLJsg)** We crushed their schemes before, and we'll do it again. But it starts with patriots like you stepping up now, before their ads drown out the truth. [**_Can I count on your $10 today_**](https://trk.email.tedcruz._mjl1p1SQ) to build out a counter firewall and safeguard the Republican majority? Every dollar fuels ads, ground game, and voter turnout that deliver wins. The stakes couldn't be higher. Let's secure the future. Thanks, Ted Cruz

name: NEGOP
subject: 🚨 Your Weekly Update From The NEGOP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nebraska Republican Party 1610 N St
body:
News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong.
| | | | |
---
| Letter from the Chair
---
A Rising Tide Lifts All Boats
The timeless aphorism--"a rising tide lifts all boats"--reminds us that shared prosperity and strength benefit everyone. Just as a strong, prosperous America strengthens the world, a robust Republican Party strengthens our state and nation. In Nebraska, a unified and well-resourced Republican Party elevates all our candidates, volunteers, and conservative causes.
Individualism is a cornerstone of our philosophy--it's what drives innovation and personal responsibility. Yet, when we unite behind common principles, the result is far greater than the sum of our individual efforts. This is synergy: the multiplied power of collective action.
The Nebraska Republican Party has invested heavily in building a strong foundation for success. Through a comprehensive Political Plan and the dedicated leadership of our Political Director, Joe Hagerty, we have made unprecedented progress in recruiting principled, high-quality candidates. This year, we are ahead of schedule like never before, thanks to collaboration with political consultants, the Republican National Committee (RNC), current and former officeholders, county party chairmen, and countless grassroots supporters.
But recruiting excellent candidates is only the beginning. State parties play a unique and vital role in supporting elections, especially under federal and state campaign finance laws. Unlike PACs, which face strict limits on coordination:

* State parties can make coordinated expenditures directly with federal candidates in general elections, allowing seamless collaboration on strategy and resources.

* We can receive unlimited transfers from national party committees, pooling funds for maximum impact.

* Well-funded state parties enable synergistic activities that benefit the entire ticket: robust get-out-the-vote (GOTV) drives, voter registration initiatives, unified messaging, shared polling data, and much more.

Additionally, well-funded state parties can provide direct contributions to state-level candidates and county parties--supporting the grassroots infrastructure that PACs and individual donors cannot replicate as effectively. This positions the party as the central hub for funding, strategy, and victory.
As the saying goes, a rising tide lifts all boats. The corollary is equally true: a low tide exposes the rocks. When the party is underfunded or fragmented, weaknesses emerge, obstructions grow, and opportunities slip away.
Today, the Nebraska Republican Party stands at a pivotal moment--brimming with potential yet facing ongoing challenges. With your support, we can raise the tide: funding critical programs, empowering candidates up and down the ballot, and securing conservative victories for generations to come.
Will we seize this opportunity to lift all boats, or allow the rocks to be revealed? The choice is ours. Join us--donate, volunteer, and get involved today at [ne.gop.](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UnTklCXHuJzN6vnfFfpqom2yFf-zostYXO9dsxZK4hu-LjUCFPCfKe-dOVsqRsxEc2b4JEkYhijCXi3RR71puDxR29RWV-wGXV2RYjuWlP3el2HJ_5W21B4u-wRkN8wMu9J1iNLzoyY=&c=SrdBA_PmU6XHFIETGwXDOdJaBCeOu3CE989VBGvG0tJiJ0_s5ZDzlw==&ch=D6k7-b6QyWNwj79Gn1uI5r_heulm5p2RpiO57c5x3xOCR1I9g10Cpg==)
Together, we'll build a stronger Nebraska

Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party

clean_body: News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong. | | | | | | Letter from the Chair A Rising Tide Lifts All Boats The timeless aphorism--"a rising tide lifts all boats"--reminds us that shared prosperity and strength benefit everyone. Just as a strong, prosperous America strengthens the world, a robust Republican Party strengthens our state and nation. In Nebraska, a unified and well-resourced Republican Party elevates all our candidates, volunteers, and conservative causes. Individualism is a cornerstone of our philosophy--it's what drives innovation and personal responsibility. Yet, when we unite behind common principles, the result is far greater than the sum of our individual efforts. This is synergy: the multiplied power of collective action. The Nebraska Republican Party has invested heavily in building a strong foundation for success. Through a comprehensive Political Plan and the dedicated leadership of our Political Director, Joe Hagerty, we have made unprecedented progress in recruiting principled, high-quality candidates. This year, we are ahead of schedule like never before, thanks to collaboration with political consultants, the Republican National Committee (RNC), current and former officeholders, county party chairmen, and countless grassroots supporters. But recruiting excellent candidates is only the beginning. State parties play a unique and vital role in supporting elections, especially under federal and state campaign finance laws. Unlike PACs, which face strict limits on coordination: State parties can make coordinated expenditures directly with federal candidates in general elections, allowing seamless collaboration on strategy and resources. We can receive unlimited transfers from national party committees, pooling funds for maximum impact. * Well-funded state parties enable synergistic activities that benefit the entire ticket: robust get-out-the-vote (GOTV) drives, voter registration initiatives, unified messaging, shared polling data, and much more. Additionally, well-funded state parties can provide direct contributions to state-level candidates and county parties--supporting the grassroots infrastructure that PACs and individual donors cannot replicate as effectively. This positions the party as the central hub for funding, strategy, and victory. As the saying goes, a rising tide lifts all boats. The corollary is equally true: a low tide exposes the rocks. When the party is underfunded or fragmented, weaknesses emerge, obstructions grow, and opportunities slip away. Today, the Nebraska Republican Party stands at a pivotal moment--brimming with potential yet facing ongoing challenges. With your support, we can raise the tide: funding critical programs, empowering candidates up and down the ballot, and securing conservative victories for generations to come. Will we seize this opportunity to lift all boats, or allow the rocks to be revealed? The choice is ours. Join us--donate, volunteer, and get involved today at == Together, we'll build a stronger Nebraska Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party | | | | == | == | | == | | | UPCOMING NEGOP EVENTS | | == | == | | == | | | Help Republicans win in 2026 and beyond. name: True the Vote
subject: Linking Shields | A Word of Encouragement
body:
Pray. Serve. Vote.
| | | December 18, 2025 | [**Read Online**](https://de717de0.click.convertkit-mail2.com/p9uxgn2z5eu9h28movraqhpd5w733hrhr480e/z2hghnhe0437m5ip/aHR0cHM6Ly9ja2FyY2hpdmUuY29tL2Ivbzh1a2hxaDY1cGR6eHRwMnd3MDI1YXF6bTA3cnJib2hkZTV6Ng==) |
---
| Hi Friend — I know many of us are feeling shaken by the disorienting times we’re living through — times that demand steadiness, discernment, and resolve. The last few months have been particularly heavy. There is a great deal of darkness. But as we head into Christmas week, I want to share something I know to be true: _there is also a tremendous amount of light_. I see it every day. At True the Vote, we’ve been spending time reaching out to other groups — linking shields — as we prepare for what lies ahead in 2026. And I’ve been deeply encouraged by what we’ve found. All across this country, there are grassroots leaders doing serious, thoughtful, often thankless work to protect liberty and strengthen their communities. Much of it happens quietly. It doesn’t always show up on social media or in the headlines. I know that can make it feel like we’re alone. But we are not. I’ve seen it firsthand. Grassroots groups are present, active, and growing. If you are considering supporting a grassroots organization before year's end, [**ours**](https://de717de0.click.convertkit-mail2.com/p9uxgn2z5eu9h28movraqhpd5w733hrhr480e/p8heh9h483zdpmcq/dHJ1ZXRoZXZvdGUub3JnL2RvbmF0ZQ==)or another, I want to encourage you to engage. Donations are the difference between awareness and action, between concern and capacity. You are an important part of this growing community. And together, what we are weaving — relationships, trust, shared resolve — will be the fabric that holds us through the unknowable years ahead. We are not bound by uniformity, and we never have been. What holds us together — when it matters most — is a shared understanding that freedom is worth defending, and that country and countrymen are worth standing up for. We are all here for such a time as this. _“Though one may be overpowered by another, two can withstand him. And a threefold cord is not quickly broken.”_ — Ecclesiastes 4:12 Keep the faith. Never quit. Ephesians 6. Always. [](https://de717de0.click.convertkit-mail2.com/p9uxgn2z5eu9h28movraqhpd5w733hrhr480e/x0hph6hexrwz42t5/aHR0cHM6Ly9jYXRoZXJpbmUtNDAyLndpc3RpYS5jb20vbWVkaWFzL2lqNjlrZDlhMW4=) Merry Christmas and Ever Onward! — |
---
[**P.S. - If you can make a contribution before the end of the year, we can put every cent to immediate use in 2026. Don't forget, all donations are tax deductible!**](https://de717de0.click.convertkit-mail2.com/p9uxgn2z5eu9h28movraqhpd5w733hrhr480e/p8heh9h483zdpmcq/dHJ1ZXRoZXZvdGUub3JnL2RvbmF0ZQ==)

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: Pay now. Benefit (maybe) in 10 years.
body:
Peter, We’re going in on Trenton again. You know how our electric bills are really high? I know...like we could forget. Well, friends, it might get worse...
| | [ ]()
---
Peter, We’re going in on Trenton again. You know how our electric bills are _really_ high? I know...like we could forget. Well, friends, it might get worse. I hate to be the bearer of bad news a week before Christmas but we’ve got to go there. _The team at 101.5 did some solid reporting on this – which I encourage you to_[ _read_](https://xtz223.keap-link008.com/v2/click/7aadbf5687af15e49b08444a54df204e/eJyNkEFLw0AQhf_LHDwlxqQWNVCklFJCag-i57JuRl3d3Syzs2Is-e9OVHpS8Da8ee97zByA0SvPTQc1vPNHVc0gA0JtgkHPq96z0l_ban5ezsoMrPGvG-pTgPrwa_homORLSWXAQ0Cx3N0uV22z2-y3za4VZ1AkHf_jVBdXR876ZtlsYRz_BKMzvH4TdoSaKeF0UWfkKr4nK_5n5hDrovAv5Vk5P9W9kzFHj_Q05A_G2tx4TagiFteJ3T72iTQuODptTTiZJCfA5BaEj0ikrJSqENB3Px9rcfiuHj8B-7h2Dw==) _. Let's dive in._ Our Legislature (currently in lame duck session) is working on a plan to build the infrastructure needed to grow our nuclear power resources. That’s great... _but_ they want us to pay for it (shocker - all roads lead back to our pockets). Meanwhile, we aren’t expected to actually reap the benefits (i.e. this new infrastructure we’re paying for won’t be up and running) for years – possibly a decade. It’s estimated this proposal would add $25-$55/monthly to our electricity bills – devastating for working families and seniors on a fixed income. We’re not saying we don’t need to diversify our energy resources. Or that nuclear power shouldn't be part of that. But WHY are we paying for something now with no promise of reaping the benefits anytime soon? This is on top of bills that are already too high, and coming from a state government that has refused to acknowledge its role in those high costs. Enough. Just stop already. This bill is cleverly titled: “New Jersey Energy Reliability and Affordability Act.” I propose some different titles.
* _“The Screwing New Jersey Families Once Again Act”_
* _“The Why-Be-Fiscally-Responsible-When-We-Can-Just-Take-More-Money-From-The-People’ Act”_
* _“The Energy Reliability and Affordability in 10 Years (We Hope) Act”_
* _“The ‘Just Trust Us and Hand Over Your Money’ Act”_

But in all seriousness, if you’d like to speak out on this bill or ask your legislators to oppose it, the bill is [S4876](https://xtz223.keap-link008.com/v2/click/151034e17a6cd2134dd3e5ef00c2e5c7/eJyNkMFugzAMht_FZ0bWQAfjhiqEEG0P23qeUrDWrGkaJaaMVbz70m7itEq9Wfbnz_p9BkItNFUtZPBF35xHEIDFRhqJmhZHTaK5Tvk8nkWzAJTU-9IeOwPZ-d_lCbi003kcBUCDQY-8veSLulqX78tqXXvSCOtv3OfhyfPkKVZ5tYRxvCnGg6Ti5N0OMrIdXhK10qeijVWe3xEZlzHW932oPxV-hI4Eoa_DzrGtVOrBobDNjvFHHrPXOE2evFYYg7r9-0mNw698_AG4oWj8). The bill is currently moving through committees in the Senate, so there is still time to stop it. Find your legislators [here](https://xtz223.keap-link008.com/v2/click/70e3050dbeb3090f63e5e4f66e13e11b/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LdBVFUypvESGieYg6x9JOtWXrsjtmJv73tg86FXQbZp55hnc6IJRMUsohhivdgmAIDmjcCiVQ0qySxLbPaRCF_tB3oBTylOiqVhB3X5c_wKM9jsLIAWoVWmS1nM6ytEg2eVpkllRM2xv_eYLR5OOZL6ZpDn3_U4xnQfOLdRuISdf4SMSFTUVrXVr-QKRM7HlN07jyWOLeNcQIbe3WxhvshOQ57oUpGVXa-phSKPn7GRm2L2t_Bw6HaEA=). For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---
| [ ]()
---

Common Sense Club

Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsenseclub.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsenseclub.org
Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line)
Mailing Address:
Common Sense Club
11 Convent Road #25
Convent Station, NJ 07961 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.
---
