name: Team Freedom Va
subject: Here’s What We’ve Been Up To!
body:
Friends– December has been flying by as we get ready for the 2026 General Assembly session, and we’ve had boots on the ground spreading the word on affordability in Virginia.
| | |
---
| |
---
| Friends-
December has been flying by as we get ready for the 2026 General Assembly session, and we've had boots on the ground spreading the word on affordability in Virginia.
A Rally to #StoptheHealthcareHeist
Early this month, our Organizing Director Eddie Seay, along with other organizations and impacted Virginians, called on Rep. Jen Kiggans to[ ](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014pmwGltNjAfcpaLriN-nJPwga1u_dTP_9diaMQXe4-KluvJvxzHo_kTgWLNa24jlv5dUbfuOhb6RhqNzxJet_Hj8uV_G4k5vRR-YEla1wa5VnaYfYN7ntQ4H7QtQpXKgnH3SX5bhoedrTFWI0Rfk2_-10bnGq5Y3I3fLDQjPm-vOamMGkIe5i4aJvwPynNFG6m-q-iW9tQc=&c=owUUSmWL45fAj04-JLu_mZpylHc0Qf2DoUSQFQSFLPN_JpUUhBjBmg==&ch=82hUndR5jbtq6-VUChv6FNwEyorFeoxTL_r9slA8e6BJqUcaslVzwg==)[#StoptheHealthcareHeist](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014pmwGltNjAfcpaLriN-nJPwga1u_dTP_9diaMQXe4-KluvJvxzHo_kTgWLNa24jlv5dUbfuOhb6RhqNzxJet_Hj8uV_G4k5vRR-YEla1wa5VnaYfYN7ntQ4H7QtQpXKgnH3SX5bhoedrTFWI0Rfk2_-10bnGq5Y3I3fLDQjPm-vOamMGkIe5i8WNNn5Ernt_6ZvIhq5u1cU=&c=owUUSmWL45fAj04-JLu_mZpylHc0Qf2DoUSQFQSFLPN_JpUUhBjBmg==&ch=82hUndR5jbtq6-VUChv6FNwEyorFeoxTL_r9slA8e6BJqUcaslVzwg==) and support a plan to extend the ACA healthcare tax credits. Without these important tax credits, over 300,000 Virginians are at risk of losing their access to affordable healthcare coverage.
---
| |
---
| | [READ MORE](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014pmwGltNjAfcpaLriN-nJPwga1u_dTP_9diaMQXe4-KluvJvxzHo_kTgWLNa24jlDWQRek6Yrp1VCJDEMN4G57Vc_xLjsb8zjcvux6he9JjbxiJdiGfIGewIXB9TUhG3pmyIyOrwmY8k7unHx2kXgNKZhrrlpBr5GGZmfYnWrKTxAqag1pYgMrk_a1ZcSZVQKpQIEjeCie2zppYa5flGXT1G-G31KYa4lxk8EhwENp7mvFSePrdnzdDNhqNVfBJjIgLGUU-6-2Yf56k8-wXSIwkRsmcGGEif2jQSPC91phwlBqr2D1HhCw==&c=owUUSmWL45fAj04-JLu_mZpylHc0Qf2DoUSQFQSFLPN_JpUUhBjBmg==&ch=82hUndR5jbtq6-VUChv6FNwEyorFeoxTL_r9slA8e6BJqUcaslVzwg==)
---
| A Discussion on Affordability
Last Wednesday, we were joined by the League of Conservation Voters and other organizations as well as legislators and impacted Virginians to discuss affordability issues at the state and federal level. Affordability has been a key issue in Virginia over the last few years, and as the costs of health care, child care, energy, housing, and education continue to rise, Virginians are eager to find solutions that will ensure a more fair and affordable economy.
---
|
---
| | [READ MORE](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014pmwGltNjAfcpaLriN-nJPwga1u_dTP_9diaMQXe4-KluvJvxzHo_kTgWLNa24jlZGDNUx3zy2q7hJ1rkAQHqRJxDCUU-ZbEWpXfpKm5g94SwjEdby7eUYMr3jwCUz2D9vkNzeYZGVzWWipUGF9T97Vl1R1tPFNfsojLjT42mrcg5VFXXPn-Tr2Alf6GEHVFl3V4fVI8j219CvOi4h27KGHOAQJ8mCtqlphbmI1LNvXaveV205p_OUelIwpFg3F-_3ZNpPeQvJKUjNLzEa8MNg==&c=owUUSmWL45fAj04-JLu_mZpylHc0Qf2DoUSQFQSFLPN_JpUUhBjBmg==&ch=82hUndR5jbtq6-VUChv6FNwEyorFeoxTL_r9slA8e6BJqUcaslVzwg==)
---
| We hope you will continue to join us in the new year as we keep fighting for a Virginia where everyone can get ahead. Keep an eye on your inbox and our social media for info on upcoming events!

name: Reeves, for U.S. Senate
subject: He hates Trump more than he cares about you
body:
He works for you, and that’s a problem

| | | | [ ](https://links.email.brycereeves.com/els/v4/fzvizsdl2d7vbz9fatpyw/Yy3HiX6lUEDmvhuW3nb2D2dnExst2EzIWmuF2Ta-5634_Gpg6q6pe_dOF58Lq8kwBOKa/IAzYsSTuTSIaNi8sZGF58OwQRnyuJsfG50ix92vug5kqbdHaMJWqEmKrJPl9doPzfXXOGcqkqzTGhpAP2v0bNqY8I5jb2gV0aNrTYli5tC1-uUBOJWH7Mrl-CiJ3oClyQ8vhplmlnN_d1YDJtg40hYT31jSetAauSfrZVI2U2xw1avKnzWSFjYBf_BZ1AFPBvOYxtfk3r4WjWFlAqyfM2s633F2K7C98_j7XgqyxWNBI808LoSTfaO-EKGOOKFBTcpmwK6hz5ZsFR_QSs8qVJQERd1otbkLSmfJSi6sYtRV316Zllj5RqNhjBu2AyxeH1jeEK4WTt_esyope_KUqr3sTBEAUMQc=)
---
| | Friend, Mark Warner wants you to think he’s the most bipartisan member of Congress. _But that couldn't be further from the truth. _ He laughed in the face of Americans while casting his vote to keep the government shutdown... A shutdown that has cost the American people an estimated **$7-$14 BILLION** – that will __never__ be recovered. A shutdown that impacts our servicemen and women, our air traffic controllers, and millions of other vulnerable Americans. We don’t think that’s funny at all – so we certainly can’t imagine why he thought it was appropriate to laugh about it.
---
| | | [ FIRE MARK WARNER ](https://links.email.brycereeves.com/els/v4/mokzuw8l3qnw1m-gnnc7e/Yy3HiX6lUEDmvhuW3nb2D2dnExst2EzIWmuF2Ta-5634_Gpg6q6pe_dOF58Lq8kwBOKa/IAzYsSTuTSIaNi8sZGF58OwQRnyuJsfG50ix92vugz7nJx7QN_63fdQiztN2ZU2ZNDuBO1hvYohIo9LEX_tJqR3y7YUnTp4DdwUsxpb-KW7C5emJeDAd1OqEaPo_VfQLEM2-NNq1wWUOaycLYPFlGiC1dtaSfmr0qBqrPmNDvQn3_jg2lcy3Xmym9_F4lmZLllivqrImQWvL95P-N6CvpcmJ_GIT6EWnWB2e_qQk15-l5C9EpsibOvmkBy0O0Q4ciY0sYH6wnr9S0FOSh21Jroo6FqO0nVLo4bQmAx7wgoOKEsnsa9gTg7wgOgVmEYVCpuJqID_c_NEYr2VN-PgrvpHpwR-nzv0=)
---
| | The reality is, Mark is as far-Left and radical as they come. Because real, bipartisan Democrats voted to reopen the government – __and Mark wasn’t one of them.__ He let his hatred for President Trump and endless pursuit of obstruction cloud his judgment – and the _**American People are paying the price**_**. ** Anyone who doesn’t have **YOUR** best interest at heart has no business working for you in Washington. **It’s time to****FIRE****Mark Warner. **
---
| | | [ FIRE MARK WARNER ](https://links.email.brycereeves.com/els/v4/7zjeh9w7s227tli65lwk-/Yy3HiX6lUEDmvhuW3nb2D2dnExst2EzIWmuF2Ta-5634_Gpg6q6pe_dOF58Lq8kwBOKa/IAzYsSTuTSIaNi8sZGF58OwQRnyuJsfG50ix92vug3hOyBEhyM6H-rQjUYNIs5hAUciItPhvnrqSbY4XM0VMEdDa0D6CAO3uH6G3cn7roVcEw32K8hdRfpOQjCA_vH2h61LmB-J98zCfLuitgyqDRDD-o1hWsmvhniyjS42PuNTuz0IsvZKYpHIQFFrPcNzoaC19kFsrNLWeydczSpZ6CuHo2Sz_ypKhem7OEOHK-s-aIgymGsGJT5U6lERVdWO9Vs1zJn5ZraX21XiKYMSO9RdkZYkZc-rof5iQ2N1P6PnjmUkrZIbgSzBYXAWTYQ1dxc-K8Z7z-c28kVfDIOBk1IONO3-RXOY=)

clean_body: He works for you, and that’s a problem | | | | = | | Friend, Mark Warner wants you to think he’s the most bipartisan member of Congress. But that couldn't be further from the truth. He laughed in the face of Americans while casting his vote to keep the government shutdown... A shutdown that has cost the American people an estimated $7-$14 BILLION – that will never be recovered. A shutdown that impacts our servicemen and women, our air traffic controllers, and millions of other vulnerable Americans. We don’t think that’s funny at all – so we certainly can’t imagine why he thought it was appropriate to laugh about it. | | | = | | The reality is, Mark is as far-Left and radical as they come. Because real, bipartisan Democrats voted to reopen the government – and Mark wasn’t one of them. He let his hatred for President Trump and endless pursuit of obstruction cloud his judgment – and the American People are paying the price. Anyone who doesn’t have YOUR best interest at heart has no business working for you in Washington. It’s time toFIREMark Warner. | | | = | | As a former Army Ranger, putting duty, honor, and country before self is second nature to Bryce Reeves – and he would be honored to serve you in Washington. He’s not one to back down from a fight – and he certainly isn’t intimidated by someone like Mark Warner. Now he just needs the cash flow to back it up. = | | | | | | = | | Thank you, Team Reeves | | | | =

name: Mark Kelly
subject: My decision.

body:
We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121535139/589767547/1545041525?amount=10&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.18_Mark-Kelly-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzEwZWQ4OS0yZmRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sarLwwXfsAtCrt-uyt-AyADCbEF3wvCQKV4aDTn11dE=) Hey folks, it’s Mark Kelly. Seven years ago, I was making a decision about whether I was going to run for the Senate. I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy. But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something. So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too. I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help. We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now. After everything you’ve already done for me, I shouldn’t have to ask you for more. clean_body: Don't miss The Flyover Podcast's new look -- take a listen! | | | | | Dear Flyover Reader, 📣 Major Announcement! We have rebranded to bring our audience the best version yet, and you are not going to want to miss this. After listening to your feedback for the past seven months, we're excited to share what's next. You are really going to want to see this version, complete with: Trusted, unbiased coverage you expect Higher production value in every daily episode Sharper pacing for a faster, more engaging listen New elements designed to keep you engaged from start to finish We have reached 488,096 monthly views and listens as of November 2025, which is what led us to invest in a faster, higher-production format for the next chapter of the podcast. 👉 And when you're done, hit reply and tell us what you think. We truly read every response. If you like what you see, and never miss an episode! Thank you for being part of The Flyover. Warm regards, Cole Strehlow CEO, The Flyover | (Step One) The Flyover, LLC 1910 Thomes Ave. Cheyenne WY 82001 | ---|---

name: Ximena, United We Dream
subject: These collective actions send a message:
body:
We the people are building a future where everyone is free to live, speak, and be themselves — regardless of their background. | | | | | Thank you for being a part of our community. Whether you read these emails, sign our petitions, or share UWD’s work on social media — it all adds up. You can scroll down to learn more about your 2025 impact, but first: [**We’re asking you to level up your support before the year ends. Can you make a donation so we can scale up our advocacy efforts to empower and educate immigrant youth and allies?** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvvSptAA5-xC0ZLMh3sw_H8hyCmECnODiQzfTWOA-yBFyMy3hRBIyntuHVBsTQpjJR39yXD_Eh0n8j4m0_AzAGO8ePLeD6eMzABXMIKETjUgkAYiHqLrYSCKprRinPPRwlOhzdtLspsNMueY9u5YmhJ2_D5pa-APrezgIqSJTwSIsXX3X2Hk3hLBOmj41ZqbVZSzWqk71JZKZlB2wy76P8o9DDfqGCbbHxNc5k_dT1UiN25kXVtLDYXyz0mZn-7XhAjwbC7sfmoLIGRGs-6NafTtdjrSGlZ2A_pASuHFADZUce11I54iDCxhMnPuACQL2TeIMB8jnQRjTugomzCv5VHbARdvtasDt1O80hZu9F8P2PU3u0YLSnf-nI1icLLQY17OBOzviwR7MFN5Udb2290W6g7v7xH_SSsBLzBhgJDBRWv66P8url0RKU-TIYz3JSul9YPr6yAFwB8aaGaecA2P8776AowYuhnOjvu6vko0Q/4mj/OmAJklQBQq-YNjvxEigtJQ/h0/h001.mylSFssB1sIFrFz_2ROqmfN5OavA9siR6_L85CiQmp8) | | [LEVEL UP](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvvSptAA5-xC0ZLMh3sw_H8qKP2PhKYX1YkaHSOMNHOECPY5pPmKRQpm5vba7K4PlBSzVY0o5GBFokj4weEw8_LLS-Irseez5k0wkjLN989dESkFhsETCJuv0plMrZh6mTkE4HCLmbxD1dB3hGdxwj49nDDfBiV1K4j-0P-jZL5aKpKj0urJvKhsioCHtyPgzmCKoOdgd3SUzFa8kx1KerFICD0fpwMP5n0PoD2H-eToFIQAML4_EkW1im7Qyt_mw47UTecIjiAqv35QWeildzc0w3xYv8hAWzWSd893u88fWFpOGWKPnq2DNCuTkjJouAEqESjFrsGeNAkH4eiffL0W232gH76nxlO1EE-ScjrbmI8oVLb2bss4Tnzb6axiObG244X5das0FyWZ7R4L2bWVaUCJejbrVhKGP0D0PLhJw/4mj/OmAJklQBQq-YNjvxEigtJQ/h1/h001.JWRTUkad_p3_7RaGILzOK3BjsRPIQI4uiAs6ba0lJ4w)

Peter —
When you support United We Dream, you’re supporting a decades-long mission to secure immigrant justice and dignity. And this is a mission that’s powered by and for the people.
That means hosting in-person and virtual gatherings that give youth organizers a safe space to connect, heal, and chart a path forward together.
It’s our ability to respond quickly as things develop — which includes sending legislative alerts to keep our communities updated and share ways that you can get involved directly.
And as DACA recipients are targeted, it’s this community that’s stepping up to cover their DACA renewal fees, _which can cost up to $605._
This collective action sends a message: **We the people are building a future where everyone is free to live, speak, and be themselves — regardless of their background.**
**[But we can’t do any of this without you. Please, click here to level up your support:](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvvSptAA5-xC0ZLMh3sw_H8hyCmECnODiQzfTWOA-yBFyMy3hRBIyntuHVBsTQpjJR39yXD_Eh0n8j4m0_AzAGO8ePLeD6eMzABXMIKETjUgj3z4we2ivHTpmUUUqU0Nwjl4ZTT1uMKJyl1ocXCt8Kl1zYl7_M1AyG9D_qxjRsxIy9frz6MObkzNwRit5i8D5LaQRM1EVTfyo37bZTLzh0-7RX9Tcd7quEJ7tMyLGLtRkBhN3PawLCGTBhMc1IE5KUC3WNUqom_Xh4PChXHgpiwUEwRIMK2SDyLaH6k488oDtTjDy7ycNwD1Q5FXWWaejfflCvpKdsWOyN4KQFz0IndjkTysTSBe1Vsw3YCtUw9AtNSrjdfxUk22e3-Zipnobdi8E4vrQ6yEjnke0gRo6gcA0Ry1rkCPnzazNfRRnoKhESz5wsadySg3xuLUoD47bXOc0iQCD9s9ivBACQiQTFkkpGUyTVPPCvS40HxHSiIcQ/4mj/OmAJklQBQq-YNjvxEigtJQ/h2/h001.cjcxEr_19vDiSjNSGT9IWSxZRaDIpcCI2yaz6NyLA2o)**

clean_body: We the people are building a future where everyone is free to live, speak, and be themselves — regardless of their background. | | | | | Thank you for being a part of our community. Whether you read these emails, sign our petitions, or share UWD’s work on social media — it all adds up. You can scroll down to learn more about your 2025 impact, but first: | | Peter — When you support United We Dream, you’re supporting a decades-long mission to secure immigrant justice and dignity. And this is a mission that’s powered by and for the people. That means hosting in-person and virtual gatherings that give youth organizers a safe space to connect, heal, and chart a path forward together. It’s our ability to respond quickly as things develop — which includes sending legislative alerts to keep our communities updated and share ways that you can get involved directly. And as DACA recipients are targeted, it’s this community that’s stepping up to cover their DACA renewal fees, which can cost up to $605. This collective action sends a message: We the people are building a future where everyone is free to live, speak, and be themselves — regardless of their background. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for everything. — Ximena, United We Dream Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Mark Kelly
subject: BREAKING: Escalation from Pete Hegseth
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
The Department of Defense is upgrading its preliminary review of me to an official investigation.

| | |
---
Folks, Mark Kelly here.
They are escalating.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2544?t=1&akid=6305%2E400544%2EyQSiy5)
We hadn't heard anything significant since December 10th, and then they dropped this.
Honestly, we learned about this the same as everyone else. We found out that Trump called for my arrest and execution by tweet. We heard about this investigation for the first time by tweet. And now that they're escalating, we hear it by tweet — again.
Trump and Hegseth won't let this go — but I refuse to back down. And I need you with me to have any chance against them.
**_[Please. If you’ve got my back: Split a donation of $5 between me and Deb Haaland.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2550?t=2&akid=6305%2E400544%2EyQSiy5)_**

name: Team Abdul
subject: We know we land in your inbox a lot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1441%2E251025%2EbYjpdU ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1441%2E251025%2EbYjpdU ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

We know we land in your inbox a lot, and we don’t take a single open,
read, or donation for granted. But this moment couldn’t be more urgent.

The future of Michigan’s Senate seat, and frankly, the direction of the
Democratic Party, is on the line.

We’re working around the clock to build the kind of people-powered
operation it takes to win in a competitive race like ours — one where
we’re up against candidates backed by corporate PACs, establishment
insiders, and AIPAC.

But building a coalition from Detroit to Marquette takes ample resources.
That’s where you come in,
Peter.

To defeat the establishment’s corporate-backed candidate, we need the
largest grassroots coalition Michigan has ever seen.

That includes you,
Peter, and we noticed you
haven’t chipped in yet.*

That’s okay. Truly. But this deadline is the moment when pundits and the
press measure whether our campaign has the strength to win. If we fall
short, the establishment will use it to argue that grassroots candidates
can’t compete.

That’s why we need your help. [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251218-1-ak.Fo55Dl&amount=10&refcode=em20251218-1439&t=1006&akid=1441%2E251025%2EbYjpdU ]Will you make your first contribution of
$5, $10, or any amount before our FEC deadline on December 31?

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251218-1-ak.Fo55Dl&amount=10&refcode=em20251218-1439&t=1007&akid=1441%2E251025%2EbYjpdU ]Donate $10 ››

Abdul is the only major candidate in this race who refuses money from
corporate PACs or AIPAC.

That means this campaign rises or falls on the strength of regular people
— teachers, nurses, retired autoworkers, organizers, students. People who
are fed up with a broken political system that puts corporations ahead of
communities.

And we ran the numbers. If everyone reading this email
who hasn't
chipped in before makes their first donation of $5 or more right now,
we’ll hit our FEC goal, proving that a people-powered
movement can go toe-to-toe with the political machine.

Can we count on your support? [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251218-1-ak.Fo55Dl&amount=10&refcode=em20251218-1439&t=1008&akid=1441%2E251025%2EbYjpdU ]Donate $10 before the FEC
deadline and help us show the establishment what a real grassroots
movement looks like.

Thanks so much,

Team Abdul

*This only reflects donations made from this email address. If you’ve
given under a different email or by check, please know our team is
profoundly grateful for your support.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1009&akid=1441%2E251025%2EbYjpdU
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1010&akid=1441%2E251025%2EbYjpdU

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

name: Kathy Hochul
subject: Another Trump enabler
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
Our progress is at risk because Trump’s “100% MAGA” ally announced his campaign to flip New York’s governorship red.

Hi Peter, Kathy Hochul here. I’m proud of the progress we’ve made delivering for New York families. We’ve put money back in New Yorkers’ pockets, secured universal free school meals for our students, and tripled the child tax credit. And I’m just getting started. But our progress is at risk because Trump’s “100% MAGA” ally Bruce Blakeman announced his campaign to flip New York’s governorship red. [So, I’m personally asking: Will you pitch in a split contribution between my campaign and The Democratic Party of Georgia so that we can keep fighting back against MAGA attacks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121535877/589769444/-452225159?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_121825_HOCHULSPLIT_B1_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjEyNjYxOC0zMWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dTXA6RD42ZpCUC6bfzwAEmJmjbSKruf9TGT5wQGQx5U=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately to Kathy Hochul and the Democratic Party of Georgia:_

I won’t let anyone — not Blakeman, not Trump, not any MAGA Republican — destroy everything we’ve worked toward.
[I’m ready to keep fighting like hell to protect New Yorkers and build on what we’ve accomplished.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121535884/589769451/-452225159?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_121825_HOCHULSPLIT_B1_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjEyNjYxOC0zMWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dTXA6RD42ZpCUC6bfzwAEmJmjbSKruf9TGT5wQGQx5U=)

name: Jennifer-Ruth Green Press
subject: Green Wins Legal Victory Over Sham OIG Investigation
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jennifer-ruthgreen/jennifer-ruth-green-announces-for-congress-in-in-13392461?e=9fba06d14c)
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | **For Immediate Release:** December 18, 2025
---
| | | **Contact:** tim@jennifer-ruthgreen.com

---
| |
**Green Wins Legal Victory Over Sham OIG Investigation**
---
| | CROWN POINT, IN - Today the Committee to Elect Jennifer-Ruth Green released the following statement in response to Green’s legal victory over the Indiana Inspector General:
---
| | “Today’s settlement represents a major legal victory for Jennifer-Ruth Green. An incompetent and politically compromised Office of Inspector General attempted throw the kitchen sink at her based on a politically motivated sham of an investigation, including 9 charges alleging everything from criminal conduct to inappropriate behavior, along with a laundry list of petty accusations. The OIG completely caved for a settlement to save face with the Ethics Commission and then tried to use today’s forum to smear Jennifer-Ruth again – claiming they backed off more serious charges because the prosecutor’s office was handling. The Office of the Inspector General knows full-well they brought a completely junk case. The OIG knew they wouldn’t win at a lower standard of proof before the Ethics Commission and they know this case will never go anywhere under a higher standard of proof in criminal court. This entire exercise is about trying to destroy Jennifer-Ruth Green’s reputation in the media and the court of public opinion.
Once Jennifer-Ruth’s legal team began presenting overwhelming evidence the OIG would have uncovered had they bother to investigate, including affidavits, recordings, text messages, emails, and phone records, that dismantled these fabricated claims, the Inspector General quickly moved to settle. The prospect of depositions involving senior officials within the Administration further accelerated the sudden shift in the OIG’s desire to settle.
After attempting to portray Jennifer-Ruth Green as immoral, deviant, and again trying to smear her as a criminal today, the matter was ultimately concluded with Jennifer-Ruth taking responsibility for minor violations that occurred: a personal Facebook page used in absence of any Administration social media policy whatsoever, and the use of a state vehicle that had been explicitly approved by her government attorney who the OIG never bothered to interview during its sham investigation.
Jennifer-Ruth accepted this settlement and responsibility for minor violations because she has integrity, and she recognized that justice and fairness were unlikely in an environment where pursuing full vindication would require a prolonged legal battle costing hundreds of thousands of dollars, against vindictive actors wielding unlimited taxpayer-funded resources to attack her reputation, character, and career.
She walks away with her integrity fully intact and immense pride in the work she performed across Indiana alongside dedicated public servants. The people of Indiana now face a clear choice: believe a decorated combat veteran who has devoted her life to service or believe political hacks and faceless bureaucrats motivated by petty grievances and personal career advancement.
This episode should serve as a warning to every Hoosier. If powerful government actors are willing to weaponize the state of Indiana against Jennifer-Ruth Green—just as the federal government was weaponized against President Trump—they are more than capable of doing the same if they seek to destroy you.”
— Statement from the Committee to Elect Jennifer-Ruth Green
###

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | For Immediate Release: December 18, 2025 | | | Contact: tim@jennifer-ruthgreen.com | | Green Wins Legal Victory Over Sham OIG Investigation | | CROWN POINT, IN - Today the Committee to Elect Jennifer-Ruth Green released the following statement in response to Green’s legal victory over the Indiana Inspector General: | | “Today’s settlement represents a major legal victory for Jennifer-Ruth Green. An incompetent and politically compromised Office of Inspector General attempted throw the kitchen sink at her based on a politically motivated sham of an investigation, including 9 charges alleging everything from criminal conduct to inappropriate behavior, along with a laundry list of petty accusations. The OIG completely caved for a settlement to save face with the Ethics Commission and then tried to use today’s forum to smear Jennifer-Ruth again – claiming they backed off more serious charges because the prosecutor’s office was handling. The Office of the Inspector General knows full-well they brought a completely junk case. The OIG knew they wouldn’t win at a lower standard of proof before the Ethics Commission and they know this case will never go anywhere under a higher standard of proof in criminal court. This entire exercise is about trying to destroy Jennifer-Ruth Green’s reputation in the media and the court of public opinion. Once Jennifer-Ruth’s legal team began presenting overwhelming evidence the OIG would have uncovered had they bother to investigate, including affidavits, recordings, text messages, emails, and phone records, that dismantled these fabricated claims, the Inspector General quickly moved to settle. The prospect of depositions involving senior officials within the Administration further accelerated the sudden shift in the OIG’s desire to settle. After attempting to portray Jennifer-Ruth Green as immoral, deviant, and again trying to smear her as a criminal today, the matter was ultimately concluded with Jennifer-Ruth taking responsibility for minor violations that occurred: a personal Facebook page used in absence of any Administration social media policy whatsoever, and the use of a state vehicle that had been explicitly approved by her government attorney who the OIG never bothered to interview during its sham investigation. Jennifer-Ruth accepted this settlement and responsibility for minor violations because she has integrity, and she recognized that justice and fairness were unlikely in an environment where pursuing full vindication would require a prolonged legal battle costing hundreds of thousands of dollars, against vindictive actors wielding unlimited taxpayer-funded resources to attack her reputation, character, and career. She walks away with her integrity fully intact and immense pride in the work she performed across Indiana alongside dedicated public servants. The people of Indiana now face a clear choice: believe a decorated combat veteran who has devoted her life to service or believe political hacks and faceless bureaucrats motivated by petty grievances and personal career advancement. This episode should serve as a warning to every Hoosier. If powerful government actors are willing to weaponize the state of Indiana against Jennifer-Ruth Green—just as the federal government was weaponized against President Trump—they are more than capable of doing the same if they seek to destroy you.” — Statement from the Committee to Elect Jennifer-Ruth Green | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Committee to Elect Jennifer-Ruth Green. All rights reserved.

name: We will burn
subject: MAGA *literally* just condemned us to hellfire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
Trump is making devastating cuts to climate forecasting and research just as wildfires are spreading throughout Yuma county in my district. People will be hurt by these harmful cuts.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qxm_xq4xuQ93kODZ6poyNshS6jMTP6_6FR39wlA9vWGb2dIkmLI4cPVWIplPjILXCpQRT9PjwLZ9uMV4UgLf_OUPSu86ijxdfbVpMB7GtZHyap0olZahFhJ_jJSytir05vrsqFTZqrfOyL-He-qPqX5EPMr2miSarXG-en15tAzbDgxTJj9LPLIFkgEv8uZySWGJZdYpTywTNJyH-mcT7z8cJrUgp1Cf8s4bSLgVgpo=&c=7RNNYKWZVpi5qLdPsyjVGZfICPQqYEfl5XcpypHx4ZlaWKaW_6IHPw==&ch=OO_OFcVtX-zdzXFH8Rqqh4qt1rq8xK25aPA8HhNeEFBe9iAPnoHeRA==)

Peter,
President Trump and his Project 2025 hatchet man Budget Director, Russell Vought, are moving to dismantle the National Center for Atmospheric Research (NCAR), "the global mothership" of climate science and weather modeling and forecasting
Trump is making these devastating cuts at the exact moment wildfires are spreading throughout Yuma County in my district. Some 40,000 acres have already burned. This is the largest fire in the county's history. These are pasturelands that feed our country.
Trump, Vought, and their ultra-MAGA lapdog, Lauren Boebert, are condemning people and their homes to *literal hellfire* and putting our food security at risk.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qxm_xq4xuQ93kODZ6poyNshS6jMTP6_6FR39wlA9vWGb2dIkmLI4cPVWIplPjILXCpQRT9PjwLZ9uMV4UgLf_OUPSu86ijxdfbVpMB7GtZHyap0olZahFhJ_jJSytir05vrsqFTZqrfOyL-He-qPqX5EPMr2miSarXG-en15tAzbDgxTJj9LPLIFkgEv8uZySWGJZdYpTywTNJyH-mcT77_Szb57fmAuaYxpZiBwWRg=&c=7RNNYKWZVpi5qLdPsyjVGZfICPQqYEfl5XcpypHx4ZlaWKaW_6IHPw==&ch=OO_OFcVtX-zdzXFH8Rqqh4qt1rq8xK25aPA8HhNeEFBe9iAPnoHeRA==)
---
Your weather app isn't magic. Your GPS doesn't run on luck. Your flight doesn't land safely by accident.
They run on publicly funded science. Over 1,000 of the world's top climate science and weather experts are employed at NCAR and are now about to be laid off.
I'm a former civil servant and the U.S. National Science Foundation (NSF), the agency that oversees NCAR, and I am running in my home district to fire anti-science MAGA extremist Lauren Boebert.
We can turn the page on the stupidity and ignorance of this era and usher in a new golden era of American science and technology if we work together to defeat Lauren Boebert.
Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024, as her Democratic opponent, I had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts as Boebert underperformed Trump in every single county.
[Right now, the best thing folks can do is work to throw out MAGA ideologues like Boebert who put everyone's lives at risk. Can you help me defeat Boebert with a donation of $5, $25, $50 or more?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qxm_xq4xuQ93kODZ6poyNshS6jMTP6_6FR39wlA9vWGb2dIkmLI4cPVWIplPjILX1euyzlYX2cRpEhW58BP144ETTx7rBaOh-AfptbB_MVnEuv7D7cy5gQuObmX1z_Tj8SThc3_WzZfmUi5KkhJORg9CNQ4bLwdRMxzLHsw8nHn7zBOU9QUA6nB5J7sppcgl9ypf93s4aDeFMnuO4qUGQ0_X7ZbPOw2xvkIVM4wBvLgCx9ebUl7bTw==&c=7RNNYKWZVpi5qLdPsyjVGZfICPQqYEfl5XcpypHx4ZlaWKaW_6IHPw==&ch=OO_OFcVtX-zdzXFH8Rqqh4qt1rq8xK25aPA8HhNeEFBe9iAPnoHeRA==)

subject: Rep. Burlison: DROP EVERYTHING! DOGE is about to FLATLINE.

# Across the Commonwealth

**TROUBLING NATIONAL UNEMPLOYMENT RATE INCREASE** A good quality of life is increasingly unobtainable for the average person in this economy. Americans voted for the Trump Administration because they promised to create jobs and lower prices yet we are losing good paying jobs and the cost of living continues to rise. This troubling trend must be reversed as Americans cannot afford to live like this.

**THE HUNT INSTITUTE EDUCATION SUMMIT** This week in Richmond, state leaders, legislators, and education experts gathered at the Library of Virginia for the 2025 Virginia Education Summit--a full day of learning, dialogue, and collaboration across the education continuum. From early childhood and literacy reform to special education, student mental health, higher education finance, workforce readiness, and the role of AI in learning, the conversations were grounded in research, shaped by lived experience, and focused on what students, families, and educators need most.

clean_body: | | | Across the Commonwealth | TROUBLING NATIONAL UNEMPLOYMENT RATE INCREASE A good quality of life is increasingly unobtainable for the average person in this economy. Americans voted for the Trump Administration because they promised to create jobs and lower prices yet we are losing good paying jobs and the cost of living continues to rise. This troubling trend must be reversed as Americans cannot afford to live like this. | | THE HUNT INSTITUTE EDUCATION SUMMIT This week in Richmond, state leaders, legislators, and education experts gathered at the Library of Virginia for the 2025 Virginia Education Summit--a full day of learning, dialogue, and collaboration across the education continuum. From early childhood and literacy reform to special education, student mental health, higher education finance, workforce readiness, and the role of AI in learning, the conversations were grounded in research, shaped by lived experience, and focused on what students, families, and educators need most. | In the Community | | BLUE RIDGE LITERACY SPRING SEMESTER REGISTRATION Blue Ridge Literacy's Spring Semester registration is now open for their spring programs! They are offering the following: in-person and online ESOL classes and Citizenship Preparation Classes, as well as in-person English and Digital Literacy classes To schedule a registration meeting, contact BRL: call: 540-265-9339, text: 540-355-3187, email: mailto:sgeres@brlit.org "mailto:sgeres@brlit.org". ~~ | ROANOKE-BLACKSBURG AIRPORT NEW ROUTE Starting in the summer of 2026, Roanokers can catch direct flights to Dallas, Texas! Flights are expected to begin in June. Grab your cowboy hat, throw on your boots, and catch a flight to Dallas this summer! ~~ | HOLIDAY LATE NIGHTS - Dec. 19 Join the Taubman Museum of Art for Holiday Late Nights this Friday from 5-9 pm downtown, at the same time as Roanoke's Dickens of a Christmas! Admission to Holiday Late Nights programming is free for all. | ROANOKE RAIL YARD DAWGS TEDDY BEAR TOSS\- Dec. 20 Join the Roanoke Rail Yard Dawgs on Saturday as they face off against the Birmingham Bulls for Teddy Bear Toss Night. Bring a stuffed animal to throw onto the ice after the Dawgs score their first goal; every bear collected will be donated. The Dawgs will be hitting the Ice in Peanuts Christmas jerseys that will be auctioned off. ~~ | DECEMBER HOLIDAY MARKET - Dec. 20 Prepare for the holidays and shop locally! The Botetourt annual December Holiday Market is back, featuring dozens of incredible vendors! Find unique gifts, local baked goods, fresh meats, festive decor, and most importantly, the spirit of community. Come make your season bright by supporting local and finding that perfect holiday gift! ~ | HOPE CENTER CHRISTMAS PARTY FOR KIDS - Dec. 20 Join The Hope Center for their annual Christmas Party for Kids this Saturday from 2-4 pm at their location on 11th St (510 11th Street NW)! If you did not sign up, no child will be left out. Every child will still receive a gift from Hip Hop Santa. ~ | | | DR. WHITE'S WINTER STORYTIME Dr. White's Winter Storytime is this Monday at 7 pm! Tune in as Dr. White is joined by a special furry guest to read two heartwarming stories: "Sacha and the Most Wonderful Thing" and "The Gift of Words" written and illustrated by Peter H. Reynolds. Mark your calendars and watch on Facebook, on the RCPS YouTube Channel, or on their ~~. | RCPS MIDDLE SCHOOL OPEN HOUSES Parents and guardians of rising 6th graders: Be sure to stop by your future middle school's open house in the coming weeks to learn more and become familiar with your soon-to-be new school! This is a great opportunity to meet your future principals and teachers. HOLIDAY DRIVES SHERIFF'S OFFICE HANDS OF HOPE CHRISTMAS GIVE BACK The Roanoke Sheriff's Office is collecting food for Roanoke families for their annual Christmas drive. Anyone wanting to help can drop off donations at the Roanoke City Sheriff's office (340 Campbell Ave.) through December 18th. ~ | Community Resources | COMMUNITY OFFICE HOURS VIRTUAL OFFICE HOURS WITH DEL. RASOUL'S TEAM Our office is now holding virtual office hours to meet with constituents. Meet with a member of Delegate Sam Rasoul's team to ask questions, share concerns, or get help with state-related issues. subject: MAGA *literally* just condemned us to hellfire

body:
Trump is making devastating cuts to climate forecasting and research just as wildfires are spreading throughout Yuma county in my district. People will be hurt by these harmful cuts.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PuS1BbIwKM03589eQLAPhTl_MKgs7H6c9PapGM_MDP-cxuBxaT0XB4GOCrMK-nQvA0niA0MaPALXimeoVc2BRwCP-J2f5kdQ9Sqglxe-elR8unXITRD9OkM52OREkkY3i963e73pCQxMIIRz85X7SBbHM5fYuS2BwNHtFhgEiWhlEMlO7TpVggfWguXGzXfd7IqRjS0GFBt9DOqMVDVh_B_Jbuuw1fR7&c=YvsNZZui3kGCJ_2iXdKpNa4HYKpPj6qz64XWBi-YydVEiyswkhOIfQ==&ch=TTvt7_xx8SjfFRffVQKbcHvsQ9ig2JERRH8-0mw02QvxZKp0eePE8A==)
---
|

Peter,
President Trump and his Project 2025 hatchet man Budget Director, Russell Vought, are moving to dismantle the National Center for Atmospheric Research (NCAR), "the global mothership" of climate science and weather modeling and forecasting
Trump is making these devastating cuts at the exact moment wildfires are spreading throughout Yuma County in my district. Some 40,000 acres have already burned. This is the largest fire in the county's history. These are pasturelands that feed our country.
Trump, Vought, and their ultra-MAGA lapdog, Lauren Boebert, are condemning people and their homes to *literal hellfire* and putting our food security at risk.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PuS1BbIwKM03589eQLAPhTl_MKgs7H6c9PapGM_MDP-cxuBxaT0XB4GOCrMK-nQvA0niA0MaPALXimeoVc2BRwCP-J2f5kdQ9Sqglxe-elR8unXITRD9OkM52OREkkY3i963e73pCQxMIIRz85X7SBbHM5fYuS2BwNHtFhgEiWhlEMlO7TpVggfWguXGzXfd7IqRjS0GFBt9DOqMVDVh_Mt4MiaQn3R6&c=YvsNZZui3kGCJ_2iXdKpNa4HYKpPj6qz64XWBi-YydVEiyswkhOIfQ==&ch=TTvt7_xx8SjfFRffVQKbcHvsQ9ig2JERRH8-0mw02QvxZKp0eePE8A==)
---
Your weather app isn't magic. Your GPS doesn't run on luck. Your flight doesn't land safely by accident.
They run on publicly funded science. Over 1,000 of the world's top climate science and weather experts are employed at NCAR and are now about to be laid off.
I'm a former civil servant and the U.S. National Science Foundation (NSF), the agency that oversees NCAR, and I am running in my home district to fire anti-science MAGA extremist Lauren Boebert.
We can turn the page on the stupidity and ignorance of this era and usher in a new golden era of American science and technology if we work together to defeat Lauren Boebert.
Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024, as her Democratic opponent, I had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts as Boebert underperformed Trump in every single county.
[Right now, the best thing folks can do is work to throw out MAGA ideologues like Boebert who put everyone's lives at risk. Can you help me defeat Boebert with a donation of $5, $25, $50 or more?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PuS1BbIwKM03589eQLAPhTl_MKgs7H6c9PapGM_MDP-cxuBxaT0XB4GOCrMK-nQvHZR-LoheoXNN98JulXJQn3uMJ5E7lgRLOKxDNzhuY_zEsgaw5oXX1JUJ6VWxCOxafvOiWvKmQ2DQ8-skhkpnVvFSPXDSqiHWzB5RiVT8UMSIH0ajzAI3utb4phntIU4ui7-18s7e9HEwz5r53-fp_vkM9BRGZSATuRKGtfexPZkzeRsBckyBMQ==&c=YvsNZZui3kGCJ_2iXdKpNa4HYKpPj6qz64XWBi-YydVEiyswkhOIfQ==&ch=TTvt7_xx8SjfFRffVQKbcHvsQ9ig2JERRH8-0mw02QvxZKp0eePE8A==)

People will be hurt by these harmful cuts. | | | | | == | Peter, President Trump and his Project 2025 hatchet man Budget Director, Russell Vought, are moving to dismantle the National Center for Atmospheric Research (NCAR), "the global mothership" of climate science and weather modeling and forecasting Trump is making these devastating cuts at the exact moment wildfires are spreading throughout Yuma County in my district. Some 40,000 acres have already burned. This is the largest fire in the county's history. These are pasturelands that feed our country. Trump, Vought, and their ultra-MAGA lapdog, Lauren Boebert, are condemning people and their homes to literal hellfire and putting our food security at risk. | == Your weather app isn't magic. Your GPS doesn't run on luck. Your flight doesn't land safely by accident. They run on publicly funded science. Over 1,000 of the world's top climate science and weather experts are employed at NCAR and are now about to be laid off. I'm a former civil servant and the U.S. National Science Foundation (NSF), the agency that oversees NCAR, and I am running in my home district to fire anti-science MAGA extremist Lauren Boebert. We can turn the page on the stupidity and ignorance of this era and usher in a new golden era of American science and technology if we work together to defeat Lauren Boebert. Boebert is only in Congress because of 546 votes. In 2024, as her Democratic opponent, I had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts as Boebert underperformed Trump in every single county. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | Thank you for your support for candidates who believe in science, knowledge, and truth. Sincerely, Trisha Calvarese Democrat for CO-04 | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | |

name: Michael Bennet
subject: I want to make sure you heard it here first (redistricting)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
| | |

Friend –
Donald Trump and Republicans know they're facing major losses in 2026.
That's why they've taken us down a dangerous path of mid-cycle redistricting: bullying GOP-held states into drawing hyper-gerrymandered maps that create new "safe" red seats out of thin air and silence Democratic voters' voices on the national stage.
But if Colorado's going to lead the country past the chaos Trump's created, then we have no choice but to fight back.
**So, I support a one-time change to Colorado's constitution so we can do our part.**
**_[And the best way we can set the stage to deliver the GOP a resounding nationwide defeat is by reaching our campaign's final $100,000 end-of-quarter goal of 2025 by the Dec. 31 deadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121538509/589777535/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1029-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTgzZTliOC0zM2RjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xg2zaoCumuIh3hsFR4pzhWA8TRa-qxaUnRRK7OojEhg=)_** – here's why:
The process would begin in 2026, so new maps won't go into effect until 2028. In the meantime, our best bet to win the House of Representatives is by flipping Colorado's red seats blue.
And from El Paso County's Fifth Congressional District – a longtime GOP stronghold starting to trend our way – to the battleground that is Colorado’s Eighth District, our state has real opportunities to do so, even before new maps take shape.
And in a moment like this, the fight for our democracy won’t be won in Washington alone. It will be won in the states. **That’s why I’m running for governor.**
**As Colorado’s governor, I will keep the National Guard out of our cities, protect the rights and freedoms Coloradans count on, and shield us from Trump's campaign of retribution and chaos against states that didn't vote for him.**
But with our campaign's biggest fundraising deadline to date just 13 days away, I can't make that happen unless we hit the ground running in 2026 with the resources to _win_ this race. **So friend, I'm humbly asking:**
**_[Will you please rush $5, $25 or whatever you can today to help me ensure Colorado leads the fight to stop Trump from eroding our republic as the next governor of our state?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121538511/589777537/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1029-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTgzZTliOC0zM2RjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xg2zaoCumuIh3hsFR4pzhWA8TRa-qxaUnRRK7OojEhg=)_**

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Here’s what I was up to last week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley for Wake**
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121539776/589782625/-343666687?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20251218_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTdlNzFiZS0zNGRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Twx-RhxY3n9eQIOPP1f-ccRbkae0VSTC9mFYRAs4gOE=&emci=387e71be-34dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=3a7e71be-34dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=28008880)
---
Hi Peter, The holiday season may be here, but that doesn’t mean I’m taking any breaks from meeting with people across Wake County and getting the message out there about my plans to build a justice system that is fair, accountable, and focused on real public safety. We’re coming off a busy week — and so far, this week is shaping up to be no different — so I thought I’d reach out and get you all caught up on what I was up to on the campaign trail last week. **On Saturday, I joined thousands of other people across Wake County at the Cary Christmas Parade!** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121539778/589782626/963080434?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20251218_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTdlNzFiZS0zNGRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Twx-RhxY3n9eQIOPP1f-ccRbkae0VSTC9mFYRAs4gOE=&emci=387e71be-34dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=3a7e71be-34dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=28008880) We had a wonderful time — and I’m so grateful for all the smiles, the waves, and the holiday spirit that made this parade so memorable for me, Caroline, and the kids. **I also had the honor and privilege to speak at the Antioch Bible Fellowship on Sunday.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121539779/589782627/963080434?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20251218_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTdlNzFiZS0zNGRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Twx-RhxY3n9eQIOPP1f-ccRbkae0VSTC9mFYRAs4gOE=&emci=387e71be-34dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=3a7e71be-34dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=28008880) I couldn’t be more grateful for Pastor Frank White and the incredible congregation for allowing me to join them during their service and discuss my plans to build a safer Wake County. Their commitment to justice, accountability, and service is inspiring — and I’m confident that we’ll be able to get the job done for Wake County as long as we approach our work with the same integrity, grace, and dedication to public service that the leadership and congregation at Antioch Bible Fellowship exhibit every day. **And on Monday, I officially filed to become a candidate for Wake County District Attorney!** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121539780/589782629/963080434?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20251218_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTdlNzFiZS0zNGRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Twx-RhxY3n9eQIOPP1f-ccRbkae0VSTC9mFYRAs4gOE=&emci=387e71be-34dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=3a7e71be-34dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=28008880) This means that when voters head to the polls for the March 3rd primary election, they’ll be able to cast their ballots not just for me — but for our fight to keep our communities safe, defend our rights, and build a justice system that treats everyone with dignity and respect. I’ve spent my career working in public service, holding the powerful accountable, and defending people who needed someone in their corner. **I’m running for Wake County District Attorney to continue this work.** **[But this is a fight that’s going to take _all_ of us working together, Peter. So if you’re ready to make sure that justice in Wake County is fair, consistent, and rooted in facts, please join the fight today by signing up to volunteer with my campaign →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121539781/589782630/963080434?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20251218_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTdlNzFiZS0zNGRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Twx-RhxY3n9eQIOPP1f-ccRbkae0VSTC9mFYRAs4gOE=&emci=387e71be-34dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=3a7e71be-34dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=28008880)** | [JOIN THE FIGHT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121539783/589782631/963080434?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20251218_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTdlNzFiZS0zNGRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Twx-RhxY3n9eQIOPP1f-ccRbkae0VSTC9mFYRAs4gOE=&emci=387e71be-34dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=3a7e71be-34dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=28008880)

Thank you,
Wiley

Raleigh, NC 27602
United States ****[WILEYNICKEL.COM](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121539784/589782632/184824454?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20251218_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTdlNzFiZS0zNGRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Twx-RhxY3n9eQIOPP1f-ccRbkae0VSTC9mFYRAs4gOE=&emci=387e71be-34dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=3a7e71be-34dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=28008880) ** | [info@wileynickel.com](mailto:info@wileynickel.com)** | **Paid for by Wiley for Wake**

name: Team Cooper HQ
subject: 3 things our team wants you to know
body:
A quick Team Cooper briefing for your Thursday:
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=181%2E124072%2E9uLMoO)
Peter — our team wanted to make sure you're up to speed on exactly where things stand in this race. **Here are 3 things you should know _right now_ :** | **#1: Our race in NC is the key to the Senate majority** North Carolina is rated the most competitive U.S. Senate race of 2026. We're in a dead heat — a true toss-up. And political experts across the board agree: Any path to taking back the Senate majority runs directly through North Carolina. **We HAVE to win here.**
---
**#2: Republicans are spending whatever it takes to defeat Roy** The far-right knows Roy Cooper is their top threat. That's why they've already planned to pour millions into propping up Michael Whatley — and experts think this could become the first-ever billion-dollar Senate race. The Koch network just dropped six figures on TV ads. **Dark money groups are lining up to buy this seat._We can’t let them._**
---
**#3: Grassroots donations are the backbone of this campaign** More than 90% of donations to this campaign are $100 or less. That grassroots support means everything to us. But here's the reality: **We set a $1 million online fundraising goal for this month, and can’t go toe-to-toe with Republican dark money groups without your support.**
---
**[Peter, if you've been thinking about giving or waiting for the right moment to pitch in again, this is it. Any amount you can contribute today will help us stay on track to our goal and show we have the financial muscle to win this toss-up race.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2934?t=7&akid=181%2E124072%2E9uLMoO)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2942?t=8&akid=181%2E124072%2E9uLMoO)
---
[DONATE $10](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2936?t=9&akid=181%2E124072%2E9uLMoO)
---
[DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2937?t=10&akid=181%2E124072%2E9uLMoO)
---
[DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2938?t=11&akid=181%2E124072%2E9uLMoO)
---
[DONATE $100](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2939?t=12&akid=181%2E124072%2E9uLMoO)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2940?t=13&akid=181%2E124072%2E9uLMoO)
---
Thanks for being with us,
Team Cooper HQ
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=181%2E124072%2E9uLMoO)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=181%2E124072%2E9uLMoO)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=181%2E124072%2E9uLMoO)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=181%2E124072%2E9uLMoO)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=181%2E124072%2E9uLMoO)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=181%2E124072%2E9uLMoO)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=14&akid=181%2E124072%2E9uLMoO)

name: NH GOP Finance Team
subject: Massachusetts Arrested Santa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee, Chairman Jim MacEachern
body:
We’re trying to get Santa somewhere safe.

| | | | | [|
---](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=9616f8a360&e=f3aa6419cd)
| | | | | |

Friend,Bad news.**Massachusetts just arrested Santa.** Why?Because he didn’t pay a tax he didn’t even know existed.That’s what happens in a state addicted to taxing everything that moves.Income taxes.
Sales taxes.
New fees.
Endless regulations.Now, New Hampshire Democrats want to bring those same policies here.We’re trying to get Santa somewhere safe.
Somewhere prosperous.
Somewhere free.**That place is New Hampshire.** But Democrats are determined to turn our state into the next Massachusetts.
---
| [DONATE TO SANTA’S DEFENSE FUND](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=c2f0105647&e=f3aa6419cd)
---
| |

Your contribution helps us fight back against the tax-and-spend agenda that’s driving families and businesses out of neighboring states.Let’s keep New Hampshire the place people escape to, not from.Santa’s counting on us.For freedom,
NH GOP Finance Team

name: Fair Fight Action
subject: Our work with Black Voters Matter Fund is now more urgent than ever
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
We have to be ready to fight back against this potential Supreme Court ruling. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121540212/589783965/1793776944?refcode=emm_ffa_20251218_T1_BVMFundSplit_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWQyZmM1Ny0zNWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C2O4z_nF8gBOEa60EDYIMFKWGWM8JHMnVsPhcygVQkg=&emci=f77b8e27-62db-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=c5d2fc57-35dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=1037277)

| | **T**he Supreme Court is poised to gut the Voting Rights Act — and if we want to prevent the end of free and fair elections, we’ve got to be ready to fight back.**** Our new report with Black Voters Matter Fund shows that if the Court removes protections against racially discriminatory redistricting, state lawmakers could eviscerate the political power of voters of color — and draw new maps that lock in GOP supermajorities for a generation. States could eliminate around 191 state legislative seats currently held by Democrats across the South, 140 of which are majority Black or majority Hispanic. And that’s on top of how the ruling could help Republicans lock in 19 new safe GOP seats in the U.S. House, which would prevent Democrats from taking control even if they secured a decisive victory in the popular vote. **We are meeting this massive voter suppression attempt by organizing the strongest pro-voting backlash of Black voters and allies’ power we’ve ever seen.** [**Split a donation today between Black Voters Matter Fund and Fair Fight Action to help push back for fair maps, fair representation, and fair elections.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121540218/589783972/-1941948355?refcode=emm_ffa_20251218_T1_BVMFundSplit_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWQyZmM1Ny0zNWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C2O4z_nF8gBOEa60EDYIMFKWGWM8JHMnVsPhcygVQkg=) _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ | [Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121540225/589783979/-1941948355?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=emm_ffa_20251218_T1_BVMFundSplit_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWQyZmM1Ny0zNWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C2O4z_nF8gBOEa60EDYIMFKWGWM8JHMnVsPhcygVQkg=) | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121540230/589783985/-1941948355?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=emm_ffa_20251218_T1_BVMFundSplit_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWQyZmM1Ny0zNWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C2O4z_nF8gBOEa60EDYIMFKWGWM8JHMnVsPhcygVQkg=)

Hi team, I’m reaching out today to talk about my friend Kristen McDonald Rivet. Kristen is Michigan’s only Frontline Democratic Member of Congress, and she represents _Cook Political’s_ “Seat 218,” meaning this district is the tipping point for control of the U.S. House. Simply put, we need your help to get her re-elected. National Republican super PACs have already poured nearly $1 million into misleading, dishonest attack ads against Kristen. They’re doubling down because if they flip MI-08, they’ll surely win the House in 2026. **They’re going after Kristen because she’s effective.** Kristen has spent her entire career fighting for kids and working families — from expanding early childhood education to making health care more affordable and cutting taxes for the middle class. Now, in Congress, she’s one of the loudest voices pushing back against Republican handouts for billionaires over our health care and food for hungry families. But the more effective Kristen is, the harder the GOP works to defeat her. They know MI-08 could decide the fate of the US House. That’s how high the stakes are. **[So friend, if you’re able, I hope you’ll pitch in to help Kristen fight back and keep MI-08 blue. This email is unlike anything I've ever sent you before.

No, this isn't about a campaign or an election.

I'm sending you an urgent message about an organization I'm personally supporting, The Atlas Society.

Their CEO, Jennifer Grossman, has been my friend for thirty years -- we got our start in cable news together in the mid-1990s, and she later hired my firm to do polling when she worked at Dole Food Company. Through ups and downs, we've remained friends.

Today, she's the CEO of The Atlas Society, a non-profit organization whose mission is to spread Ayn Rand's message of capitalism, personal responsibility, reason, and entrepreneurship to young people. **[ I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 to support the mission. Why is The Atlas Society's mission so important?

If my career in polling and serving as President Trump's 2016 Campaign Manager taught me anything, it's this: Americans are _**desperate**_ to hear the unfiltered truth.

**This is why we need more young people to hear The Atlas Society 's message. Here is what Jennifer and her organization are fighting for:**

* Free market capitalism
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

Our culture is pushing a twisted message of victimization, envy, woke nonsense, socialism, class warfare, and hatred for our country and its founding principles.

Young people need an alternative.

The Atlas Society spreads Ayn Rand's message to millions of young people via social media, video content, graphic novels, conferences, and so much more.

I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 for The Atlas Society, which is why I am reaching out to you. Please consider making a donation by using one of the links I've copied below:

clean_body: America desperately needs to hear this message I’m personally supporting The Atlas Society—please read and consider donating. | This email is unlike anything I've ever sent you before. No, this isn't about a campaign or an election. I'm sending you an urgent message about an organization I'm personally supporting, The Atlas Society. Their CEO, Jennifer Grossman, has been my friend for thirty years -- we got our start in cable news together in the mid-1990s, and she later hired my firm to do polling when she worked at Dole Food Company. Through ups and downs, we've remained friends. Today, she's the CEO of The Atlas Society, a non-profit organization whose mission is to spread Ayn Rand's message of capitalism, personal responsibility, reason, and entrepreneurship to young people. Why is The Atlas Society's mission so important? If my career in polling and serving as President Trump's 2016 Campaign Manager taught me anything, it's this: Americans are desperate to hear the unfiltered truth. This is why we need more young people to hear The Atlas Society 's message. Here is what Jennifer and her organization are fighting for: Free market capitalism Respect for achievement and success Free speech The future of young people and our great country Our culture is pushing a twisted message of victimization, envy, woke nonsense, socialism, class warfare, and hatred for our country and its founding principles. Young people need an alternative. The Atlas Society spreads Ayn Rand's message to millions of young people via social media, video content, graphic novels, conferences, and so much more. I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 for The Atlas Society, which is why I am reaching out to you. Please consider making a donation by using one of the links I've copied below: You may be surprised, but when young people hear Ayn Rand's message of entrepreneurship, refusing to be a victim, and personal achievement, they are inspired and want to learn more. Yes, politics are important. But politics are downstream from culture. And culture is downstream from philosophy. The Atlas Society is on the frontlines of fighting in the philosophical culture war, which may determine the fate of the country's future. We CANNOT give up the culture or give up young people. This is more important than a campaign or a single election. You and I must invest in reaching young people with this message. Please don't wait to take action. My goal is to raise this $25,000 ASAP within a 48-hour period. Can I count on you to make a donation? Kellyanne Conway, Former Senior Counselor to President Trump The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible. 1038 Miwok Dr Lodi, CA 95240

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Want to stop wars? Tax the rich
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Putting aside the fact that we should tax the rich more anyways, if we raised taxes on them every time we sent Americans off to fight, every time Congress authorized military force, every time we declared war...
#

Yashar Ali had a pretty good idea yesterday, Peter.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=.NMI9Q-&refcode=em251217-1-120&t=1&akid=4049%2E734936%2EytYgBf)
I like it, but it’s not quite there. Here’s my idea:
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=.NMI9Q-&refcode=em251217-1-120&t=2&akid=4049%2E734936%2EytYgBf)
Putting aside the fact that we should tax the rich more anyways, if we raised taxes on them every time we sent Americans off to fight, every time Congress authorized military force, every time we declared war...
I think we'd have a lot fewer wars.
I went to war. I know who goes off to fight, and it ain’t the rich. It’s time to make them foot the bill.
[**What do you think? If you’re with me on this, sign this petition and tell Congress to raise taxes on the rich when we go to war.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/pet_em_251218_rich_war_tax/?refcode=em251217-1-120&akid=4049%2E734936%2EytYgBf)
[SIGN ON](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/pet_em_251218_rich_war_tax/?source=em251217-1-120&akid=4049%2E734936%2EytYgBf)
Semper Fi,
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=3&akid=4049%2E734936%2EytYgBf). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4049%2E734936%2EytYgBf). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=4049_734936_ytYgBf&akid=4049%2E734936%2EytYgBf)

name: Saikat
subject: We can ban congressional stock trading NOW, but we need your help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SAIKAT FOR CONGRESS
body:
There is a discharge petition to force a vote on banning congressional stock trading in Congress.

| | | | | |
---
| | | | | |

Friends –

TLDR: There is a discharge petition to force a vote on banning congressional stock trading in Congress TODAY. Join a citizen lobbying group to get your member of Congress to sign this discharge petition – and ban congressional stock trading for good!
---
| [Force the vote »](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=0f1653e51f&e=bf17056ae8)
---
| |
Back in April, I made [**a video**](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=3783930371&e=bf17056ae8) explaining exactly how Democrats could use a “discharge petition” to ban members of Congress from trading stocks.
---
| [Watch now »](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=15e07e9391&e=bf17056ae8)
---
| |
Well, Republicans beat them to it, but this is still a great opportunity to fix corruption in Congress and to hold Republicans (and Democrats!) who are afraid to back the ban accountable.
I’m going to explain this opportunity, but first, [**click here to sign up to help get this ban passed!**](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=fbbb295909&e=bf17056ae8)
Discharge petitions are a way to force votes on bills where there is bipartisan support, but when the leadership does not want to present the bill for a vote because they are covering for their members and/or big donors. It’s the exact maneuver that Ro Khanna and Tom Massie used to force a vote to release the Epstein Files. And we know that 86% of voters support a ban on congressional stock trading – so it’s the exact kind of issue to force a vote on by filing a discharge petition.
I have been promising to file a discharge petition to force a vote on a congressional stock trading ban when elected in 2026. But our chance is here already: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna – a Republican from Florida – has filed a discharge petition for banning congressional stock trading – and it already has 74 members of Congress signed on, including 15 Republican members!
Now, all we have to do is get 144 more members of Congress to sign up, and that’s where you come in! Members of Congress constantly get calls from corporate lobbyists pushing them to sign on to certain bills – but they rarely hear from groups of citizens lobbying them to sign on to bills. And when they do, it actually works! I saw this up close in the halls of Congress when I served as AOC’s first chief of staff.
You can help this discharge petition take effect by signing up today for a citizen lobbying group!
---
| [Sign up now »](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=6dee912cd2&e=bf17056ae8)
---
| |

A few months ago, [I called on all of you to sign up](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=2f3a8ce87e&e=bf17056ae8) for a citizen lobbying group to pass a congressional stock trading ban, and I said I’d follow up once we actually have a discharge petition for members of Congress to sign on to. Well, that time is now! So it’s time to get rolling. Use the button below to sign up for a citizen lobbying group and we’ll be in touch with next steps!
---
| [Take action »](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=cad1796e2e&e=bf17056ae8)
---
| |

Let’s get this done!
Best,Saikat
P.S. Who wants to go with me to lobby our Representative for San Francisco, none other than Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi?
[Sign up to be a citizen lobbyist with me.](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=92f1b03a42&e=bf17056ae8)

---
|
---
| | | | | | Saikat Chakrabarti was Bernie’s Tech Director, AOC’s first chief of staff, founded Justice Democrats, and helped bring the Green New Deal to life. He’s running for Congress to build a San Francisco that works for everyone—teachers, immigrants, service workers, and everyone else who makes this city the best in the world.
If you believe San Franciscans deserve affordable housing, universal healthcare, climate resilience, and public power: [volunteer](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=bcc2040473&e=bf17056ae8) with us and learn more about our campaign on our [website](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=0828be1576&e=bf17056ae8).
Email is a critical way we stay in touch with our grassroots team, but if you’d prefer to stop receiving emails, [click here to unsubscribe](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=95823b04c2&t=b&e=bf17056ae8&c=9715701069).
---
| | | | |
PAID FOR BY SAIKAT FOR CONGRESS
---
|
---

Members of Congress constantly get calls from corporate lobbyists pushing them to sign on to certain bills – but they rarely hear from groups of citizens lobbying them to sign on to bills. And when they do, it actually works! I saw this up close in the halls of Congress when I served as AOC’s first chief of staff. You can help this discharge petition take effect by signing up today for a citizen lobbying group! | | | A few months ago, for a citizen lobbying group to pass a congressional stock trading ban, and I said I’d follow up once we actually have a discharge petition for members of Congress to sign on to. Well, that time is now! So it’s time to get rolling. Use the button below to sign up for a citizen lobbying group and we’ll be in touch with next steps! | | | Let’s get this done! Best,Saikat P.S. Who wants to go with me to lobby our Representative for San Francisco, none other than Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi? | | | | | | | Saikat Chakrabarti was Bernie’s Tech Director, AOC’s first chief of staff, founded Justice Democrats, and helped bring the Green New Deal to life. He’s running for Congress to build a San Francisco that works for everyone—teachers, immigrants, service workers, and everyone else who makes this city the best in the world. If you believe San Franciscans deserve affordable housing, universal healthcare, climate resilience, and public power: with us and learn more about our campaign on our . Email is a critical way we stay in touch with our grassroots team, but if you’d prefer to stop receiving emails, . | | | | | PAID FOR BY SAIKAT FOR CONGRESS |
