name: Citizens Impeachment
subject: The Constitution Is Under Attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
Why I joined Citizens’ Impeachment - and why silence is not an option

| [|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/Omitsrp7la6yw2Ny6AEoTw~~/AAUS1hA~/4dLW-v5Dw_7wD8YoR5PI3qW5dztzSl_-AYgfExe43RuR7Jz0uWfbGJJOF02U4BVNKyp9StXxNAGtj8EZVAeSRJ3YzK7VYQzAHz0sFrj0I2hpX3btwFi1ccSIDaSw6ndx)
| | ******Friend,** I joined [**Citizens’ Impeachment**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/LoxZz0VpmbEmDoA1W5NO5g~~/AAUS1hA~/7V8Y1poYusdH42ZUe93z2go-iNQB15oUJ95nI6blKdKVr0SjmXFSCQZ0PskSZuYtodNpJqlwB9A5VLgtbgP0Dz6fiu3RRSUOxAZdFZgecc7dOjNvpVaxM9TJ0m6rRrwa) because **the Constitution is not self-enforcing**. Democracy does not survive on autopilot. It survives only when people are willing to defend it. Citizens’ Impeachment has one clear mission - **to impeach, convict, and remove Donald Trump from office** for violations of his oath and conduct fundamentally incompatible with a free republic. This effort is grounded in formal **Articles of Impeachment** , including **Article I - Tyranny** and **Article II - Treason**. **[HELP US IMPEACH. CONVICT. REMOVE!](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/flx9QBsk9dzH9r6siMedEw~~/AAUS1hA~/Jg3_tZpVpYA9c-__MpFPOKqeBAQoJvMi5aCPvYTW-378Zi84AYqbFjCccQJODpjDs4lpJXEPmhStAApn0vWC4bBpvqQjNULQVhpt_pF6ofTpm1mU_CfwhAofhyNLYjP5G5LAYiFC5GGnzTz_0c589UtCvvdn6eZ_RwKVQlmfWxw~)** **Article I** documents a sustained attempt to place personal power above the Constitution - attacking free and fair elections, intimidating political opponents, undermining the courts, threatening Congress, violating civil liberties, and rejecting the separation of powers that protects the American people from authoritarian rule. **Article II** addresses something even more grave - **the deliberate use of military and federal power against the American people themselves**. It details how Trump and his Secretary of Defense declared a so-called “war from within,” treating American cities, political opposition, and lawful protest as enemies of the state. That includes **illegal federalization of the National Guard over governors’ objections** , defiance of court orders, threats against states, and efforts to turn the military against civilians - **actions the Constitution explicitly defines as levying war against the United States**. These are not policy disagreements.
**They are constitutional red lines.** Yet many elected **Democratic leaders now claim Trump has committed no impeachable offenses in his second term**. That refusal to act is exactly why we need **a new Congress and a new generation of leadership** \- Democrats who will confront fascism instead of normalizing it. Impeachment is not partisan. **It is the constitutional remedy the Framers gave us** to stop tyranny and treason before they become permanent. Refusing to use it is not unity - **it is abdication**. Citizens’ Impeachment is a **grassroots, nonpartisan movement** grounded in a simple truth - **no president, no official, and no oligarch is above the law**. As a candidate for Congress, I am making this commitment publicly -
**If elected, I will introduce Articles of Impeachment, uphold the rule of law, and work to remove Donald Trump from office and bar him from holding power again.** This is not left versus right.
**It is democracy versus authoritarianism.**
**The Constitution versus unchecked power.** **Accountability is not optional. It is the foundation of a free society.** **[Chip in now to defend democracy, reject silence and normalize accountability in Washington.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/flx9QBsk9dzH9r6siMedEw~~/AAUS1hA~/Jg3_tZpVpYA9c-__MpFPOKqeBAQoJvMi5aCPvYTW-378Zi84AYqbFjCccQJODpjDs4lpJXEPmhStAApn0vWC4bBpvqQjNULQVhpt_pF6ofTpm1mU_CfwhAofhyNLYjP5G5LAYiFC5GGnzTz_0c589UtCvvdn6eZ_RwKVQlmfWxw~)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | [Chip in $10 now >>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/XXydHoCdiwyWAS1Yv0hiQQ~~/AAUS1hA~/4_-cqx8uI35Aqt6aQ5jE7VOFYHmWkWdEoiG0U4PX8MT9GaksaNdC9zmr04YWAGQweIuCu7CvOjFMehIv8FcX3w_nIEdGcCBhKngJM273agS8isWXUEaUCwTMjFJpdzVphZ3YLqH3yEdN_IyPk-jb4xgxeJ6pqu8fINsx2syMGdgFMl1KjI_q_v75pNWx70QP) | [Chip in $25 now >>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/nF9FPrgAqzvNS3BCv9Oi1A~~/AAUS1hA~/4_-cqx8uI35Aqt6aQ5jE7VOFYHmWkWdEoiG0U4PX8MT9GaksaNdC9zmr04YWAGQweIuCu7CvOjFMehIv8FcX3w_nIEdGcCBhKngJM273agQM11Fi-LgiQQzudYbccJmzQL3k85PETKVseEB1DStIxK6WVYF14wi26pjFPrCr1w6jhtg9kXJG0HzQ8qxTEfk-)

Our October listening tour took us across our state, from Pueblo to Denver to Durango. **Now, in the new year, we’re back on the road to continue the conversation with a town hall tour!** **[This Fight for Colorado Town Hall Tour will include 12 and counting dedicated opportunities to discover how we can listen, learn, and lead together. Will I see you at one of our events?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121541698/589787614/897267436?refcode=ea.2308524e-39dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.2308524e-39dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzA4NTI0ZS0zOWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J6xkfpJz5V7ZrB8hr-ZTBP0m3J5vbUkcG46K_k6ZQCs=&emci=de8e985e-91db-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=2308524e-39dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=51844520)** | | [FIND MY CLOSEST TOUR STOP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121541699/589787615/897267436?refcode=ea.2308524e-39dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.2308524e-39dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzA4NTI0ZS0zOWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J6xkfpJz5V7ZrB8hr-ZTBP0m3J5vbUkcG46K_k6ZQCs=&emci=de8e985e-91db-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=2308524e-39dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=51844520)

**From the start, this campaign has been about listening and delivering for Coloradans.** YOUR input shaped our 100+ page policy plan, The Colorado Blueprint.
We continue to seek your input about the leadership Colorado needs. That’s why, on this tour, we want to talk with you about _everything:_ building more housing Coloradans can afford, supporting our public schools, defending our democratic republic, protecting our freedoms, developing our workforce, building strong futures for our kids, and anything else that’s top of mind for you.
**[You are the heart of this people-powered movement — we will win in June with you as a part of it. So, will you bring a friend and join me at a town hall near you this winter? 👇](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121541700/589787616/897267436?refcode=ea.2308524e-39dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ms=ea.2308524e-39dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzA4NTI0ZS0zOWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J6xkfpJz5V7ZrB8hr-ZTBP0m3J5vbUkcG46K_k6ZQCs=&emci=de8e985e-91db-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=2308524e-39dc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=51844520)**

clean_body: Your input is what this campaign is all about. Remember our Fight for Colorado tour, friends? Our October listening tour took us across our state, from Pueblo to Denver to Durango. Now, in the new year, we’re back on the road to continue the conversation with a town hall tour! | | From the start, this campaign has been about listening and delivering for Coloradans. YOUR input shaped our 100+ page policy plan, The Colorado Blueprint. We continue to seek your input about the leadership Colorado needs. That’s why, on this tour, we want to talk with you about everything: building more housing Coloradans can afford, supporting our public schools, defending our democratic republic, protecting our freedoms, developing our workforce, building strong futures for our kids, and anything else that’s top of mind for you. With gratitude, Phil | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add teamphil@philforcolorado.com to your address book. This campaign is powered by grassroots donations. name: Alanna Smith
subject: Strong forests start with strong communities
body:
https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf]
Peter,
When we talk about building resilience across the redwood range, we’re not just talking about trees. We’re talking about people—the communities, partners, and traditions that sustain these forests for generations.
INVEST IN REDWOOD RESILIENCE TODAY [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf]
Your matched gift [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf] to the Redwood Resilience Fund helps Save the Redwoods League:
* Partner with tribes in the Sierra Nevada , who are reviving burning practices that restore natural balance to the sequoia groves.
* Build community resilience through education programs that bring thousands of young people to the redwood forests each year and offer transportation for underrepresented community groups who might otherwise never experience these forests.
* Create and enhance parks across California. Since its founding, Save the Redwoods has helped create 68 parks across California. Today, we’re actively supporting and enhancing these spectacular places for the future.
I was first drawn to join Save the Redwoods because of my passion for creating spaces and opportunities for communities to feel connected to the outdoors and overcome legacies of exclusion. That’s why I’m so excited about the work we’re undertaking right now, including building an outdoor classroom in Alder Creek and continuing to grow our Redwood Rides program, which provides free field trips that meaningfully connect students to the forest.
If you’ve never given before, this is the perfect moment to begin. Your first gift will welcome people to the redwood forests and help more communities explore nature.Will you make a matched gift to the Redwood Resilience Fund today? Together, we can build a future where forests and communities flourish. [https://secure.savetheredwoods.org/a/donate-rrf]
When you give to the Redwood Resilience Fund, you’re not only building more resilient forests, you’re building more resilient communities.
Photo of Alanna Smith [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/STRWL/STRWL/1/89574/images/Alanna%20Smith%201.png] With gratitude,

name: Cate (Team Walz)
subject: Keeping MAGA out of MN
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
# [](https://act.timwalz.com/go/195?refcode=em20251218-309&t=1&akid=309%2E34582%2EEqGLMO)
Peter, Cate from Team Walz here!
I’m reaching out because December is a make-or-break moment for our campaign.
At the end of this month, we’ll hit our only public reporting deadline of the year — the first time anyone will see our fundraising numbers since we launched our campaign.
Those numbers won’t just sit on a spreadsheet. They’ll shape the media narrative, influence who jumps into this race, and signal whether Team Walz has the momentum to win.
Our opponents will be looking for any sign of weakness. The only way to deny them that opportunity is to hit our end-of-year fundraising goal.
With extremist candidates lining up to challenge Governor Walz, this deadline couldn’t be more important. Do we want someone like Mike Lindell running Minnesota? Absolutely not.
**That’s why we need everyone who believes in this campaign to step up before the deadline. So let’s roll up our sleeves and get to work.**
**[Peter, will you chip in $5 today and make sure that we’re able to hit our end-of-year fundraising goal and keep MAGA extremism out of Minnesota?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251218.YuVuXb&amount=5&refcode=em20251218-309&t=2&akid=309%2E34582%2EEqGLMO)**

I’m so happy to have you as a part of this team,
Cate Paterson
Finance Director
Walz for Governor

name: Haley Stevens
subject: The cost of chaos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Trump's tariffs are trying to break Michigan manufacturing

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYWxleWZvcm1pLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.M1-d0s2_LsgJ1vGT1Ww08LcnFdajGIbVX7ZWRDn70pc?) for more
---
# [The cost of chaos](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=181911687&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgxOTExNjg3LCJpYXQiOjE3NjYwODA4NzQsImV4cCI6MTc2ODY3Mjg3NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.0UP-iw8qs5VK5CaNxEe0Dw4lp8AyJgwu-K0nM94Qjn4)
### Trump's tariffs are trying to break Michigan manufacturing
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| Dec 18
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack..DwArAUxcQwxRX8jRwL6BD4aincWeckli-psQvLr-F98?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/the-cost-of-chaos?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Earlier this month, _The Wall Street Journal_ reported that **U.S. manufacturing has shrunk for the ninth straight month.**
_Nine months._ That's not a small blip. That's a huge warning sign.
Leaders across the country, regardless of political party, should be alarmed.
It's no secret what's driving it:**Trump 's chaotic tariffs.** Specifically, reckless tariffs put in place by Donald Trump continue to weigh down American manufacturing - raising prices, upending supply chains, and undermining the very industries that are the backbone of Michigan's economy.
I'm a no-nonsense gal, so I'm going to be direct: **Trump 's chaotic trade policies are hurting Michigan.**
This isn't a theory. It's not an overly dramatic statement. It's what I'm seeing and hearing every day when I talk to manufacturers, suppliers, and trade workers across Michigan.
Whether I'm in a union hall in Macomb County or visiting a parts plant in Grand Rapids, the message is the same: **Costs are up, demand is shaky, and our country 's competitive edge is being chipped away.**
The Trump tariffs were billed as a strategy to protect American jobs. But here's what they've actually done:
* Raised the cost of raw materials
* Made it harder to compete globally
* Stifled innovation and growth in the very places we need them most
* Created a wave of instability that has manufacturers feeling anxious about the future

Now, some folks in Washington may shrug and tell you Trump's tariffs are worth it because American manufacturing is past its prime. They'll say Michigan can't compete.
To that I say: _Try us._
**I know this state. I was born and raised here. I know the Michigan way. When we 're up against the wall, we fight back.**
When I was working on the auto rescue in 2009, and the country was in crisis, Michigan didn't give up - **we got to work**. Our team helped save 200,000 Michigan jobs and brought the industry back from the brink. All because our workers are the best in the world.
We are not a state that folds in the face of a challenge. We are a state built by working people. Builders. Makers. Innovators. And when we have leaders who believe in us and fight for us, we rise.
But Michigan can't thrive if the administration is making shoot-from-the-hip, change-by-the-minute decisions on tariffs that raise prices on working people. That's not leadership; that's chaos.
And I won't stand by while Washington politics makes life harder for Michigan families.
**Our manufacturing future is worth fighting for.**
That means investing in workforce training and apprenticeships. It means securing the supply chains that keep our factories running. And it means having leaders in the Senate who understand the nuances of manufacturing - the grit, skill, and pride it takes to build something with your own two hands.
That's why I'm running for Senate - to be that champion.
**I 'm not in this race for a viral moment. I'm in it for the community I love. For the people who make things.** The Michiganders who work the line, fix the machines, and train the next generation with calloused hands and open hearts.
Michigan made me who I am. And I will never stop fighting for it.
If you're in a position to chip in a few dollars to support this campaign and help me take this fight to the Senate, I'd be grateful. **Every donation helps us reach more voters, push back against Trump 's chaos, and build a future for American manufacturing.**
[Donate](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9f233577-9273-4ab6-9a69-c92f14b9c419?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
We've got a long road ahead. But this is Michigan. We don't back down from a challenge.
**We build. We fight. We never give up.**
With grit,
Haley
* * *

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in today?
[Donate](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9f233577-9273-4ab6-9a69-c92f14b9c419?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.

---
| | | [Restack](https://substack..DwArAUxcQwxRX8jRwL6BD4aincWeckli-psQvLr-F98?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---

(C) 2025 Haley for MI
33717 Woodward Ave #539, Birmingham, MI 48009
[Unsubscribe](https://substack..eqnUuLvtxgPt9BcEOKv5FjxzOhPLPOgjCuHyOikydME?)
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/59b4747f-68ba-40bf-a84d-5eed9cea2e64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack..5ClcjjSzxkoESliS-76yhI95SmiWk2F8eGtnpDrmCKY?)

name: Patriot Cigars
subject: NEW PATRIOT PACK with ACCESSORIES
body:
** NEW PATRIOT PACK
------------------------------------------------------------
INCLUDES: TRAVEL CASE, CUTTER & CIGARS!

The Patriot Pack — Smoke for the Bold and the Free

Stand tall and light up freedom with The Patriot Pack from Patriot Cigar Company — a powerful lineup built for true American patriots. Featuring The “Pledge” Premium Leather 3-Cigar Travel Case, the Old Glory Cigar Cutter, and three powerhouse blends — TNT, MOAB, and Sidewinder — this set is your all-American arsenal of premium, hand-rolled cigars. Crafted for quality. Fueled by liberty. Made for those who never back down.
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=1cbf69a909&e=fbf55fa623

**
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Patriot Pack
A Bold Salute to Liberty
------------------------------------------------------------

Raise your colors high — the Patriot Pack from Patriot Cigar Company is the ultimate tribute to freedom, made for those who stand proud. This isn’t just a cigar set; it’s a declaration, a statement, and a smoke-filled salute to the red, white, and blue.

** Included Inside the Patriot Pack
------------------------------------------------------------

**
“The Pledge” Premium Leather 3-Cigar Travel Case
------------------------------------------------------------

Carry your cigars in patriotic style. This rugged yet elegant case is crafted in premium printed leather with the pledge of allegiance, built to safeguard your Patriot Cigars while projecting staunch American pride. Designed for travel, with room for three cigars up to a 60-ring size and a secure closure, it’s more than storage—it’s armor for your freedom smoke.

** Old Glory Cigar Cutter
------------------------------------------------------------

No patriot’s toolkit is complete without a sharp edge. The Old Glory Cigar Cutter is a dual-blade instrument worthy of the name. It slices clean and precise, honoring the flag with every snip (and making sure your draw is perfect).
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Finest Blends Under the Flag
------------------------------------------------------------

** TNT
------------------------------------------------------------

Explosive in flavor and bold in character, TNT is a powerhouse medium to full blend that commands your attention. From first light to the last ember, it burns with authority.

** MOAB (Mother of All Bombs)
------------------------------------------------------------

MOAB delivers a full-bodied punch, a maduro cigar that lives up to its name. Deep, rich, and intense — this is not for the faint of heart but for the true patriot who demands maximum firepower in flavor.

** Sidewinder
------------------------------------------------------------

Sleek, swift, and sly — the Sidewinder rounds out the pack with a medium blend that strikes with finesse. Balanced, bold, and full of character, it’s the curveball every patriotic smoker needs.

The Patriot Pack doesn’t stop there, you’ll also get a Patriot-branded beverage koozie, coaster, sticker, and patch—because every smoke session deserves a touch of American pride.
------------------------------------------------------------

** Why the Patriot Pack Matters
------------------------------------------------------------

This is not merely a sampler or gift set. The Patriot Pack is your on-demand arsenal of American spirit and premium craftsmanship. It’s a perfect companion for travel, a striking gift for fellow flag-bearers, or your own daily reminder that freedom is worth celebrating — one premium puff at a time.

Light up The Patriot Pack. Puff with pride. And let the smoke carry your pledge to liberty.

** Uncompromising Quality, Made for Patriots
------------------------------------------------------------

At Patriot Cigar Company, every cigar is handcrafted in Estelí, Nicaragua, using premium-aged tobacco (aged a minimum of three years). Our blends were born from the desire to bring together the love of premium smokes and the love of our country, forging a brand built on passion and pride.

** NEW PREMIUM
8 CIGAR SAMPLER PACK
------------------------------------------------------------
USE PROMO CODE: EAGLE FOR 20% OFF CIGARS
Experience true American freedom with 8 bold, premium cigars—including the gold-wrapped MOGUL and exclusive Operation Never Tell—only available in the Patriot Cigar Company Premium Sampler Pack.

Cigars Included

1xMOAB
1xTNT
1xMARK48
1xHellfire
1xSidewinder
1xSidewinder Maduro
1x24K Gold Wrapped Mogul
1xLimited Release Unbanded Operation Never Tell

https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=d2044cee87&e=fbf55fa623
https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=b828c682aa&e=fbf55fa623

For the true American cigar patriot, this is the ultimate way to experience the full power, pride, and craftsmanship behind Patriot Cigar Company. The Premium Sampler Pack delivers 8 premium cigars that represent the heart and soul of our lineup—crafted for those who believe in freedom, hard work, and savoring every damn moment.

You’ll receive all 6 flagship blends that built our reputation for bold flavor and uncompromising quality, plus two standouts that make this sampler truly elite: the 24Kt Gold-Wrapped MOGUL, a cigar that radiates luxury and dominance with every draw, and the Limited Release Operation Never Tell—a 5.5×50 Maduro Robusto shrouded in mystery. We’re not revealing the tobaccos inside, but trust us—it’s smooth, powerful, and absolutely unforgettable. Operation Never Tell is exclusive to this pack, and once these are gone, they’re gone.

The Premium Sampler Pack doesn’t stop there. Alongside your 8 cigars, you’ll get a Patriot-branded beverage koozie, coaster, sticker, and patch—because every smoke session deserves a touch of American pride.

8 Cigars. 1 Mission. 100% Patriot.
Light up, lean back, and let freedom burn.
NEW CIGAR LIMITED RELEASE
"OPERATION NEVER TELL"

The Unbanded Limited Release Operation Never Tell—a 5.5×50 Maduro Robusto shrouded in mystery. We’re not revealing the tobaccos inside, but trust us—it’s smooth, powerful, and absolutely unforgettable. Operation Never Tell is exclusive to the Premium Sampler Pack available at MYPATRIOTCIGARS.COM (https://mypatriotcigars.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3ea77f33fc36dd7515163e71c&id=a2e916218b&e=fbf55fa623) , and once these are gone, they’re gone.

Don't miss this cigar!

NEW CIGAR ACCESSORIES!

clean_body: NEW PATRIOT PACK INCLUDES: TRAVEL CASE, CUTTER & CIGARS! The Patriot Pack — Smoke for the Bold and the Free Stand tall and light up freedom with The Patriot Pack from Patriot Cigar Company — a powerful lineup built for true American patriots. Featuring The “Pledge” Premium Leather 3-Cigar Travel Case, the Old Glory Cigar Cutter, and three powerhouse blends — TNT, MOAB, and Sidewinder — this set is your all-American arsenal of premium, hand-rolled cigars. Crafted for quality. Fueled by liberty. Made for those who never back down. The Patriot Pack A Bold Salute to Liberty Raise your colors high — the Patriot Pack from Patriot Cigar Company is the ultimate tribute to freedom, made for those who stand proud. This isn’t just a cigar set; it’s a declaration, a statement, and a smoke-filled salute to the red, white, and blue. Included Inside the Patriot Pack “The Pledge” Premium Leather 3-Cigar Travel Case Carry your cigars in patriotic style. This rugged yet elegant case is crafted in premium printed leather with the pledge of allegiance, built to safeguard your Patriot Cigars while projecting staunch American pride. Designed for travel, with room for three cigars up to a 60-ring size and a secure closure, it’s more than storage—it’s armor for your freedom smoke. Old Glory Cigar Cutter No patriot’s toolkit is complete without a sharp edge. The Old Glory Cigar Cutter is a dual-blade instrument worthy of the name. It slices clean and precise, honoring the flag with every snip (and making sure your draw is perfect). The Finest Blends Under the Flag TNT Explosive in flavor and bold in character, TNT is a powerhouse medium to full blend that commands your attention. From first light to the last ember, it burns with authority. MOAB (Mother of All Bombs) MOAB delivers a full-bodied punch, a maduro cigar that lives up to its name. Deep, rich, and intense — this is not for the faint of heart but for the true patriot who demands maximum firepower in flavor. Sidewinder Sleek, swift, and sly — the Sidewinder rounds out the pack with a medium blend that strikes with finesse. Balanced, bold, and full of character, it’s the curveball every patriotic smoker needs. The Patriot Pack doesn’t stop there, you’ll also get a Patriot-branded beverage koozie, coaster, sticker, and patch—because every smoke session deserves a touch of American pride. Why the Patriot Pack Matters This is not merely a sampler or gift set. The Patriot Pack is your on-demand arsenal of American spirit and premium craftsmanship. It’s a perfect companion for travel, a striking gift for fellow flag-bearers, or your own daily reminder that freedom is worth celebrating — one premium puff at a time. Light up The Patriot Pack. Puff with pride. And let the smoke carry your pledge to liberty. Uncompromising Quality, Made for Patriots At Patriot Cigar Company, every cigar is handcrafted in Estelí, Nicaragua, using premium-aged tobacco (aged a minimum of three years). Our blends were born from the desire to bring together the love of premium smokes and the love of our country, forging a brand built on passion and pride. NEW PREMIUM 8 CIGAR SAMPLER PACK USE PROMO CODE: EAGLE FOR 20% OFF CIGARS Experience true American freedom with 8 bold, premium cigars—including the gold-wrapped MOGUL and exclusive Operation Never Tell—only available in the Patriot Cigar Company Premium Sampler Pack. Cigars Included 1xMOAB 1xTNT 1xMARK48 1xHellfire 1xSidewinder 1xSidewinder Maduro 1x24K Gold Wrapped Mogul 1xLimited Release Unbanded Operation Never Tell For the true American cigar patriot, this is the ultimate way to experience the full power, pride, and craftsmanship behind Patriot Cigar Company. The Premium Sampler Pack delivers 8 premium cigars that represent the heart and soul of our lineup—crafted for those who believe in freedom, hard work, and savoring every damn moment. You’ll receive all 6 flagship blends that built our reputation for bold flavor and uncompromising quality, plus two standouts that make this sampler truly elite: the 24Kt Gold-Wrapped MOGUL, a cigar that radiates luxury and dominance with every draw, and the Limited Release Operation Never Tell—a 5.5×50 Maduro Robusto shrouded in mystery. We’re not revealing the tobaccos inside, but trust us—it’s smooth, powerful, and absolutely unforgettable. Operation Never Tell is exclusive to this pack, and once these are gone, they’re gone. The Premium Sampler Pack doesn’t stop there. Alongside your 8 cigars, you’ll get a Patriot-branded beverage koozie, coaster, sticker, and patch—because every smoke session deserves a touch of American pride. 8 Cigars. 1 Mission. 100% Patriot. Light up, lean back, and let freedom burn. NEW CIGAR LIMITED RELEASE "OPERATION NEVER TELL" The Unbanded Limited Release Operation Never Tell—a 5.5×50 Maduro Robusto shrouded in mystery. We’re not revealing the tobaccos inside, but trust us—it’s smooth, powerful, and absolutely unforgettable. Operation Never Tell is exclusive to the Premium Sampler Pack available at MYPATRIOTCIGARS.COM () , and once these are gone, they’re gone. Don't miss this cigar! NEW CIGAR ACCESSORIES! subject: We can not let the ACA tax credits expire

body:
Ensuring access to high-quality, affordable health care is essential for people in Northwest Washington and across the country.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121543077/589792023/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzM2NTU2OS0zYmRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x2UL3qcQvbFEip7NrxPwjN-QIScevK_-F-JOxLZY_ec=&emci=cd05a881-83db-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=63365569-3bdc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9494239)

| | Ensuring access to high-quality, affordable health care is essential for people in Northwest Washington and across the country. The Affordable Care Act (ACA) has helped thousands of families in Washington. The law is an important step toward shifting the focus of health care from volume to value, improving the quality of care instead of just growing the quantity of care. Washington is a nationwide leader in expanding people's access to health care. The ACA tax credits are set to expire at the end of the year, and these credits are critical to families in Northwest Washington: **26,000 people I represent depend on these critical ACA tax credits to afford medical care.** If Republicans in Congress allow ACA tax credits to expire, 80,000 people in Washington will be forced to go without health care. **More uninsured people means higher health care costs for everyone and sicker family members, friends, and neighbors**. Because the Chaos Caucus is refusing to get to work, too many hardworking people are facing the reality of choosing between going to the doctor, paying rent, and feeding their kids. I will keep working alongside House Democrats to extend the ACA tax credits and make health care accessible and affordable. More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---
Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

[ ](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=03154c454d5f4d65ab8a9f747ec56b74&_e=AvC-hZFL4BulG1rK7Ff9zK1QzbzA_Ewv20RO01h8M9fT7CbnAjrnPML2__RxKbj_ZcLX-Yf-mhWoCHGJD_pWL-xkn4JjBL9FYG8TAWG6YbGrS-gSrNOcrkVxdePmKIku_3r4zycWGLoSYd2Z4dmIv0OQu8_8p7gFonKx2Yy9nLCOwzbIv4GPC3SLcCWIdkpy4iyweiBtCnxbwNTO3QZT27nhF2vyxOfC0Q36zFz8oT-tJBsnswRkAt2MDCYSrHcSYruUdxug25K1merIzACIFjXKFnmn896wih3idxWTQsNQxerWLC0NGTHA5Ss0kqNh_JcmeYjK-ATCq9DIqQdkojh1BlHY-sKZeYEX4LkZwhGl_9M5gHZ7xnqFGMCYac6OLVvtxvI70lthwQAeBNpLdpaCyu_kZOUrCqYNRYPNK1Nw1lxQCLGosPiaaxRFVVn2sYIglVba_Tpb7epBZpaDWCpTg9M0qlcP58fzzZ5FF-Lc0ww_OOiSLdEDYfHFr__Dd3hSN1ifDJXVI1w4a-dsKYC00R464ygfh73nMRGAs1TBGq6bWQ7P0FCSx-tBBNGnjA6CD7DIOEvOqz8apce8Yg%3D%3D)
This wasn’t a stunt or a launch demo.

No crowd. No narration. Just the Cybertruck in motion — completely on its own.

What happened during this unscripted moment caught everyone off guard.

The cameras kept rolling.

The crew stayed silent.

And the vehicle did something that changed how we think about what’s next.

People keep replaying the clip — not for the drama, but for the realization:_It’s ready._

[Watch the full video now](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=03154c454d5f4d65ab8a9f747ec56b74&_e=AvC-hZFL4BulG1rK7Ff9zK1QzbzA_Ewv20RO01h8M9fT7CbnAjrnPML2__RxKbj_ZcLX-Yf-mhWoCHGJD_pWL-xkn4JjBL9FYG8TAWG6YbGrS-gSrNOcrkVxdePmKIku_3r4zycWGLoSYd2Z4dmIv0OQu8_8p7gFonKx2Yy9nLCOwzbIv4GPC3SLcCWIdkpyRRI2oiSnf3_WjPCuKH2iaA9O5IHPk5rgaZdd18rqr5-FBFIgiXGYW9bfxHmNxsbiKr1HgQg36SWBy6oBaVR-HqjvzoLODpz9ffNByiOPI55wIKg6QwYSqxUKCZ1dcUG0rV5GyTTKIM_0kJ1Q2kSYzbZnus9-WZtHDek8tvsJhGIbJTJE6OBsj8DZRILsxzghy6gM3ZNmfJI1XZaXk38M-zinkAK7UQL5xX3LddIZAjSdM9-AzYfc3_4sJFWFgzaKZIW9J-R7OIleGY8vOfy4pwTHxxSkch_qWfefOBgFGb0vN-_wZwwsxtE3-ff5MsfHEEEjXz3VxcDIHEJ2q9NAGTLdkKPSHUgzELaEFB88XQIsuwI3NCugCbp7TF65tQvvcoCsj5QS7OXHqXp6z5AYbg%3D%3D)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

body:
This requires your immediate attention. | Attn: Fellow American,

_This is a matter of national security._

name: No Kings via Our Revolution
subject: No Kings is BACK
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34881?t=1011&refcode=email-20251218_v&akid=9988%2E5885482%2EQhkK3_ ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Big News: the next massive No Kings event is being planned!

As Trump and his oligarchs tighten their grip on our democracy, we are
living through a turning point. Trump's approval ratings are sinking, and
with every protest and every person speaking out, our movement grows
stronger. But now, more than ever, we HAVE to keep going.

In June, 5 million joined arms at 2,100 No Kings actions. Then in October,
we shattered records: 7 million people turned out in 2,700 cities – one of
the largest single-day demonstrations in U.S. history.

Now, the No Kings coalition has announced a third massive Day of Action
early next year. And this time, the stakes are even higher. Which is why
Our Revolution is rapidly preparing thousands of grassroots volunteers to
host, lead, and join peaceful mass protests to show the power of our
opposition to Trump — we will NOT be silenced and he will not get away
with these attacks.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34881?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20251218nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9988%2E5885482%2EQhkK3_ ]Will you rush a donation now to help Our Revolution power the next No
Kings Day to SHATTER records and get as many people into the streets as
possible?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34881?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20251218nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9988%2E5885482%2EQhkK3_ ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34881?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20251218nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9988%2E5885482%2EQhkK3_ ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34881?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20251218nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9988%2E5885482%2EQhkK3_ ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34881?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20251218nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9988%2E5885482%2EQhkK3_ ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34881?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20251218nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9988%2E5885482%2EQhkK3_ ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34881?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20251218nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9988%2E5885482%2EQhkK3_ ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34882?source=email-20251218&t=1060&akid=9988%2E5885482%2EQhkK3_ ]Headline: Photo of No Kings protest

Last October, together we turned out 7 million people because of the
steadfast commitment of this movement. But research shows that to turn the
tide against authoritarians, we need 3.5% of America to mobilize. That’s
11 million people showing up until we win.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34882?source=email-20251218&t=1061&akid=9988%2E5885482%2EQhkK3_ ]Headline: It may only take 3.5% of the population to topple a dictator
- with civil resistance

That means we’re just 4 million short of the “3.5% rule”. But to reach
that at the next No Kings Day it will take months of patient, steady
organizing. We need to recruit activists in towns that have never marched
before, train first-time organizers, print thousands of signs, and turn
out the grassroots in record shattering numbers.

You know what we’re up against: Authoritarians, billionaire donors,
cynical pundits who hope we get tired and go home. But if 7 million people
showed up in October, we KNOW we can go even bigger. We just need the
resources to take the fight to every corner of this country.

Our Revolution’s job is clear but urgent: turn out our movement, and make
sure every organizer and every protester gets the resources, training, and
support they need.

That means providing support for local leaders – including legal guidance,
rapid-response tech, and posters and flyers. It means turning out every
last voice willing to say “no” to Trump’s cruelty and corruption. But we
can’t do it without your help.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34881?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20251218nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9988%2E5885482%2EQhkK3_ ]Will you donate right now so we can recruit, train, and support the
grassroots so that together we can turn out 4 MILLION more people for the
third No Kings Day? Together let’s make this the biggest day of nonviolent
resistance America has ever seen.

This is our moment. Let’s make history – again.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

establishment by committing to be a 2025 Movement Builder
with a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22228?t=1009&akid=9988%2E5885482%2EQhkK3_ ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22266?t=1010&akid=9988%2E5885482%2EQhkK3_ ]GIVE ONCE

name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: Trump’s unhinged rant about me on Truth Social
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend, my faith is the foundation upon which I have built my life. It guides my service to my community and my country.
That’s why, when I went on Meet the Press this past weekend, I spoke about how scripture could offer us inspiration and comfort during this spiritually heavy moment.
Well, apparently Donald Trump was tuning in – and he didn’t care much for that message. He just took to Truth Social to post an unhinged rant attacking me for what I had to say:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121544774/589797782/-1698202107?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk5655-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2U2NWE1ZS0zZGRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jPLwmt_n_MbhWJr6Z1NXDwXBHQSx_UlMImUUMf7l9UM=)
Look, this isn’t the first time Trump has attacked me. I’m sure it won’t be the last either. But I can promise you this: I am not going to be bullied or intimidated.
Because right now, everyday folks are bearing the brunt of Trump’s reckless and dangerous agenda. So, as my faith calls me to do, I will continue using every lever of power I have to fight back against Trump and put a stop to the harm he’s inflicting on the American people.
[**If you have my back, will you chip in $5 or more now to help me continue standing up to Donald Trump and fighting for you and your family in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121544775/589797784/-1698202107?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk5655-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2U2NWE1ZS0zZGRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jPLwmt_n_MbhWJr6Z1NXDwXBHQSx_UlMImUUMf7l9UM=)
It means so much to have you by my side. Thank you.
Rev. Raphael Warnock

body:
We’re not stopping in 2026. We’re aiming to keep this momentum going for 2028, 2030, and beyond.
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240546%2E444211%2EjBYgpM)
In what the Texas Tribune is calling “a first for either party,” Texas Democrats are running for _every single Congressional, State House, and State Senate seat on the ballot._ This is historic, and it’s only possible because of grassroots supporters like you.
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251218.38Yc9L&refcode=ema20251218-240546&t=3&akid=240546%2E444211%2EjBYgpM)
While not every candidate will win their race, every single one of them brings new voters, new energy, new organizing, and a Democratic voice into their community.
They’re fighting for the issues that matter—affordability, health care, education, housing, reproductive freedom, good jobs that pay a living wage—and are laying the groundwork for future wins. Every campaign builds momentum, raises awareness, brings more people into the fight, and sends votes up the ballot to our statewide candidates.
And we’re not stopping in 2026. We’re aiming to keep this momentum going for 2028, 2030, and beyond. Every candidate we support, every campaign we help build, is another step toward delivering the future we want and deserve in Texas.
This is how movements grow. This is how we start winning. And it starts with people like you helping power this work all across the state.
[**Will you chip in $3 to Powered by People today to help support our new candidates and keep up the organizing it will take to propel Democrats to victory?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251218.38Yc9L&refcode=ema20251218-240546&t=4&akid=240546%2E444211%2EjBYgpM)

Thank you,
Powered by People

I was one of only six Democrats to flip a Republican-held seat in 2024 — and we won by less than three percentage points.
**Our campaign wasn’t fueled by dark money, special-interest groups. It was fueled by people like you chipping in what you could to help us defy the odds and win an incredibly tough race.**
Now, we have to do it all over again in 2026 — and there’s A LOT riding on our race here in Oregon.
Oregon’s 5th District is a MUST-HOLD seat if Democrats are going to take back the House. That means if we want to put an end to the GOP’s total control in Washington and get to work fighting for the issues that matter most to our families, we have to protect this seat.

* Dalio backs Trump Accounts for kids
* Oracle loses a finance partner and plunges hard
* Oracle's slide snowballs across Wall Street
* Billionaire developer has major concerns about AI datacenter leases
* Sliver continues its surge
* GM to spend millions to fund a trade skills revival

# **Dalio to back Trump 's child accounts following Michael Dell's lead**
Billionaire investor Ray Dalio **[is stepping up to help fund](https://substack.com/redirect/514d618e-fa0f-4bcc-843e-f42515b6c184?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** new investment accounts for children in Connecticut under the Trump administration's initiative, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent announced Wednesday, targeting kids born between 2025 and 2028.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/514d618e-fa0f-4bcc-843e-f42515b6c184?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Trump initiative targets newborns:** The program creates investment accounts for U.S. children born from 2025 to 2028 to build long-term wealth.
**Connecticut secures Dalio pledge:** Dalio, Bridgewater Associates co-chairman, is contributing to fully fund the accounts specifically for Connecticut children.
**Bessent promotes national expansion:** Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent revealed the donation while urging donors in every state to support the effort.
**States eye similar funding:** Twenty other U.S. states are considering adding their own funds to bolster the child investment accounts.

* * *

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f980f3b7-e2e3-4c86-a892-2eb871cabfc2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

# Oracle shares plunge as debt finance deal tanks, drags tech stocks and Nasdaq with it
Oracle shares **[tumbled nearly nearly 6% Wednesday](https://substack.com/redirect/62ccedeb-0232-4a19-805f-90a9052dd685?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after a report revealed major private lender Blue Owl Capital backed out of a $10 billion deal to finance a massive AI data center in Michigan, spotlighting the company's soaring debt amid aggressive AI expansion.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/62ccedeb-0232-4a19-805f-90a9052dd685?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Financing Talks Collapse** : Blue Owl Capital, Oracle's key data center partner, halted negotiations for the Michigan project despite prior collaborations in Texas and New Mexico.
* **Oracle Disputes Report** : Oracle insists final financing negotiations remain on schedule with a different equity partner, downplaying the snag.
* **Debt Load Scrutinized** : Oracle faces major investor concerns over $248 billion in lease obligations and reliance on external funding, while lacking strong internal cash flows like its Big Tech peers.
* **Broader Market Fallout** : Oracle's shares are down 18% this month just since its earnings, and down 46% since its September highs, with credit default swap spreads hitting highs not seen since since 2009.

**Nasdaq, Tech stocks and Semiconductor sector plunges as Oracle spirals**
The Blue Owl Capital news regarding Oracle **[caused a cascade across the market](https://substack.com/redirect/689776ae-2eab-45a6-9090-7834533db2ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with Tech stocks losing ground and dragging Wall Street lower with Nasdaq closing 1.8% down.
* **AI Financing Scrutiny Intensifies** : There are mounting concerns over off-balance-sheet debt for massive AI projects, pressuring related stocks like GE Vernova (down nearly 8%).
* **Semiconductor Sector Hit Hard** : Broadcom fell 3%, Nvidia dropped 2%, with ASML, TSMC, and AMD also declining amid broader AI demand questions.
* **Concentration Risks Highlighted** : The top 10 S&P 500 stocks now account for 41% of the index's market cap, amplifying fears of an AI-driven bubble.

* * *
* * *
# **Billionaire Developer Waves Red Flag on Data Centers**
Billionaire developer Fernando de Leon, who built a $10 billion real estate empire from scratch, is **[steering clear of the booming data center market,](https://substack.com/redirect/c41cd4bb-aac5-437a-9285-75cee9b9e001?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** warning that massive investments risk collapse due to shaky financing, tech obsolescence, and unreliable long-term leases with hyperscalers.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c41cd4bb-aac5-437a-9285-75cee9b9e001?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Hyperscalers Avoid Ownership** : Trillion-dollar tech giants refuse to own assets central to their AI business, pushing build-and-finance risks onto investors.
* **Rapid Tech Obsolescence** : AI's self-improving efficiency will quickly devalue equipment inside centers, where true worth lies--not in the buildings.
* **Leases Full of Holes** : 15-20 year contracts with hyperscalers are "Swiss cheese," riddled with escape clauses, endangering pension fund-backed investments.
* **No Big Exits** : Lacks comparable sales above $4-5 billion for multibillion-dollar data centers, raising valuation concerns.

* * *
* * *
# **Silver continues it 's relentless surge, passing it's previous $65 record high**
Silver prices **[soared to a fresh all-time high](https://substack.com/redirect/2de7eb84-41d6-4ed8-95f9-c30a9ec4ba1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Wednesday, hitting $66.88, fueled by robust investment demand, momentum buying and its addition to the U.S. critical minerals list amid a persistent supply deficit and surging industrial needs.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2de7eb84-41d6-4ed8-95f9-c30a9ec4ba1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Persistent supply deficit:** The lack of supply underpins the rally, combined with strong fundamentals from geopolitical tensions and safe-haven flows shared with gold.
* **Industrial demand booms:** From AI data centers, solar panels and electric vehicles the increasing use of Silver in manufacturing is driving healthy long-term prospects.
* **Momentum buying intensifies** Strong performance is luring Chinese and Indian traders, boosting exchange volumes and open interest.
* **Analysts forecast upside:** Projections see Silver going to near $75 per ounce by the end of 2026, though volatility warns of sharp corrections tied to gold movements.

* * *
* * *
# GM invests $242M in trades revival
General Motors is **[pouring more than $242 million](https://substack.com/redirect/ffe647b4-8061-4591-9304-10c30801101f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** into its skilled trades apprenticeship program to combat a looming U.S. manufacturing workforce crisis, training hundreds annually as millions of experienced workers near retirement.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ffe647b4-8061-4591-9304-10c30801101f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Addressing Massive Skills Gap** : Projections show 2.1 million manufacturing jobs could go unfilled by 2030, potentially costing the economy $1 trillion amid retiring baby boomers.
* **Rigorous Apprenticeship Training** : The program graduates 600 apprentices yearly with paid on-the-job experience, classroom instruction, and journeyperson certification in roles like electrician and toolmaker.
* **Early Youth Engagement Efforts** : GM introduces kindergarten through high school students to manufacturing via plant tours, robot demonstrations, and hands-on projects like building model cars.
* **Upskilling Current Workforce** : Technical Learning University annually trains about 2,500 employees on new technologies in a safe, real-system environment to boost vehicle quality and efficiency.

clean_body: Oracle plunges and takes the AI sector and Nasdaq down with it | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Oracle plunges and takes the AI sector and Nasdaq down with it | | | Dec 18 | | | | | | | | | | | | Hello Capitalists, Here is everything you should be following today: Dalio backs Trump Accounts for kids Oracle loses a finance partner and plunges hard Oracle's slide snowballs across Wall Street Billionaire developer has major concerns about AI datacenter leases Sliver continues its surge GM to spend millions to fund a trade skills revival Today 's markets + assets: ✅ DOW: 48046.49 (⬆️ 0.33%) ✅ S&P: 6787.00 (⬆️ 0.97%) ✅ NASDAQ: 23067.77 (⬆️ 1.62%) ⚠ ️🔴CBOE VIX Volatility Index: 17.29 (⬇️ 5.10%) 🔴 Gold: $4358.40 (⬇️ 0.33%) 🔴 Silver: $65.16 (⬇️ 2.60%) 🔴 Bitcoin: $86,406 (⬇️ 0.35%) The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication Reject Corporate Left-Wing Journalism Dalio to back Trump 's child accounts following Michael Dell's lead Billionaire investor Ray Dalio new investment accounts for children in Connecticut under the Trump administration's initiative, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent announced Wednesday, targeting kids born between 2025 and 2028. | | ---|---|--- Trump initiative targets newborns: The program creates investment accounts for U.S. children born from 2025 to 2028 to build long-term wealth. Connecticut secures Dalio pledge: Dalio, Bridgewater Associates co-chairman, is contributing to fully fund the accounts specifically for Connecticut children. Bessent promotes national expansion: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent revealed the donation while urging donors in every state to support the effort. States eye similar funding: Twenty other U.S. states are considering adding their own funds to bolster the child investment accounts. | | ---|---|--- When you set up direct deposit with Cash App, you can get paid up to 2 days early. That means less planning around payday, more living on your own schedule. Oracle shares plunge as debt finance deal tanks, drags tech stocks and Nasdaq with it Oracle shares after a report revealed major private lender Blue Owl Capital backed out of a $10 billion deal to finance a massive AI data center in Michigan, spotlighting the company's soaring debt amid aggressive AI expansion. | | ---|---|--- Financing Talks Collapse : Blue Owl Capital, Oracle's key data center partner, halted negotiations for the Michigan project despite prior collaborations in Texas and New Mexico. Oracle Disputes Report : Oracle insists final financing negotiations remain on schedule with a different equity partner, downplaying the snag. Debt Load Scrutinized : Oracle faces major investor concerns over $248 billion in lease obligations and reliance on external funding, while lacking strong internal cash flows like its Big Tech peers. Broader Market Fallout : Oracle's shares are down 18% this month just since its earnings, and down 46% since its September highs, with credit default swap spreads hitting highs not seen since since 2009. Nasdaq, Tech stocks and Semiconductor sector plunges as Oracle spirals The Blue Owl Capital news regarding Oracle with Tech stocks losing ground and dragging Wall Street lower with Nasdaq closing 1.8% down. AI Financing Scrutiny Intensifies : There are mounting concerns over off-balance-sheet debt for massive AI projects, pressuring related stocks like GE Vernova (down nearly 8%). Semiconductor Sector Hit Hard : Broadcom fell 3%, Nvidia dropped 2%, with ASML, TSMC, and AMD also declining amid broader AI demand questions. Concentration Risks Highlighted : The top 10 S&P 500 stocks now account for 41% of the index's market cap, amplifying fears of an AI-driven bubble. Billionaire Developer Waves Red Flag on Data Centers Billionaire developer Fernando de Leon, who built a $10 billion real estate empire from scratch, is warning that massive investments risk collapse due to shaky financing, tech obsolescence, and unreliable long-term leases with hyperscalers. | | ---|---|--- Hyperscalers Avoid Ownership : Trillion-dollar tech giants refuse to own assets central to their AI business, pushing build-and-finance risks onto investors. Rapid Tech Obsolescence : AI's self-improving efficiency will quickly devalue equipment inside centers, where true worth lies--not in the buildings. Leases Full of Holes : 15-20 year contracts with hyperscalers are "Swiss cheese," riddled with escape clauses, endangering pension fund-backed investments. No Big Exits : Lacks comparable sales above $4-5 billion for multibillion-dollar data centers, raising valuation concerns. Silver continues it 's relentless surge, passing it's previous $65 record high Silver prices Wednesday, hitting $66.88, fueled by robust investment demand, momentum buying and its addition to the U.S. critical minerals list amid a persistent supply deficit and surging industrial needs. | | ---|---|--- Persistent supply deficit: The lack of supply underpins the rally, combined with strong fundamentals from geopolitical tensions and safe-haven flows shared with gold. Industrial demand booms: From AI data centers, solar panels and electric vehicles the increasing use of Silver in manufacturing is driving healthy long-term prospects. Momentum buying intensifies Strong performance is luring Chinese and Indian traders, boosting exchange volumes and open interest. Analysts forecast upside: Projections see Silver going to near $75 per ounce by the end of 2026, though volatility warns of sharp corrections tied to gold movements. GM invests $242M in trades revival General Motors is into its skilled trades apprenticeship program to combat a looming U.S. manufacturing workforce crisis, training hundreds annually as millions of experienced workers near retirement. | | ---|---|--- Addressing Massive Skills Gap : Projections show 2.1 million manufacturing jobs could go unfilled by 2030, potentially costing the economy $1 trillion amid retiring baby boomers. Rigorous Apprenticeship Training : The program graduates 600 apprentices yearly with paid on-the-job experience, classroom instruction, and journeyperson certification in roles like electrician and toolmaker. Early Youth Engagement Efforts : GM introduces kindergarten through high school students to manufacturing via plant tours, robot demonstrations, and hands-on projects like building model cars. Upskilling Current Workforce : Technical Learning University annually trains about 2,500 employees on new technologies in a safe, real-system environment to boost vehicle quality and efficiency. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]
