clean_body: A law Congress passed is starting to make its presence felt...| | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | A law Congress passed is starting to make its presence felt... | And that’s VERY bad news for retirees. name: Brett Lindstrom
subject: They want this seat and I won’t give it up

body:
NE-02 is a top Democrat target and the margin is razor thin.
| | | | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
---
Peter,
I want to introduce myself and be clear about what’s at stake.
My name is **Brett Lindstrom** , and I’m running for Congress in **Nebraska’s 2nd District** , one of the **top targets for Democrats nationwide**.
They’ve already decided this seat is their best opportunity to flip red to blue. Outside money is lining up. National groups are preparing attack ads. Operatives are working behind the scenes to change the outcome here.
Why? Because **the House Majority is on the line**.
With margins this tight, losing even one seat like NE-02 could hand Democrats control of Congress — and give them the power to advance a radical agenda Americans don’t support.
I’m a husband, a father, and a conservative who believes in faith, freedom, secure borders, strong families, and putting America first. I’m running to **hold the line** and make sure this district continues to send a conservative fighter to Washington.
This race isn’t just about Nebraska anymore.
It’s about whether **patriots across the country** step up now before Democrats define the race and flood the airwaves with outside money.
_**[If you believe defending the House Majority matters, I’m asking you to chip in anything you can today to help protect this critical seat.](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)**_

Every dollar helps us stay competitive, push back against Democrat attacks, and keep this seat in Republican hands.
Thank you for standing with us when it matters most.
Brett Lindstrom
_Republican Candidate for Congress_

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Fuel Our Fight For Clean Elections in 2026
body:
Every day our team works hard to honor that support by doing the heavy lifting to successfully fight for clean elections, accountability, and the rule of law.

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Thanks to our supporters, Judicial Watch is wrapping up one of the most impactful years in our 31-year history.
Every day our team works hard to honor that support by doing the heavy lifting to successfully fight for clean elections, accountability, and the rule of law.
As you may be considering charitable contributions in this season of giving, _[I humbly ask that you consider making a first-time tax-deductible gift to Judicial Watch.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78404&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)_ It will help us continue our fights against corruption in what will be a critical election year.
| [FUEL JUDICIAL WATCH’S FIGHT FOR CLEAN ELECTIONS IN 2026 ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78404&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

As you know from my prior updates, **Judicial Watch** will be **going back to the Supreme Court in 2026** for **another landmark case - **This one to challenge Mississippi's lawless practice of counting ballots received up to five days after Election Day.

At the heart of this case is a simple question: **When is an election really over?**

We addressed the question in our recently filed opposition to the cert petition (Brief in Opposition) with the Supreme Court which states:

_" Federal law sets Election Day as the first Tuesday after the first Monday in November."_

And that Congress made the law of the land perfectly clear that there is to be a single national Election Day.

_" In passing the Election Day statutes, Congress sought 'uniform[ity]' in 'holding all elections for Congress and the Presidency on a single day throughout the Union.'"_

When states overreach by extending ballot receipt far after the allotted day, they not only disobey federal law.

_They also erode public confidence in our elections_.

While we're incredibly proud to fight for election integrity at the Supreme Court, it's important for you to know this is **just 1 of over 140 court cases on the JW docket** including our election integrity work along with our Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuits which help expose corruption at the federal, state, and local level.

[YOUR YEAR-END GIFT SUPPORTS JUDICIAL WATCH’S HISTORIC 2026 CASELOAD ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78404&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

If there's an issue that's important to you, chances are Judicial Watch is **defending your values and priorities in court** with our litigation.

The unprecedented scope of our work is what makes Judicial Watch **America 's largest and most important public records litigator. **

But, suing the deep state and taking on billionaire funded special interests can take years requiring hundreds of hours of work from our elite team of lawyers and investigators.

_[That is why I am asking for your help as we close this year out](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78404&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)_.

As I'm writing this, we still need to raise **$6.2 million by December 31** to hit our budgeted year-end goal.

Your tax-deductible contribution today will help:

* Fund our ongoing Supreme Court fight to prevent states from turning Election Day into Election Week (or even Election Month)

* Sustain Judicial Watch's docket of over 140 other lawsuits nationwide

* Ensure we have the resources to file new lawsuits quickly as unexpected threats to fair elections and the rule of law emerge in 2026

_[Will you make a generous and tax-deductible gift today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78404&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)_?

[I WILL HELP JUDICIAL WATCH DEFEND ELECTIONS & FIGHT CORRUPTION ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78404&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

Thank you for reading my message. If you choose to join Judicial Watch as a financial supporter today, [your gift will help ensure our work is fully resourced](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78404&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2) to defend the rule of law in the New Year.

Sincerely,
Thomas Fitton
President, Judicial Watch

P.S. Our U.S. Supreme Court case on Mississippi's ballot counting practices is fighting to prevent states from extending Election Day into Election Week (or even Election Month). _[To keep this landmark case and our 140+ other lawsuits fighting government corruption fully resourced, please make a first-time gift today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78404&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)_. It will be fully tax-deductible.

|
---
|

Washington, DC 20024

name: Ami Bera
subject: Our economic future is on the line — join the fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Peter,

In November, I introduced the bipartisan Minerals Security Partnership Authorization Act — legislation to strengthen U.S. leadership in critical mineral supply chains for resources like lithium and cobalt. **These minerals are essential for clean energy, technology, and national security.**

Why does this matter to you? Because supply-chain stability impacts everything from the price of energy to the availability of clean-energy technology — and our ability to stand with our allies globally.

Ensuring critical legislation like this passes depends on having elected leaders who will always stand up for what is right. name: Wes Moore
subject: We can’t underestimate this
body:
Leading by an important example.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1082%2E1086043%2E7hCug6)
Peter,
We spend a lot of time these days talking about the power of the President. **But we cannot underestimate the power of the people.**
We can’t ignore the power of your governor, the power of your attorney general, or the power of your state government.
Here in Maryland, we’re leading by that example. **We’re proving what’s possible when we put people first.** We’re lowering costs, protecting our rights, defending federal workers, and investing in your future.
That’s why it’s so important we don’t lose momentum. Republicans are determined to flip this seat red and stop this forward progress.
**[So I have to ask: Will you help defend this seat by chipping in $5 or any amount to our reelection campaign today?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251218-1.g7htoQ&refcode=em-20251218-1&t=2&akid=1082%2E1086043%2E7hCug6)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251218-1.g7htoQ&amount=5&refcode=em-20251218-1&t=21&akid=1082%2E1086043%2E7hCug6)**
Together, we’ll prove that people power is on our side.
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251218-1.g7htoQ&refcode=em-20251218-1&t=22&akid=1082%2E1086043%2E7hCug6)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251218-1&t=23&refcode2=1082_1086043_7hCug6&akid=1082%2E1086043%2E7hCug6)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: If only you knew…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
$3, Derek.
**[That’s how much I’m asking you to chip in today to my campaign and Adam Schiff’s to help us reach our $25,000 goal and win in Ohio. Can I count on you?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=abs_em_brown2025.4Unkdt&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251218_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=3&akid=9314%2E5257348%2E8yV-OC)**
[CHIP IN $3](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=abs_em_brown2025.4Unkdt&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251218_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=9314%2E5257348%2E8yV-OC)
---
If you knew that by giving $3 now, you could guarantee we flip this Senate seat and defeat my opponent, wouldn’t you donate immediately?
If you knew that by giving $3 now, you could help us fight back against misleading attack ads and reach more voters with the truth, wouldn’t you chip in?
If you knew that by giving $3 now, you could make real progress for working people and upend a status quo that only serves billionaires and big corporations, wouldn’t it be the best $3 you ever spent?
I know that $3 doesn’t feel like it can do all of these things and more. But in a race like this, every dollar counts.
But by the time you get to this point in the email, thousands of folks have already given their $3 — and now, they’re counting on you to do the same.
With a new poll showing me 1 point ahead of my opponent, we can flip this seat – but not unless we capitalize on our momentum and hit our critical grassroots fundraising goals.
**[So please, Derek, will you chip in $3 or more to Adam Schiff and me today to help reach our $25,000 goal, power this campaign forward, and win in Ohio?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=abs_em_brown2025.4Unkdt&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251218_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=9314%2E5257348%2E8yV-OC)**

Friend, Tennessee’s special election should’ve been a slam dunk. Instead, Republicans _barely_ held the seat, with just a 9-point win in a district President Trump carried by nearly 20. **That’s a wakeup call. And if we don’t listen, we’ll lose.** I went on Fox News and laid out, step-by-step, what we need to do to win in 2026.

Here’s the issue we face: Some of the voters who show up for President Trump don’t show up when he’s not on the ballot. But here’s the good news: **It doesn’t have to be that way.** We overcame it in Florida in 2022. This state was a purple battleground. Remember, we were winning by one point just a few years ago. But in 2022, we won by 1.5 million votes...a **20-point margin**. It was the biggest Republican victory in the state’s history. **How?** We didn’t run on pale pastels. We ran on **bold colors**. We drew sharp contrasts. We stuck it to the Left every single day, and we delivered real results. **If Republicans want to win, we need to give voters something to believe in, not just something to vote against.** **[That’s why I launched RON PAC.](http://links.email.ronpac.com/s/c/KR6YQBsDqR9O7bDmlcfqRgE4iGGmkR8-LUkpH8qAa9ywIqaEZ4zhKkEJW7K8IkWvIN1B1cTsGY_Zg8jJ7N03aJW0BJ4CmYFNrcHiVeyrkY_c7SVV1Sws536dOHluNezUqDN9wQnWHF_5NZU6Vo68WiUsu-NpjKOjgaKG8o4v7n3JVOQiqb-qdj49JZ-YiXonGu2RC6Kr7mZVw0STinwrBv9O82WDpwQByw-DamOMIijZcGDrhDHiYLVn_U_lqvHjnymW0TLAB0PKQrB-rMjGFEuJJueka9MW1X92FoBLSxs3WdZKm-nMXYr-6fibn4vOWlQABwmcvJyup1mOjMqx4VoedL-j5THl4tKsSnGcjXJdvaz84iRVbYDo7VS1hLBXYratgeih_9DZ5JSEEmI7qI8C3miqbO7LSUx13R2cUwzWVDx5HHS_F7bUklOXGm1P0HbbWKDxRrwResG6_NxpBYPino71hgmGjfsexCDOXDIkX38TkB1NHpNJ0054RA7FizXPKTEsc_GJgNXGIJGz-byeh1zZuobrxnB9Fw_wcnfDXk2oe46enBhL_1QiPg4dtyPj2ZBmd-yf0z6N8axOE2t2Kw/hzVA28VUm6ENF-3yYJ7I-Sgqd1Q2Jexu/15)** We’re electing bold conservatives across the country who don’t flinch, don’t fold, and don’t back down. Leaders who will stand up for parents' rights, border security, economic sanity, and American strength, just like we’ve done in Florida.

**\----Original Message----**
**From:** Jose Javier Rodriguez
**Date:** Sat, Dec 6, 2025 at 10:30 AM
**Subject:** What matters most to you as we head into 2026?
> As we head into the final weeks of 2025 and prepare for a consequential election year in Florida, I’m asking for something that matters more to me than money.

We're reviewing responses this weekend as we finalize our 2026 strategy, and we'd really appreciate your input. | Thanks so much! Team Rodriguez \----Original Message---- From: Jose Javier Rodriguez Date: Sat, Dec 6, 2025 at 10:30 AM Subject: What matters most to you as we head into 2026? As we head into the final weeks of 2025 and prepare for a consequential election year in Florida, I’m asking for something that matters more to me than money. I want to hear directly from you , Peter. --- Look, I know you get plenty of emails from politicians asking for donations. And yes, we'll need resources to defeat James Uthmeier and his special interest backers. But before we get there, I need to know what's keeping you up at night. Are you worried about skyrocketing insurance rates? The fentanyl crisis? Corruption in Tallahassee? Utility bills that keep climbing? Something else entirely? This campaign for Attorney General is bigger than me. It represents our values and the working families and everyday Floridians who deserve a People’s Lawyer in their corner. That means your voice needs to guide our work in the months ahead. --- Thank you for your time, Jose Javier Rodriguez | = = PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL Jose Javier Rodriguez for Attorney General 701 S. A Year of Standing Up--For Maine and Our Future
Thank you for standing with me this year as a valued part of Maine Issues and Action PAC.
Your support and engagement make our efforts possible and allow us to continue the fight for Maine families, common sense, and accountability.
I'm deeply grateful for your commitment to these shared values and for staying involved in the work that matters most to our state.
As we look ahead, make no mistake--2026 will be just as critical, and together we will keep standing up for Maine's future.
Mike Soboleski Rep. Mike Soboleski Proudly Serving House District 73

name: Voter Action Project
subject: 26 races under the radar in 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
These types of elections always fly under the media's radar, Team, but in 2026, 26 Secretary of State races will shape the future of our elections, redistricting in 2030, and the outcome of the 2028 presidential race.
Opponents of voting rights already know this, which is why they’re already pouring money into these elections – and we have to fight back now, while it still makes a difference. Check out this map:
Map of Key Secretary of State Races in 2026 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121825_1&amount=25]
The work to increase voter participation and turnout for these races has to start now, not next summer. We have to build the infrastructure to defend pro-voter initiatives in Arizona, Michigan, Wisconsin, and Nevada, at the same time as we work to flip the script in key battleground states like Georgia, Ohio, and Iowa.
Team: None of it happens without your support. Fuel our work for next year's elections with $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121825_1&amount=25]
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=121825_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=121825_1&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=121825_1&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=121825_1&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=121825_1&amount=250] Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121825_1&amount=35]
Opponents of voting rights have been working on these objectives for years. They've targeted state legislatures and key statewide offices to control the rules around voting and that's why they've been in a position to follow up on the "Big Lie" with bill after bill suppressing the vote. They've played the long game to pick and choose their voters and protect their own power.
Most people don't know that their Secretary of State is the state official who runs their elections, let alone who the current office-holder in their state is. But they are the last line of defense against voter suppression and diminished ballot access , which is why we need to invest in voter information, registration, and participation in these critical races.
2025 has been a tough year but we're not backing down. Our right to vote is too important and too much is at stake for our democracy, our fellow Americans, and the direction of our country. Driving pro-voting rights voters to the polls in 2026 is the best possible response to all that we've been forced to live through the last decade.
Your gift -- $5, $10, $25, or more -- helps provide the resources we need to keep voters apprised of what is at stake and get them out to vote for pro-democracy policies. Please, chip in what you can today! >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121825_1&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=121825_1&amount=20]

clean_body: Voter Action Project [] These types of elections always fly under the media's radar, Team, but in 2026, 26 Secretary of State races will shape the future of our elections, redistricting in 2030, and the outcome of the 2028 presidential race. Opponents of voting rights already know this, which is why they’re already pouring money into these elections – and we have to fight back now, while it still makes a difference. Check out this map: Map of Key Secretary of State Races in 2026 [] The work to increase voter participation and turnout for these races has to start now, not next summer. We have to build the infrastructure to defend pro-voter initiatives in Arizona, Michigan, Wisconsin, and Nevada, at the same time as we work to flip the script in key battleground states like Georgia, Ohio, and Iowa. Team: None of it happens without your support. Fuel our work for next year's elections with $25 or whatever you can today >> [] GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] Other Amount [] Opponents of voting rights have been working on these objectives for years. They've targeted state legislatures and key statewide offices to control the rules around voting and that's why they've been in a position to follow up on the "Big Lie" with bill after bill suppressing the vote. They've played the long game to pick and choose their voters and protect their own power. Most people don't know that their Secretary of State is the state official who runs their elections, let alone who the current office-holder in their state is. But they are the last line of defense against voter suppression and diminished ballot access , which is why we need to invest in voter information, registration, and participation in these critical races. 2025 has been a tough year but we're not backing down. Our right to vote is too important and too much is at stake for our democracy, our fellow Americans, and the direction of our country. Driving pro-voting rights voters to the polls in 2026 is the best possible response to all that we've been forced to live through the last decade. Your gift -- $5, $10, $25, or more -- helps provide the resources we need to keep voters apprised of what is at stake and get them out to vote for pro-democracy policies. Please, chip in what you can today! >> [] Voter Action Project [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax-deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). body:
Hi there,

I reached out recently to share our growing list of endorsers -- and to ask for your personal endorsement in one of the most competitive House races in the country.

Since then, support has surged: we’ve now been endorsed by Bernie Sanders, Dolores Huerta, Rep. Pramila Jayapal, Ro Khanna, and dozens of leaders from across the Central Valley.

But the most important endorsement is still yours.

If you haven’t signed on yet, I hope you’ll take a moment now: [https://secure.ngpvan.com/iH-yFQud50iKFMeO1s8XRA2]

ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/iH-yFQud50iKFMeO1s8XRA2]

This race could decide control of the House -- and we’re building something bold and community-powered to win it. Your name on this list shows that the people of CA-22 are ready for change.

Thanks for standing with me,

Randy

P.S. I’ve included the list of endorsers below in case you missed it.

National Leaders
* Bernie Sanders – U.S. Senate, Vermont
* Pramila Jayapal – U.S. Congress, WA-7
* Ro Khanna – U.S. Congress, CA-17
* Maxwell Frost – U.S. Congress, FL-10
* Linda Sánchez – U.S. Congress, CA-38
* Rob Menendez – U.S. Congress, NJ-8
* Lloyd Doggett – U.S. Congress, TX-37

Local Leaders & Elected Officials

* Christian Romo – Kern County Democratic Central Committee Chair
* Cathy Jorgensen – Kings County Democratic Central Committee Chair
* Josh Evans – Tulare Democratic Central Committee Chair
* Ruben Zarate – Fresno County Democratic Central Committee Chair
* Rey Leon – Mayor of Huron
* Manpreet Kaur – Vice Mayor of Bakersfield
...and dozens more mayors, school board trustees, and advocates across the Valley.
Organizations
* Congressional Progressive Caucus
* Congressional Hispanic Caucus’ BOLD PAC
* Working Families Party
* Latino Victory Fund
* Blue America
* Leaders We Deserve
* Power CA Action
* ACCE Action
* No Dem Left Behind
* Central Valley Progressive PAC
...and many others.

|

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121547053/589805899/-952544528?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Tactical_251218_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Yjg4YTVhNy00M2RjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VxFUbfMSBS9Q9-IpJXiNdoRWbalURhnN-_Nne2nJTCY=) Derek,

I'll be straightforward with you: after decades in public service, I'd rather focus on the work than the fundraising asks. But right now, I need to talk to you about something important.

In a matter of days, we hit our final FEC deadline of the year and close the books on 2025.

If that’s all you need to hear, you can pitch in right now to my reelection campaign at this secure link: [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-email-251218**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121547056/589805906/-952544528?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Tactical_251218_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Yjg4YTVhNy00M2RjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VxFUbfMSBS9Q9-IpJXiNdoRWbalURhnN-_Nne2nJTCY=)

This means two things: first, our fundraising numbers will become publicly available, so our opponents will be looking at them closely to decide when, where, and how they can ramp up their attacks on my campaign. Second, how much we raise will determine exactly what kind of campaign we can build heading into next year.

This isn't abstract, Derek. Every campaign is a series of financial decisions, and the choices we make in the coming weeks will shape the outcome of the midterms in Virginia. How early can we get our ads on the air? How many field offices can we open? Will we be able to meet voters where they are, or make tough choices about where we’ll need to cut back?

These are the questions that your support answers.

Frankly, I need to know we have what it takes to protect this seat and flip the Senate for Democrats.

[_**So I’m asking: can you chip in before our end-of-year fundraising deadline? Every dollar that comes in today goes directly toward building the infrastructure we need to win next year.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121547058/589805908/-952544528?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Tactical_251218_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Yjg4YTVhNy00M2RjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VxFUbfMSBS9Q9-IpJXiNdoRWbalURhnN-_Nne2nJTCY=) clean_body: | | | = Derek, I'll be straightforward with you: after decades in public service, I'd rather focus on the work than the fundraising asks. But right now, I need to talk to you about something important. In a matter of days, we hit our final FEC deadline of the year and close the books on 2025. If that’s all you need to hear, you can pitch in right now to my reelection campaign at this secure link: = This means two things: first, our fundraising numbers will become publicly available, so our opponents will be looking at them closely to decide when, where, and how they can ramp up their attacks on my campaign. Second, how much we raise will determine exactly what kind of campaign we can build heading into next year. This isn't abstract, Derek. Every campaign is a series of financial decisions, and the choices we make in the coming weeks will shape the outcome of the midterms in Virginia. How early can we get our ads on the air? How many field offices can we open? Will we be able to meet voters where they are, or make tough choices about where we’ll need to cut back? These are the questions that your support answers. Frankly, I need to know we have what it takes to protect this seat and flip the Senate for Democrats. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = The fight continues, Mark Warner Before you go: Republicans will spend whatever it takes to hold onto power, no matter how unpopular their agenda is with voters. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

name: Shawn Harris
subject: “We have become so divided.” It doesn’t have to stay this way.
body:

| That breaks my heart. But it's exactly why I'm running for Congress.
For years, our district has been torn apart by chaos, cruelty, and a representative who never cared to represent all of us. People are ready for something new -- not noise, not stunts, but real leadership grounded in respect, service, and accountability.
No one expected we'd have a real shot to change the direction of this district. Not the pundits. Not the establishment. Certainly not the GOP.
But here we are -- because the people of Northwest Georgia are tired of being a national punchline. We're tired of being divided. And we are ready to build something better.
I'm running for Congress because this district deserves a representative who listens, who leads with integrity, and who understands that people come before politics. And for the first time in years, we have a path to win -- but only if we build the resources to compete against the Republican machine gearing up to keep this seat red.
Republicans are already pouring in cash. They know this seat can flip -- and they're terrified of losing the megaphone Marjorie Taylor Greene gave them.
[I need you with me. Grassroots support is how we show the country that this district is ready for a new chapter. Will you make a contribution today to help us bring real representation back to GA-14?](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rlb9afv78YSIk7m2PvaFQOf1wVn_9K0aLRwzLq3Stfc14mFHeelqqdxfwBL1t9VV4iqy3sbmSO3m8YsJ51o_VAntZTkIi-LLgFQlahhzknFr5PnC8RBvnnj1G_DJ-yP-6vSYM00rtihpO4HeyrPMtO06_cUGeZ5R9JEMBx20JTDKkLi-bronRwf8WvzNXkwnN8iuchGzuPBxAvJLuEnFUqYIVhjB6rtS&c=h1J_q71ng0zqFlsfhDQexEgjfXco8LJKJ26IurZ50JI7X0b6dQ1pZg==&ch=n7nv2bJzv8k3einX2PeeOrbzzTHX9uu_UXHXCvY1Dj1JDscPgOLkHg==)

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: My decision
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251218-1B-b&t=30&akid=11122%2E3935704%2EdrQhi_)
---
Friends,
When Mark and I were making a decision about whether we’d start an organization focused on gun violence prevention, we knew the challenges we would face.
Many people in Washington D.C. said it would be political poison to stand up against the gun lobby. The NRA had millions of dollars at their disposal — and they would use every cent to drown us out. It wasn’t going to be easy.
But after the tragic shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School, which stole 20 innocent children’s lives and six staff members, we knew that doing nothing wasn’t an option.
So, we founded what is now known as GIFFORDS. And after more than a decade of hard work, we’ve made gun safety a winning issue. We’ve passed hundreds of gun safety laws across the nation and the NRA is in the weakest position it’s ever been.
I am so grateful every single day to do this work. I have never forgotten the fights we’ve taken on and won together. The amount of lives we’ve helped save — this is all because of grassroots supporters like you.
Now, we face an inflection point. As I write this, President Trump’s administration is working to roll back our progress on gun safety. They are putting all of their weight towards flooding our streets with more guns and helping their gun lobby allies profit.
I know that we have what it takes to end the gun violence epidemic in our country. But I cannot do it alone.
[**Can you please make a donation to support GIFFORDS PAC before the clock strikes midnight?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251218-1B-b&t=31&akid=11122%2E3935704%2EdrQhi_)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q42025.mpFqoL&amount=3&refcode=em251218-1B-b&t=50&akid=11122%2E3935704%2EdrQhi_)**

clean_body: Friends, When Mark and I were making a decision about whether we’d start an organization focused on gun violence prevention, we knew the challenges we would face. Many people in Washington D.C. said it would be political poison to stand up against the gun lobby. The NRA had millions of dollars at their disposal — and they would use every cent to drown us out. It wasn’t going to be easy. But after the tragic shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School, which stole 20 innocent children’s lives and six staff members, we knew that doing nothing wasn’t an option. So, we founded what is now known as GIFFORDS. And after more than a decade of hard work, we’ve made gun safety a winning issue. We’ve passed hundreds of gun safety laws across the nation and the NRA is in the weakest position it’s ever been. I am so grateful every single day to do this work. I have never forgotten the fights we’ve taken on and won together. The amount of lives we’ve helped save — this is all because of grassroots supporters like you. Now, we face an inflection point. As I write this, President Trump’s administration is working to roll back our progress on gun safety. They are putting all of their weight towards flooding our streets with more guns and helping their gun lobby allies profit. I know that we have what it takes to end the gun violence epidemic in our country. But I cannot do it alone. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** It is an honor to have your support. Let’s do all we can to make our voices heard.❤️ Gabby Giffords Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ...Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We're going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. Thank you so much for your time, Tim Sheehy Eli Crane Ryan Zinke Three Navy SEALs Serving in Congress | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Use of Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Reaching out personally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Hi Derek, it’s Jon.

If you’ve been considering chipping in to my reelection campaign, now’s the time. I’ll explain more in just a moment, but if you’re ready to join the fight right now, you can split a donation between my reelection campaign and John Fetterman's here: secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jf-email-ossoff?dpwillis67@gmail.com

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52432?t=1001&akid=10488%2E434096%2EWb47fp

Here’s the deal: Republicans have been spending big in Georgia ... and much earlier than usual. They’re already running ads to attack me and lie about my record because they know flipping this Democratic Senate seat is their best chance to lock in a pro-MAGA Senate majority for the long-term.

There’s no doubt about it: I’m the most vulnerable Senator on the ballot in the midterm elections.

But I have you, Derek.

Together, we’ve built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history, and in 2021 that organization won Georgia and the Senate majority.

Now, I need you more than ever: I am literally MAGA’s #1 target.

Yes, this election will be tough.

But we know how to win tough fights. We’ve done it before.

Let’s do it again.

So if you can, please chip in any amount to my campaign and John Fetterman's today. Here’s the link again: secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jf-email-ossoff?dpwillis67@gmail.com

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52432?t=1002&akid=10488%2E434096%2EWb47fp

Thank you,

Jon

clean_body: | = Team, = FIRST: Jon Ossoff shocked the nation in 2021 by defeating David Perdue by a razor-thin margin, 50%-49% — helping flip the Senate majority blue. THEN: Jon Ossoff was sworn into the Senate — and ever since, he's been holding Trump accountable and fighting for Georgia's working families. NOW: Senator Jon Ossoff is one of the most vulnerable Democratic Senators up for re-election in 2026. And if he loses re-election, it would be catastrophic to Democrats' chances at taking back the Senate. Donald Trump won Georgia in the 2024 presidential election, so winning again is going to be tough. We have a real shot at re-electing Jon Ossoff next November, — but only if grassroots supporters like you step up now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you in advance, Flip the Senate Paid for by SMP, www.SenateMajority.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Sharice Davids
subject: Here's the gameplan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
We're the final unknown

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121548324/589810479/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjExYWY2My00OGRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UiPwQZ8mUQ0YV52-OuNxLM95Uwi2g0a5XlBpAG9aNK0=) All eyes are on Kansas right now. In states all across the country, Donald Trump’s gerrymander has been settled. In Texas, it passed — handing the National GOP an extra five seats in next year’s midterms. But in Indiana, it failed — because ordinary people like you sounded the alarm and took action. **Now, we’re the final unknown.** I want to run through our gameplan for these critical final weeks before the legislative session, but first, I need to ask: **_[will you pitch in whatever you can to make sure Kansas Democrats keep their voice in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121548325/589810480/-851270824?refcode=email_121825_gameplan&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,1000,3500&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjExYWY2My00OGRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UiPwQZ8mUQ0YV52-OuNxLM95Uwi2g0a5XlBpAG9aNK0=)_** Here’s what my team and I are planning to do before the new year: **We’re going to get loud. Yes, even louder than we’ve been before.** What’s happening in Kansas right now is not normal. And we need to act like it. If we treat this moment like politics as usual, folks are going to tune out — and that’s how we’d lose. Kansas Republicans want to pass this gerrymander in silence, which means we need to make _every_ Kansan aware of this unprecedented, partisan power grab. **We’re going to make our case directly to Kansans.** National Republicans want this battle to happen behind closed doors — where _they_ decide the opinions that matter. But we live in a democracy. And in a democracy, _everyone’s_ opinion matters. That’s why we’re going to keep making our case directly to Kansas families and build up the grassroots opposition we’ll need to stop this plan in its tracks. **We’re going to build a war chest to fight back... hopefully.** There’s no two ways about it: the amount of money we raise will make a difference. Just imagine it: if we raised only a few dollars between now and December 31st? Kansas Republicans will plow ahead, with the full confidence that we won’t have the resources to push back. But if lots and lots of people chip in?_Kansas Republicans will understand just how many political consequences would come with Trump’s gerrymander — and they’ll back off, just like they did in Indiana._ There’s a lot to get done this month. And we can only do it with this incredible team of supporters by our side. **_[We’re approaching the final sprint of this marathon, and I’m counting on your support to give us the final boost we need. Please, will you chip in and help me keep KS-03 blue next year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121548326/589810481/-851270824?refcode=email_121825_gameplan&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,1000,3500&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjExYWY2My00OGRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UiPwQZ8mUQ0YV52-OuNxLM95Uwi2g0a5XlBpAG9aNK0=)_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121548327/589810482/-851270824?refcode=email_121825_gameplan&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjExYWY2My00OGRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UiPwQZ8mUQ0YV52-OuNxLM95Uwi2g0a5XlBpAG9aNK0=)

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_pre-inauguration-em_q42025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_pre-inauguration-em_q42025]
Folks, Virginia is healing – and people are looking to their leaders to make life safer and more affordable.
And I want you to know that I’m all-in. Every day, I’m fighting to build a future where every community can thrive, and I’m more confident than ever that our best days are still ahead of us.
I’ll be doing everything in my power as Attorney General to put Virginians first and move the Commonwealth forward by:
🔵 Fighting for working families
🔵 Protecting small businesses
🔵 Strengthening public safety
🔵 Defending civil and reproductive rights
And that’s just the beginning, team.
If I can count on you to stand with me in this moment, I’m asking you to chip in $10 – or however much you can – to help us start the new year with momentum and protect all Virginians’ rights. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_pre-inauguration-em_q42025?amount=10]

clean_body: [] Folks, Virginia is healing – and people are looking to their leaders to make life safer and more affordable. And I want you to know that I’m all-in. Every day, I’m fighting to build a future where every community can thrive, and I’m more confident than ever that our best days are still ahead of us. I’ll be doing everything in my power as Attorney General to put Virginians first and move the Commonwealth forward by: 🔵 Fighting for working families 🔵 Protecting small businesses 🔵 Strengthening public safety 🔵 Defending civil and reproductive rights And that’s just the beginning, team. If I can count on you to stand with me in this moment, I’m asking you to chip in $10 – or however much you can – to help us start the new year with momentum and protect all Virginians’ rights. >> [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE MORE [] Thanks, Jay Jones Jay Jones for Virginia 1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: We need to rally behind Judge Chris Taylor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
We’re five months away from Judge Chris Taylor’s election, and right-wing special interests have already chosen their preferred candidate.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251218-927&t=1&akid=928%2E294397%2ExMTCta)
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251218_1_ak.4urs0N&amount=10&refcode=em20251218-927&t=3&akid=928%2E294397%2ExMTCta)
I know firsthand how competitive Wisconsin’s statewide elections are _(having won some myself!),_ so trust me when I say **Wisconsin’s Supreme Court race is going to be a nail-biter.**
We’re five months away from Judge Chris Taylor’s election, and right-wing special interests have already chosen their preferred candidate.
Now, Judge Chris Taylor is counting on us to generate the grassroots momentum needed to stop far-right groups from buying a seat on the Wisconsin Supreme Court.
But here’s the challenge: With the holiday season in full swing, it's an extra tough time for grassroots fundraising.
**If we let the right-wing special interests outspend us now, they’ll define this race before most voters even start paying attention.**
[**Will you join me in supporting Judge Chris Taylor by pitching in $10 or any amount today? We must rally behind Chris as soon as possible to build the grassroots momentum she needs to win in April.**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251218_1_ak.4urs0N&amount=10&refcode=em20251218-927&t=4&akid=928%2E294397%2ExMTCta)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251218_1_ak.4urs0N&amount=10&refcode=em20251218-927&t=23&akid=928%2E294397%2ExMTCta)**
Thanks so much. Together, we’ll keep our Wisconsin Supreme Court fair and for the people.
Tammy
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251218-927&t=24&refcode2=928_294397_xMTCta&akid=928%2E294397%2ExMTCta)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=928%2E294397%2ExMTCta)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=928%2E294397%2ExMTCta)

Email us: [info@chrisforjustice.com](info@chrisforjustice.com)
Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
PO Box 1921
Madison, WI 53701

name: Mark Kelly
subject: My decision --
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121549868/589816020/1949054306?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.18_Mark-Kelly-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWM3OTkyZi00Y2RjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jquGdWN-jUlu7eelg1vodGqtdtDWlKHVwf7fLshAVaI=) Hey, it’s Mark Kelly.

Seven years ago, I was making a decision about whether I was going to run for the Senate.

I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy.

But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something.

So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too.

I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help.

We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now.

After everything you’ve already done for me, I shouldn’t have to ask you for more. But that’s what I need to do.

[**_I’m asking you to split a donation between Maggie Hassan and me, and I hope you know that I wouldn’t be asking if this wasn’t important._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121549869/589816021/1949054306?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.18_Mark-Kelly-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWM3OTkyZi00Y2RjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jquGdWN-jUlu7eelg1vodGqtdtDWlKHVwf7fLshAVaI=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mark Kelly and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately:_ | | [ DONATE $10 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121549870/589816022/1949054306?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.18_Mark-Kelly-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWM3OTkyZi00Y2RjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jquGdWN-jUlu7eelg1vodGqtdtDWlKHVwf7fLshAVaI=)

clean_body: We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now. = Hey, it’s Mark Kelly. Seven years ago, I was making a decision about whether I was going to run for the Senate. I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy. But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something. So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too. I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help. We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now. After everything you’ve already done for me, I shouldn’t have to ask you for more. But that’s what I need to do. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mark Kelly and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Mark If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. My first re-election campaign to keep CA-27 blue is about to kick into high gear:
* Despite Proposition 50 redrawing Congressional lines in California, political experts at _Sabato’s Crystal Ball_ still rank this race as one of the most competitive nationwide. Three seats separate House control, and we can’t lose an inch.

* This summer, a GOP challenger entered the race with a day one endorsement from Mike Garcia -- the Republican incumbent I defeated to become one of the only Democrats to flip a red seat in 2024. We’re preparing for an onslaught of outside spending and attacks in the new year.

**[I’m counting on 1,000 citizen endorsers to sign on today to send an undeniable message of strength: Will you personally endorse my campaign in Congress to keep up the good fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121550125/589816918/1769291385?refcode=em-12.18.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODU1ZWViYi00Y2RjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bQXDlCOe-rsWSLrJzs2xUNViYth5h0aAAzW8wHx7KjQ=&emci=c355eebb-4cdc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=e855eebb-4cdc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=36198509)**

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: Why I’m still here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
I’m stopping at nothing to ensure we take back the House next year.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121550300/589817552/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-12-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzFiOGY0Zi00ZGRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9OU2WAzUTMD9k0pWv6pn3kyBONLF3GP87VBhvBVvJ_0=)
---
| I’ve been thinking a lot lately about what it means to serve in Congress during a moment like this.

Every day, I’m reminded that the noise, the dysfunction, and the political stunts aren’t the job – cutting through all of that to deliver for West Michigan is the job. **And I’m proud to do it.**

I didn’t run for Congress to watch chaos unfold. I ran so families in West Michigan would have someone who shows up prepared, steady, and focused on solutions.

Honestly? This work is getting tougher. House Republicans will stop at nothing to push their extremist agenda, and the attacks keep escalating.

I’m stopping at nothing to ensure we take back the House next year, but I need you by my side to do so.

We have to build the resources now, before the GOP spending gets any bigger.

clean_body: I’m stopping at nothing to ensure we take back the House next year. | = | I’ve been thinking a lot lately about what it means to serve in Congress during a moment like this. Every day, I’m reminded that the noise, the dysfunction, and the political stunts aren’t the job – cutting through all of that to deliver for West Michigan is the job. And I’m proud to do it. I didn’t run for Congress to watch chaos unfold. I ran so families in West Michigan would have someone who shows up prepared, steady, and focused on solutions. Honestly? This work is getting tougher. House Republicans will stop at nothing to push their extremist agenda, and the attacks keep escalating. I’m stopping at nothing to ensure we take back the House next year, but I need you by my side to do so. We have to build the resources now, before the GOP spending gets any bigger. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for being in this with me. – Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49516 United States | = = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . body:
We’re laying the foundation for a campaign that delivers results for Massachusetts

| |
---
Friend, Our campaign is just getting started, and we've got a big first test coming up at the end of the year: **our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.** This is a chance to show the strength behind this campaign. What we build now will set the tone for 2026: our message, our momentum, and our ability to compete in every corner of Massachusetts. Seth’s campaign is about more than one race. It’s about proving that Democrats can lead with integrity, urgency, and purpose, and that people are ready for new voices willing to challenge the old playbook. To do that, we need to step off on the right foot. clean_body: We’re laying the foundation for a campaign that delivers results for Massachusetts | | Friend, Our campaign is just getting started, and we've got a big first test coming up at the end of the year: our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. This is a chance to show the strength behind this campaign. What we build now will set the tone for 2026: our message, our momentum, and our ability to compete in every corner of Massachusetts. Seth’s campaign is about more than one race. It’s about proving that Democrats can lead with integrity, urgency, and purpose, and that people are ready for new voices willing to challenge the old playbook. To do that, we need to step off on the right foot. That means building a strong foundation early — powered by grassroots supporters who believe in Seth’s vision for a government that delivers results, not excuses. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Every campaign begins with a first step. Let’s make ours count. — Moulton HQ | | | ---|---|--- About Seth Moulton Seth Moulton is a father, a husband, a Marine, and a Democrat with a mission to bring a new generation of leaders to Congress. He is the proud father of two girls, Emmy and Caroline, and husband to his wife, Liz. They live in Salem, Massachusetts. | = | = ---|--- Follow Seth | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to: Seth for Massachusetts - PO Box 2013, Salem, MA, 01970 Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . name: Team Cooper
subject: Trump in Roy Cooper’s hometown??
body:
Puppeteer and puppet, together.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=189%2E124072%2EA-PhSM)
Peter, did you see? Donald Trump (the puppeteer) and Michael Whatley (Trump’s puppet) are coming to Rocky Mount tomorrow. _That’s Roy Cooper’s backyard._ **[We need to show Whatley and Trump that their extreme agenda isn’t welcome in Rocky Mount — or anywhere. Can you rush $19 right now to show their MAGA megadonors that North Carolinians say NO to their policies and will say NO to them at the ballot box?>>>](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3094?t=7&akid=189%2E124072%2EA-PhSM)** The last time Trump led a rally, he spent his time _attacking_ Roy. Trump even called Roy a “radical left lunatic.” We can only guess what nonsensical names Trump will call Roy this time, but we do know this: He’s _terrified_ that Roy can beat his hand-picked candidate. **Peter, Michael Whatley has admitted he’s only running for Senate because Trump told him to.** He isn’t running to make your bill at Food Lion more affordable, or to get your health care costs down. All he cares about is rubber-stamping Trump’s agenda — _and making you pay for it._ **[North Carolina deserves better than a Trump puppet in the Senate. But we know that Trump’s attention on this race means Washington Republican donors are about to try EVEN HARDER to drown out Roy. Chip in $19 or any amount that works for you right now to tell Whatley and Trump that you REJECT their MAGA madness!](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3094?t=8&akid=189%2E124072%2EA-PhSM)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $19](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3096?t=9&akid=189%2E124072%2EA-PhSM)

Thanks for standing with us,
— Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=189%2E124072%2EA-PhSM)**

The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. name: Team WFP
subject: We’re Endorsing a Champion — Analilia for NJ-11!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
New Jersey is heading into a special election for Congress — and the timeline is moving fast. | | | Peter, New Jersey is heading into a special election for Congress — and the timeline is moving fast. After Mikie Sherrill was elected Governor in November, the seat representing New Jersey’s 11th Congressional District opened up, triggering a fast-moving, high-stakes special election with a primary on February 5 — just seven weeks away! With the party machine caught unprepared, this short timeline creates a real opening to elect a progressive who answers to working families, not party bosses. **Today, the Working Families Party is proud to announce our endorsement of Analilia Mejía for U.S. House in the special election for New Jersey’s 11th District** — because New Jersey deserves a representative with a proven record fighting for working families. **[But this special election is moving fast, and the window to win is short. We have weeks, not months, to organize and win. Split a donation between Analilia and the Working Families Party today — and help power a campaign built for working families.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9pkJ1qC-jywk6m5LGLFTL8WCbt1OsAUHAkpJ3Q6WapXCOLdhWYA8uP4dGFCF-Dv677qYXAtyeppq7zE2hEttEmHfDVX6i9IGhkYFih-A3liI7LLid-QfcerLuEf97Oa7C-_b0yNv6c0om9dI0mZtGelVGJDU8NDPBk8ISk8WMJmZWmR-lwDGCpAQvUfNBJYeFya_0r2SXejzRsa-5mZW-migRw0L7LXESefCyp7EUCHf5MVUEW9_mKky5ty87rVrgTNJNbIjgKV3HsuMdN6IkGVXJkUq1-NqAwRUYSHhIjPMCSaLn3lluEfiZv2McjXSA-Cq2fluYPD4_8r6-UJnWUQKxe-i8F90NqzVUwjEL1ntEdSth7h5fOSfaGwmH-dPZOtM1c73LVvH4jpjA-k6OKw/4mj/stoSfLjKSCKKeJltv3Wa-A/h0/h001.yxFvjPxmZ_idZms9KamC3ofbK1nfE92ZI4Fl1wynGao)** [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9pkJ1qC-jywk6m5LGLFTL8WCbt1OsAUHAkpJ3Q6WapXCOLdhWYA8uP4dGFCF-Dv677qYXAtyeppq7zE2hEttEmCLdu2sIfkYsMJaOImEc1bHLGreFhXuRmM1pIl6ORTmFeyDxWPWJKs_wk8NhWDU_NUnj3kz7uUc_TdGrvrnM-mRE_4q_KENNcKgIVJVB_qJGSp8wrroH0vZckxq7UCW4Z2gK8qTMo2GF4sC0SzCwd4-zMTpQ9XU5XUDEMc7mQfY5dj99tVzeq2vLR0K0W4UWIO2RabE1KB44KY6oH9VCgr9l-ZoJ9xfP_DzNr73gBWQl9Ha5iTbskzhZPgi0wN_z6jkOwmtzhY7tF0Kum-IKr7r8YMMkOYYKTKHD09JleQiai9jTwi0WiHQnFsKLUYwFEQ/4mj/stoSfLjKSCKKeJltv3Wa-A/h1/h001.Jyph5l2-S9wvRee2pxf-JVfESZZ3uLml5fUE7n8MEWc) **[Donate $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9pkJ1qC-jywk6m5LGLFTL8WCbt1OsAUHAkpJ3Q6WapXCOLdhWYA8uP4dGFCF-Dv67N66vnz2_uYPBXtTbkY3OvPsG3rxqa_bzLcaEdu5-SNAYrkrRYL0RyR75PlCv_OzNzrv-Kt6GOvEcEbeTwSL59n1JIEohhVdRaunLbS41Sk_wR0JYcvF1c7DvDK8dvtFaLdAJFpuZjWSN1Y2VblUTfMjPz_uPmXsh8Prex3LznrKB6OnZsbCrSxevzrnKLBrYhNOfYY_8PstY98MCUF3uNWBuY8grtwZc4XBW2qlrdHgoop5oQziX3O3CyYy4cICAJ9R29X3rchR4SANSYQsEmKgGgOUB1rOTHTGCXZ-MBGL9zjtf2rMHfhr9vtnbWDc5cs2bnzflumcct9lUEEarpg/4mj/stoSfLjKSCKKeJltv3Wa-A/h2/h001.Z7dpVS_g2xS-Qz20NmqYh5CtjiL6-p3A_Pj43BO7Wz8)** Analilia isn’t just another name on a ballot. She’s a Working Families champion — a fierce organizer, a strategic leader, and a proven force for real change. Before this campaign, Analilia served as the state director of the New Jersey Working Families Party, building grassroots power across the state and winning meaningful victories for working people. **And now we have an opportunity to send one of our very own to Congress.** During her time leading NJ WFP, Analilia helped secure policies that transformed everyday life for thousands of workers — winning campaigns for a $15 minimum wage and comprehensive paid sick days protections, and fighting to expand voting rights and accountability in state government. That’s the kind of leadership we need — real wins, not slogans. Analilia’s impact didn’t stop in New Jersey. She went on to serve as political director for Bernie Sanders’s 2020 campaign and Co-Executive Director of Popular Democracy, organizing alongside labor unions and earning the backing of the SEIU New Jersey State Council, representing over 20,000 essential workers. Analilia’s leadership has already helped win policies that put money in workers’ pockets and power in our communities — now, she’s ready to take that fight to the U.S. House of Representatives. **Her fight is our fight — for workers’ rights, for economic justice, for a democracy that belongs to everyday people, not corporate interests.** But here’s the truth: Endorsements don’t win elections. Campaigns like Analilia’s win when people like you, Peter, step up early to help build the infrastructure, fund the organizing, and show that working people are ready to fight for one of our own. **[Will you split a donation between Analilia Mejìa and the Working Families Party? Your support will fuel the campaign, organize voters across NJ-11, and make it clear that working families — not party bosses — are in clean_body: New Jersey is heading into a special election for Congress — and the timeline is moving fast. | | | Peter, New Jersey is heading into a special election for Congress — and the timeline is moving fast. After Mikie Sherrill was elected Governor in November, the seat representing New Jersey’s 11th Congressional District opened up, triggering a fast-moving, high-stakes special election with a primary on February 5 — just seven weeks away! With the party machine caught unprepared, this short timeline creates a real opening to elect a progressive who answers to working families, not party bosses. Today, the Working Families Party is proud to announce our endorsement of Analilia Mejía for U.S. House in the special election for New Jersey’s 11th District — because New Jersey deserves a representative with a proven record fighting for working families. Analilia isn’t just another name on a ballot. She’s a Working Families champion — a fierce organizer, a strategic leader, and a proven force for real change. Before this campaign, Analilia served as the state director of the New Jersey Working Families Party, building grassroots power across the state and winning meaningful victories for working people. And now we have an opportunity to send one of our very own to Congress. During her time leading NJ WFP, Analilia helped secure policies that transformed everyday life for thousands of workers — winning campaigns for a $15 minimum wage and comprehensive paid sick days protections, and fighting to expand voting rights and accountability in state government. That’s the kind of leadership we need — real wins, not slogans. Analilia’s impact didn’t stop in New Jersey. She went on to serve as political director for Bernie Sanders’s 2020 campaign and Co-Executive Director of Popular Democracy, organizing alongside labor unions and earning the backing of the SEIU New Jersey State Council, representing over 20,000 essential workers. Analilia’s leadership has already helped win policies that put money in workers’ pockets and power in our communities — now, she’s ready to take that fight to the U.S. House of Representatives. Her fight is our fight — for workers’ rights, for economic justice, for a democracy that belongs to everyday people, not corporate interests. But here’s the truth: Endorsements don’t win elections. Campaigns like Analilia’s win when people like you, Peter, step up early to help build the infrastructure, fund the organizing, and show that working people are ready to fight for one of our own. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via .
