I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now. = Hey folks, it’s Mark Kelly. Seven years ago, I was making a decision about whether I was going to run for the Senate. I knew it would be a lot of work. A lot of time away from home. A lot of time away from family. I knew it wouldn’t be easy. But after two years of Donald Trump and a Republican-held Senate doing just about everything he wanted, I knew I couldn’t sit on the sidelines. I had to do something. So, I ran. And, somehow, we won. And then we had to turn around and run all over again to win a full term after that. But thanks to your support, we won that one, too. I’m grateful every day that I get to wake up, walk out the door, and defend our people, our democracy, and our Constitution. It’s one of the greatest honors of my life. And I’ve never forgotten that I wouldn’t be here without your help. We’ve been in some tough fights before, but this one is different. The President of the United States threatened my life, personally. I’ve got the entire executive branch bearing down on me right now. After everything you’ve already done for me, I shouldn’t have to ask you for more. But that’s what I need to do. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mark Kelly and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you. name: Team Pramila
subject: NEW POLL: Medicare For All is broadly popular
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Across party lines, everyone can agree that our health care system is broken.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20251218-5719-footer&t=1&akid=5719%2E420207%2ECiYaZv)
Peter,
We just conducted the largest national poll on Medicare For All in years and the results are in:
**The people want Medicare For All.**
Our polling, which was reported in Politico this morning, shows that a solid majority of voters — including independents, an overwhelming 90% of Democrats, and even 1-in-5 Republicans — support universal health care.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251218.TuSKX7&refcode=em20251218-5719&t=2&akid=5719%2E420207%2ECiYaZv)
Pramila is taking these findings and will present it to members of Congress, but we wanted to give you the inside scoop first.
We found that voters, particularly in battleground districts, believe the current corporate, for-profit health care system is failing. 42% of voters spend over $300 a month on routine health care costs and 65% believe the federal government does too little to help people afford their health care.
Pramila’s poll also proves that Medicare For All candidates WIN in some of the most competitive districts. A Medicare For All Democratic candidate beats out a Republican by 52% to 46% in some districts where Trump won just last year.
If Democrats want to meet this moment and win, we have to take a bold, unapologetic stance in favor of Medicare For All. We have to say clearly that we are ready to take back control of our health care system from insurance corporations and Big Pharma, and finally deliver universal coverage that works for everyone.
**Pramila has been one of the leading champions of Medicare For All because she’s _always_ believed that health care should be a human right, not a privilege for the wealthiest few.** [**If you’re with her in taking on the insurance companies and Big Pharma so we can finally deliver on universal care, please pitch in to support our campaign today.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251218.TuSKX7&refcode=em20251218-5719&t=3&akid=5719%2E420207%2ECiYaZv)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251218.TuSKX7&amount=3&refcode=em20251218-5719&t=22&akid=5719%2E420207%2ECiYaZv)**
Thank you.
— Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20251218-5719-footer&t=23&refcode2=5719_420207_CiYaZv&akid=5719%2E420207%2ECiYaZv)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=5719%2E420207%2ECiYaZv)

name: Team Pou
subject: Raising prices like this is unacceptable
body:
And why we must take back the House

| |
---
Hi friend, In a move that surprises almost no one, MAGA is claiming that “affordability” is a made-up problem. Maybe that’s because _they’re not the ones paying the bills._ MAGA never had a plan to make life affordable, not years ago, not today, not ever. Instead, they're making it worse because they just don’t care. Their billionaire friends are raking in plenty through tax breaks while working families are being punished. Nellie has been talking about affordability her entire career. Because she’s lived it. And she has a proven record here in NJ and in DC. She has always worked to deliver lower health care costs, protect and strengthen Medicare and Medicaid, and fight for policies that actually help families breathe again. clean_body: And why we must take back the House | | Hi friend, In a move that surprises almost no one, MAGA is claiming that “affordability” is a made-up problem. Maybe that’s because they’re not the ones paying the bills. MAGA never had a plan to make life affordable, not years ago, not today, not ever. Instead, they're making it worse because they just don’t care. Their billionaire friends are raking in plenty through tax breaks while working families are being punished. Nellie has been talking about affordability her entire career. Because she’s lived it. And she has a proven record here in NJ and in DC. She has always worked to deliver lower health care costs, protect and strengthen Medicare and Medicaid, and fight for policies that actually help families breathe again. If you believe New Jersey deserves a representative fighting for real affordability, not excuses, we need your support. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thank you, Team Pou | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Peter,

A few weeks ago, I reached out about Bernie Sanders – the self-proclaimed democratic socialist – throwing his full endorsement behind Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan, his handpicked protégé in our U.S. Senate race.

**[If you missed it or meant to contribute but got busy,](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=133f3424a1d049f7ad21b0f9b8819eb2&_e=XLv-DSbaUOAhWdVgpK3MNMpbatKIIfHc7zCVQmETQb_p2_KSPnNy3FMvXc1HGiSfXQ2VOByjJg0rczzKz5bV6J7mn6ESasY33j5IGGMlEFU4Dv__HgOqnNzS7A0znB82IyjIcRSh-NslrPF55s0HtnEPoCdZV5TBeQv2APmohFbpVtdOP3NIOcOLuZz05QvR2VWJVR4-UI3OLnjIrT9PKEj4TSNoRmhgFvoWF7yhHzSc1zpIJlu1q6M-2fTRi8uRMvGu6knkoL235bDulHO85sLzhXihww5nQTsGRHUQyeHb-o6HJ78pbNWrF9Q7VPE3cA1JZT3a38bGMU65DqGotLCLhjr4urg64Yxllzg479GFYwpajGj-c8ugGTuzkfn3nWUHeZzt2rka727NuBShXKL1GwM6ZRBBjC9GVzTC8CVRWPqAqagPepz5rBld3i0rsYcEXhdqRpgApXpaH5n7V3WMQszEU-Rv5s1Y5fN2BlOK95HEqbrB51lU9ihsstVN6q2S4O1wWzSAW9cXjzPrT50S2ngFfx0i9pK8-WB9DpNrTCNtJooe-EXTn7zNF-Ml6rN3m3S-kPC5nh4TEhgvNqKqHn-u52rlWS1MQ5fEFUy0-S9F1aBimWD7HUE5_PTDLdWDR7CqP66nM1-TspXFGEMhcqmt9S6L2QGkg7C5IPUSGqWpot22OeHY8OI24UnfV9U3PoHXQwPQ0zlF48leoCTt7TW3u4WXcnP4OfEIMBSWgo-xnRGpTmjhD6i_iJt2BMKeArI1efvcvf3FCX8A61gh4AORc8NXP-pqEHj0bGs%3D)** I wanted to follow up because this race is heating up quickly, and we can't let Bernie's political machine steamroll Minnesota.

In his endorsement, Sanders praised Flanagan as the fighter to “stand up for working people against the billionaires and corporate interests.”

**Translation:** She's his choice to push government-run healthcare, massive tax hikes on job creators, a crushing minimum wage, and more big-government overreach.

That's the same socialism I battled against in my nine deployments as a Navy SEAL Officer – from combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman to deterring threats in the Middle East and beyond.

**I’ve seen socialism destroy economies up close:** families going hungry under government control, personal initiative crushed by bureaucracy, and freedom sacrificed for empty promises.

_**I risked everything to defend American capitalism – the system that made our country the greatest on Earth.**_

Now, as the underdog Republican with a real shot to flip this Senate seat for the first time in decades, **[I'm asking again: If you believe capitalism is still worth defending, can you invest in our campaign today?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=133f3424a1d049f7ad21b0f9b8819eb2&_e=XLv-DSbaUOAhWdVgpK3MNMpbatKIIfHc7zCVQmETQb_p2_KSPnNy3FMvXc1HGiSfXQ2VOByjJg0rczzKz5bV6J7mn6ESasY33j5IGGMlEFU4Dv__HgOqnNzS7A0znB82IyjIcRSh-NslrPF55s0HtnEPoCdZV5TBeQv2APmohFbpVtdOP3NIOcOLuZz05QvR2VWJVR4-UI3OLnjIrT9PKEj4TSNoRmhgFvoWF7yhHzSc1zpIJlu1q6M-2fTRi8uRMvGu6knkoL235bDulHO85sLzhXihww5nQTsGRHUQyeHf5n-VyP1UhpCuc-2Aq_z3gAuh5x3WVnrrOIVOeuQ_d9OsmnEvb1rx9-n68BIg1hyk-6ROXQ3M_N90QDZMdpU-fDv4Kuxf0paqwZDA6I0o9jbVBwo0-LhX3uTMYMVMjydiCtmbbMHXBhkWesPV2_wcn8GpwaFLfZ7yRBlUtHQluulzktot6TSCWnrm3Orc99kHAVl3j2BlkvD-oBYH5F9lvVI_g4zS-tSyCG8IwDsB2G-CuYKso5jQqhkfYV-3sHrBU0SxsxhXkiK0FtFQOI3UtHnP4BUZsmsHNlQXZZ5BD_l27RqBC0oAOzQXF-1koP1duiHJNvbU3anzP6Lw1mh4yo7eEodWOFOpF9V87x7Sjy5SCZdNbpiQnSTs0w-ebGw3mKgl91OihbjYbMqZva-gR2sAvON39nbIx2fnJeJTsJkY9qNG8ftDcD3sl9imvWBTVlbpOvirY5ul3QRnqlxImQIZzEjVHxy2gJsyBWX3csz_sygzGQaVbqFTrKavHZc%3D)**

**My opponent's record under Tim Walz is clear:**
* She fought to weaken ICE and open our borders – while fentanyl pours in, killing over 1,200 Minnesotans annually.

* With Bernie's full support, she's pushing to nationalize healthcare and tax away our prosperity.

President Trump is already delivering: tariffs on China, secured borders, and energy dominance.

He needs reinforcements in the Senate – warriors like me who've faced real adversaries, not invented them in Washington.

_**I'm Adam Schwarze – Marine, SEAL, nuclear strategist, and proud capitalist fighter.**_

clean_body: Did you see this last time? I’ve fought socialism overseas as a Navy SEAL – now Bernie Sanders is backing my far-left opponent to bring it here. | Peter, A few weeks ago, I reached out about Bernie Sanders – the self-proclaimed democratic socialist – throwing his full endorsement behind Lt. Gov. Peggy Flanagan, his handpicked protégé in our U.S. Senate race. I wanted to follow up because this race is heating up quickly, and we can't let Bernie's political machine steamroll Minnesota. In his endorsement, Sanders praised Flanagan as the fighter to “stand up for working people against the billionaires and corporate interests.” Translation: She's his choice to push government-run healthcare, massive tax hikes on job creators, a crushing minimum wage, and more big-government overreach. That's the same socialism I battled against in my nine deployments as a Navy SEAL Officer – from combat tours in Iraq as a Marine infantryman to deterring threats in the Middle East and beyond. I’ve seen socialism destroy economies up close: families going hungry under government control, personal initiative crushed by bureaucracy, and freedom sacrificed for empty promises. I risked everything to defend American capitalism – the system that made our country the greatest on Earth. Now, as the underdog Republican with a real shot to flip this Senate seat for the first time in decades, Even $5, $10, or $25 makes a huge difference right now. My opponent's record under Tim Walz is clear: She fought to weaken ICE and open our borders – while fentanyl pours in, killing over 1,200 Minnesotans annually. With Bernie's full support, she's pushing to nationalize healthcare and tax away our prosperity. President Trump is already delivering: tariffs on China, secured borders, and energy dominance. He needs reinforcements in the Senate – warriors like me who've faced real adversaries, not invented them in Washington. I'm Adam Schwarze – Marine, SEAL, nuclear strategist, and proud capitalist fighter. Recent polls show a Republican within striking distance. But to counter Bernie's hundreds of millions and endless donor list, we need immediate financial firepower. Your support today fuels the next wave of American strength and helps bury Bernie's radical agenda right here in Minnesota. In service, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan P.S: Deterrence only works if the other side knows you'll follow through. Bernie fears a fighter like me in the Senate. FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

This email is unlike anything I've ever sent you before.

No, this isn't about a campaign or an election.

I'm sending you an urgent message about an organization I'm personally supporting, The Atlas Society.

Their CEO, Jennifer Grossman, has been my friend for thirty years -- we got our start in cable news together in the mid-1990s, and she later hired my firm to do polling when she worked at Dole Food Company. Through ups and downs, we've remained friends.

Today, she's the CEO of The Atlas Society, a non-profit organization whose mission is to spread Ayn Rand's message of capitalism, personal responsibility, reason, and entrepreneurship to young people. **[I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 to support the mission. Why is The Atlas Society's mission so important?

If my career in polling and serving as President Trump's 2016 Campaign Manager taught me anything, it's this: Americans are _**desperate**_ to hear the unfiltered truth.

**This is why we need more young people to hear The Atlas Society 's message. Here is what Jennifer and her organization are fighting for:**

* Free market capitalism
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

Our culture is pushing a twisted message of victimization, envy, woke nonsense, socialism, class warfare, and hatred for our country and its founding principles.

Young people need an alternative.

The Atlas Society spreads Ayn Rand's message to millions of young people via social media, video content, graphic novels, conferences, and so much more.

I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 for The Atlas Society, which is why I am reaching out to you. Please consider making a donation by using one of the links I've copied below:

clean_body: This email is unlike anything I've ever sent you before. No, this isn't about a campaign or an election. I'm sending you an urgent message about an organization I'm personally supporting, The Atlas Society. Their CEO, Jennifer Grossman, has been my friend for thirty years -- we got our start in cable news together in the mid-1990s, and she later hired my firm to do polling when she worked at Dole Food Company. Through ups and downs, we've remained friends. Today, she's the CEO of The Atlas Society, a non-profit organization whose mission is to spread Ayn Rand's message of capitalism, personal responsibility, reason, and entrepreneurship to young people. Why is The Atlas Society's mission so important? If my career in polling and serving as President Trump's 2016 Campaign Manager taught me anything, it's this: Americans are desperate to hear the unfiltered truth. This is why we need more young people to hear The Atlas Society 's message. Here is what Jennifer and her organization are fighting for: Free market capitalism Respect for achievement and success Free speech The future of young people and our great country Our culture is pushing a twisted message of victimization, envy, woke nonsense, socialism, class warfare, and hatred for our country and its founding principles. Young people need an alternative. The Atlas Society spreads Ayn Rand's message to millions of young people via social media, video content, graphic novels, conferences, and so much more. I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 for The Atlas Society, which is why I am reaching out to you. Please consider making a donation by using one of the links I've copied below: You may be surprised, but when young people hear Ayn Rand's message of entrepreneurship, refusing to be a victim, and personal achievement, they are inspired and want to learn more. Yes, politics are important. But politics are downstream from culture. And culture is downstream from philosophy. The Atlas Society is on the frontlines of fighting in the philosophical culture war, which may determine the fate of the country's future. We CANNOT give up the culture or give up young people. This is more important than a campaign or a single election. You and I must invest in reaching young people with this message. Please don't wait to take action. My goal is to raise this $25,000 ASAP within a 48-hour period. Can I count on you to make a donation? Kellyanne Conway, Former Senior Counselor to President Trump The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible. 1038 Miwok Dr Lodi, CA 95240

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121554216/589830062/-2063340125?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjc0NDI0NC01OWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MyGXxah0z-lNxDUd-af_f4M2l_AoljRkn1HmB4lNTl4=)
Friend,

As we approach the end of the year, I know you must be receiving a lot of messages from candidates across the country. While the upcoming final FEC deadline of the year is important for our race, right now I want to share what I’ve been up to in IL-13 this past month.

**This is why I’m in Congress -- to connect with Illinoisans and take their concerns back to Washington so I can fight for them.** Right now, we’re days away from ACA premiums skyrocketing, and the affordability crisis is only getting worse.

I’m taking these issues to heart. **[Your continued support means everything as we push forward into the midterm election year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121554217/589830063/-2063340125?refcode=em-12.18.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjc0NDI0NC01OWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MyGXxah0z-lNxDUd-af_f4M2l_AoljRkn1HmB4lNTl4=)**

Thank you,

Nikki
| **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121554218/589830064/-2063340125?refcode=em-12.18.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjc0NDI0NC01OWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MyGXxah0z-lNxDUd-af_f4M2l_AoljRkn1HmB4lNTl4=)**
---

* * *

I was proud to stand arm-in-arm with Granite City steelworkers to demand better from U.S. Steel -- we put on the pressure and reinstated 400+ jobs, keeping this important manufacturing work local.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121554219/589830065/-2063340125?refcode=em-12.18.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjc0NDI0NC01OWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MyGXxah0z-lNxDUd-af_f4M2l_AoljRkn1HmB4lNTl4=)
I was honored to deliver the 2025 Morton-Kenney Public Affairs Lecture, hosted by the Paul Simon Public Policy Institute at Southern Illinois University. I shared experience from my internship for Senator Simon to my work in Congress supporting working families and the importance of strengthening Illinois’ economy.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121554220/589830066/-2063340125?refcode=em-12.18.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjc0NDI0NC01OWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MyGXxah0z-lNxDUd-af_f4M2l_AoljRkn1HmB4lNTl4=)
I had a great time with students from the University of Illinois to discuss my work in Congress to lower costs and undo the cuts Trump made in the Big Ugly Bill that hurt them. Keeping young people involved in our politics is crucial.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121554221/589830067/-2063340125?refcode=em-12.18.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjc0NDI0NC01OWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MyGXxah0z-lNxDUd-af_f4M2l_AoljRkn1HmB4lNTl4=)
I am honored to share that I have received the endorsement of the Illinois AFL-CIO. As a union member myself, I understand the importance of making sure that hard work leads to a good life -- and I’m leading the charge in Congress.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121554222/589830068/-2063340125?refcode=em-12.18.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjc0NDI0NC01OWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MyGXxah0z-lNxDUd-af_f4M2l_AoljRkn1HmB4lNTl4=)
Coming back to the district is what powers my work in Washington. As we look toward the election year, my resolve is only strengthened for the fights ahead -- rising ACA premiums, the growing affordability crisis, and attacks on working families and our democracy.

**[If you’re with me, I’d really appreciate your support with a $3 donation today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121554223/589830069/-2063340125?refcode=em-12.18.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjc0NDI0NC01OWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MyGXxah0z-lNxDUd-af_f4M2l_AoljRkn1HmB4lNTl4=)**

Thank you -- and more to come,

Nikki

clean_body: | = Friend, As we approach the end of the year, I know you must be receiving a lot of messages from candidates across the country. While the upcoming final FEC deadline of the year is important for our race, right now I want to share what I’ve been up to in IL-13 this past month. This is why I’m in Congress -- to connect with Illinoisans and take their concerns back to Washington so I can fight for them. Right now, we’re days away from ACA premiums skyrocketing, and the affordability crisis is only getting worse. I’m taking these issues to heart. = Thank you, Nikki | = I was proud to stand arm-in-arm with Granite City steelworkers to demand better from U.S. Steel -- we put on the pressure and reinstated 400+ jobs, keeping this important manufacturing work local. = I was honored to deliver the 2025 Morton-Kenney Public Affairs Lecture, hosted by the Paul Simon Public Policy Institute at Southern Illinois University. I shared experience from my internship for Senator Simon to my work in Congress supporting working families and the importance of strengthening Illinois’ economy. = I had a great time with students from the University of Illinois to discuss my work in Congress to lower costs and undo the cuts Trump made in the Big Ugly Bill that hurt them. Keeping young people involved in our politics is crucial. = I am honored to share that I have received the endorsement of the Illinois AFL-CIO. As a union member myself, I understand the importance of making sure that hard work leads to a good life -- and I’m leading the charge in Congress. = Coming back to the district is what powers my work in Washington. As we look toward the election year, my resolve is only strengthened for the fights ahead -- rising ACA premiums, the growing affordability crisis, and attacks on working families and our democracy. = Thank you -- and more to come, Nikki =** | = = = Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America. Now, she’s delivering in Congress for the people of Illinois' 13th Congressional District. = To learn more about Nikki and her commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Nikki for Congress Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States

subject: Trump doesn't want people like me in the U.S. Senate, Peter

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121554231/589830186/2072070277?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.18_Long-Bio-Rehash_B2_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWEyMTI3Mi01OWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_9Ye7IQk9r8PZ5DS6i7VQBBpCk6pNPIm9qI8p3VHcg=)
These emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. If you'd prefer, you can [unsubscribe here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/K-_-4uI0EkWyg9pVsZKBKQ2?unsubscribedata=2QRoRCyMrKOIaKT71pzMJ8tYE2Dt9YtJiQ6ZaXLhmcQ%2BqyJsYsO2LnDnj9Eqy9ZuVQKosZPuI4CSls8iGQf%2FBuhAgFs9ZxfPfDg12tWd7bEdfOBOoxwuQ4tcvpS2xBHroT3QMNrA0t6T1VYaGpmTWzYmof4ecJ2XX0TuDFb3FSNEN61wCKB%2Fad0nSDfoxTGkv1wDe5OqqEkgSM1%2FA9MHQ7Cj%2Firc5cNc%2BsyTyuJEjpuEhRRNoQ2XRGcH%2FlnbfJuOTsPX8RiWXZlZz1RXAKPwOKPIo9NYg%2F%2B4PSeOQlOjG6zd4WYEIjUtBBN7bjfGRLQ3L%2FXJRdBFd7Exl76mrrxRi7Tdg0CMtJrpukzrZTgLiIBAfvanCsE16V8Auiu0%2FBttFXCXaqWQ%2FXgQelJ1Ci8W1Uuw5QLY7D2j5RFcDQSkfgr09Ey5wx59qINzD9RtPATe).
**Hi Peter. Democratic Senate Candidate Raja Krishnamoorthi here. I know there’s a lot going on right now, and I’m sure you’re getting a lot of emails from candidates like me. But I hope you’ll take a few minutes to read this message to learn a bit more about me, **[**_and chip in $25 now to flip the Senate blue >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121554232/589830187/527259264?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.18_Long-Bio-Rehash_B2_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWEyMTI3Mi01OWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_9Ye7IQk9r8PZ5DS6i7VQBBpCk6pNPIm9qI8p3VHcg=) Let me start by reintroducing myself. I’m a racial, religious, ethnic minority immigrant with 29 letters in my name. Growing up in Peoria, Illinois, I often felt like an outsider because of my identity. My mother always dressed in a sari. My parents spoke Tamil, a South Indian language, most of the time. We ate different food than everyone around us — we even traveled with our rice cooker. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121554233/589830188/527259264?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.18_Long-Bio-Rehash_B2_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWEyMTI3Mi01OWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_9Ye7IQk9r8PZ5DS6i7VQBBpCk6pNPIm9qI8p3VHcg=) Despite our outward differences, the community in Peoria embraced us. I went to public schools in Peoria’s District 150 — there weren't a lot of people who looked like me playing sports back then, but I earned a starting spot on the football team my freshman year of high school. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121554234/589830189/527259264?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.18_Long-Bio-Rehash_B2_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWEyMTI3Mi01OWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_9Ye7IQk9r8PZ5DS6i7VQBBpCk6pNPIm9qI8p3VHcg=) **My parents worked incredibly hard to give us a better life, but fell on hard times. So, we lived for a time in Public Housing to keep a roof over our heads and depended on SNAP to eat.** Thanks to these essential safety net programs, we were able to make it through. That’s something I’ll _never_ take for granted. With the help of my community, government programs, and the money I saved working at McDonalds — I went to college, and eventually graduated from Law School. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121554235/589830190/527259264?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.18_Long-Bio-Rehash_B2_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWEyMTI3Mi01OWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_9Ye7IQk9r8PZ5DS6i7VQBBpCk6pNPIm9qI8p3VHcg=) Growing up, every night at the dinner table inside, my father would say: “ _Think of the greatness of this country. Whatever you do, make sure this country is there for the next families who need it_.” Now, I’m raising my own family here in Illinois, and that’s the ethos I bring into Congress everyday. Because every family – regardless of who they are, where they live, or how many letters are in their last name – deserves the chance to work hard and succeed. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121554236/589830191/527259264?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.18_Long-Bio-Rehash_B2_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWEyMTI3Mi01OWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_9Ye7IQk9r8PZ5DS6i7VQBBpCk6pNPIm9qI8p3VHcg=) Honestly Peter, there aren’t a lot of people who look like me or have stories like mine in the Senate. **Donald Trump and his far-right MAGA maniacs don’t want to see folks like me succeed, let alone be elected to the U.S. Senate. ** **But I refuse to let people like them win. So now, I’m running for the United States Senate to hold Donald Trump accountable and fight for a better future for hardworking Americans.** [**_Peter, if you’ve read this far, I hope I can count on you to join me in this fight. Please, before midnight, can you chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can afford to help fund my Senate campaign, win this election and flip the Senate blue?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121554237/589830192/527259264?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.18_Long-Bio-Rehash_B2_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWEyMTI3Mi01OWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_9Ye7IQk9r8PZ5DS6i7VQBBpCk6pNPIm9qI8p3VHcg=) | | [ DONATE $10 → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121554238/589830193/527259264?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.18_Long-Bio-Rehash_B2_F1_S1_C1_30CL-365DON_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWEyMTI3Mi01OWRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_9Ye7IQk9r8PZ5DS6i7VQBBpCk6pNPIm9qI8p3VHcg=)

clean_body: = These emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. If you'd prefer, you can . Hi Peter. Democratic Senate Candidate Raja Krishnamoorthi here. I know there’s a lot going on right now, and I’m sure you’re getting a lot of emails from candidates like me. But I hope you’ll take a few minutes to read this message to learn a bit more about me, = Let me start by reintroducing myself. I’m a racial, religious, ethnic minority immigrant with 29 letters in my name. Growing up in Peoria, Illinois, I often felt like an outsider because of my identity. My mother always dressed in a sari. My parents spoke Tamil, a South Indian language, most of the time. We ate different food than everyone around us — we even traveled with our rice cooker. = Despite our outward differences, the community in Peoria embraced us. I went to public schools in Peoria’s District 150 — there weren't a lot of people who looked like me playing sports back then, but I earned a starting spot on the football team my freshman year of high school. = My parents worked incredibly hard to give us a better life, but fell on hard times. So, we lived for a time in Public Housing to keep a roof over our heads and depended on SNAP to eat. Thanks to these essential safety net programs, we were able to make it through. That’s something I’ll never take for granted. With the help of my community, government programs, and the money I saved working at McDonalds — I went to college, and eventually graduated from Law School. = Growing up, every night at the dinner table inside, my father would say: “ Think of the greatness of this country. Whatever you do, make sure this country is there for the next families who need it.” Now, I’m raising my own family here in Illinois, and that’s the ethos I bring into Congress everyday. Because every family – regardless of who they are, where they live, or how many letters are in their last name – deserves the chance to work hard and succeed. = Honestly Peter, there aren’t a lot of people who look like me or have stories like mine in the Senate. Donald Trump and his far-right MAGA maniacs don’t want to see folks like me succeed, let alone be elected to the U.S. Senate. But I refuse to let people like them win. So now, I’m running for the United States Senate to hold Donald Trump accountable and fight for a better future for hardworking Americans. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your continued support, Raja | Democrat Raja Krishnamoorthi is running for Senate in Illinois to fight back against Donald Trump and the far-right MAGA movement, protect critical programs like Social Security and Medicare, and rebuild the middle class. But Republicans will spend MILLIONS to flip this seat red. We need every single person reading this email to do their part to fight back against Trump and Flip the Senate Majority BLUE. = | | = | = These emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. If you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, click here. If you'd prefer, you can . If you'd like to donate, =. Raja for IL PO Box 681202 Schaumburg, IL 60168 United States | mailto:info@rajaforil.com | PAID FOR BY RAJA FOR ILLINOIS

name: James Talarico
subject: Sincerely asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
John Cornyn is attacking me (again).
This time, he’s mad I said billionaires should not be allowed to buy elections and rig the system.
I don’t think billionaires need politicians to defend them. And yes, I’ve been very clear about what I will do in the U.S. Senate: Take power away from billionaires and corporations and give it back to working people.
These attacks are no surprise coming from John Cornyn — a politician who has relied on corporate and billionaire-funded super PACs to keep him in power despite his unpopular policies.
There are few puppet politicians as corrupt as John Cornyn, who just this summer sold out working Texans — gutting SNAP and Medicaid to give his mega-donors yet another tax break.
This is sadly what Texans have come to expect from Senator Cornyn. These desperate smears are a reminder that our opponents and their mega-donors are willing to say whatever it takes to defeat our movement.
And they’re going to have a war chest of billionaire and corporate money to help them do it. This race will be absurdly expensive, and the only way we’re going to win is with lots and lots of people like you giving small amounts of money.
[**So I’m sincerely asking for your support. Please consider making a contribution to fuel our people-powered movement. It would mean a lot to me.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251218-1-ak&t=1&akid=325%2E1347274%2E4vdTe3)

| Peter,

House Republicans have a full-blown crisis on their hands.

Members are resigning. Others are announcing they won’t run again. And the ones sticking around? They’re too busy fighting each other to actually govern.

This is what happens when a party is powered by chaos instead of solutions. The MAGA takeover is tearing the GOP apart from the inside – and they know it. That’s why they’re jumping ship before the whole thing sinks.

I see their dysfunction as an opportunity.

As Chair of BOLD PAC, I’m working to recruit and elect Democrats in the districts where the GOP is weakest – including the very seats being vacated because Republicans can’t keep their own House in order.

But if we’re going to flip the House in 2026, we need the resources to compete right now while the GOP is in freefall.

body:

Last spring, I released my first book "[Chasing After The Wind](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26991524.13860.1.2dd6045fd0adf79044b1d03d87402234)" and so many of you encouraged me to keep writing. _So I did..._ My 2nd book is now **FINISHED**! It's entitled '[DIVIDED: BREAKING FREE FROM THE DOUBLE LIFE](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26991524.13861.1.6c9ed3924e016ed9acaa3e9adf044792).' **Pastor Paula White-Cain** wrote an _incredible_ Foreword and **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** gave an _amazing_ Endorsement. In this, I open up about _my own personal struggles_ as a follower of Jesus and a Pastor. I share things that I've never shared publicly in hopes that it will speak to people who might be ashamed with the different struggles they have even as Christians and how to have victory. There are two of us in all of us but we're not destined to live **DIVIDED** forever. As a thank you for your support, I've got a promo code (**SHERIDAN**) that you can use to save 30% off the pre-order at checkout. I believe this book will help many people overcome the double life that far too many of us live. Thank you -Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer

Every one of us lives with tension - the tug-of-war between the two of us living in all of us. In DIVIDED, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer gets real, raw, and deeply relatable as he opens up about his own struggles with pride, anger, and failure while chasing God's purpose. Through humor, honesty, and hard-learned wisdom, Lahmeyer invites readers to drop the mask, confront the "dark me" that keeps surfacing, and experience the transforming power of grace. This is not a polished preacher's pep talk-it's a gut-level, heart-to-heart conversation about what it means to follow Jesus when life gets messy. Drawing from the lives of biblical characters like Peter, Jacob and Paul, Lahmeyer shows that even the greatest heroes of faith had moments of weakness, doubt, and defeat. He unpacks the difference between remorse and repentance, explores how belief shapes behavior, and reveals how identity-not effort-is the key to lasting transformation. With vivid stories, relatable honesty, and the truth of Scripture, he reminds us that God isn't looking for the perfect version of you-He's after the real you. Because the moment you get real with God is the moment He starts making you new. If you've ever felt like you're living two lives-the public you that looks strong and the private you that's barely hanging on-this book is for you. DIVIDED will help you see that failure isn't final, temptation isn't sin, and your past doesn't disqualify your purpose. You'll laugh, you'll be challenged, and you'll find hope in the God who meets you where you are but never leaves you there. Honest, gritty, and full of grace, this book will inspire you to feed the right wolf, renew your mind, and finally live as the "you" God designed you to be.
---

clean_body: | | | We can’t wait for others to save us. Friend, we are well past the point of subtle warnings. Our democracy is under a direct, rapid, and relentless assault orchestrated by MAGA fools and Donald Trump, the two-bit tin potter, felon, and fraud who thinks he’s a king. A recent confirms what we see clearly: the US is showing a "rapid authoritarian shift." This isn't hyperbole; this is the reality of a political system facing weakened rule of law, growing constraints on civil liberties, and an accelerated erosion of the checks and balances that protect us. The time for polite disagreement is over. Trump and the Republicans are turning us into an idiocracy! Cedar Key Progress is fighting back with a massive, high-impact billboard campaign that will plaster Impeach Trump Now! across the nation's highways and city centers. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. We need to remind every elected official that they work for us , not for the most corrupt president in American history. We need to show the country that the fight to save our democracy is alive, loud, and uncompromising. name: Katie Porter
subject: Will you be who I call next?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Peter,
I’m going to be calling some of my grassroots supporters to say thank you and to hear from them directly about what they want to see us do to stand up to Donald Trump and bring down costs for families.
Please chip in any amount and then you might get a call from me to say thank you!
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20251218_1_ak?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251118_1_ak.nj2gkw&refcode=em20251218-40584&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=40584%2E3422442%2EdeSZu-)**
I can’t self-fund this campaign like my billionaire opponent.
We’re building this campaign the right way—with grassroots donations from people who believe that California deserves a governor who is fighting to make this state more affordable for everyone.
Thank you,
Katie
P.S. Keep your ringers on and look out for an Irvine area code!

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40584&t=2&akid=40584%2E3422442%2EdeSZu-)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=40584)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=40584&t=3&akid=40584%2E3422442%2EdeSZu-)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

FFPC #1479597

subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

| | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/D4mWugZUFVBZlqZ5McjCgTYuTwZhe7ROzvc4th_hxlKs3wAwWBxZFw64SEcr_rQeDr8VuFSeo4n0nEffEqdyqIqo0cNSfigEYcwShQqeya__AbiSRRX4DCEKJLmvehw3BcLLWsOGuEoX6R4HH247bf5Nkg4F1VpC41wEgwFjNwryn957D4iNPsM_/dz7Es1msOnI5mn2U5sAh9JaPLD0l8nfY/15)_
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/9lKwv2d0NnvmTE0_laEBoRdpSjLPWWe3Y8ye8fz3VGGlRG9MeN2_kQMn1GIdYSLUhDAyqJc-xCeMy9VhyJPMLBWHpHpdfUnNqL6vwnP6Y1aVZpc9YTHuTunFSaPYyNVxc4GVWuvmx06BLdiRK5x10ltVvuLGbfQihzO2puB0LfldHQ2paKyi7z0kpB8snAesLzfnykKikswm97UsfTJ1u6P_IA3YPQ01ZYHXF0KqA_z6xeyd2NbHW0dn9dlCe3f2j-5LT2vJWka6XCYQ_MfrOPR-0w_OXqn-lNmjXA8VvkOzPtt6thxxNHxolVoBCGX3VLQqi-fiPslVPLtAgZJUbOwtL1uUQD8nTVH1O83Otvr9AmVWmQEjwlmuJqOT-9PIiGd32A0TFT0IPfqeach70BGpjDZrYqUIxjQ0yTF8EnzJymHT52_ohjLMfJGDkyNneTsyqSVcjbJFxdEEDkwnGPn5oEzTJuiUp2o60-EJdeZJQUBLRUhENebpIJBQbtdkDEPS4GU3OfA7hkDiZJQMMs_qwQH4r4csbScC6EZDxFGDFahVwYfpOGVMrJ8LiGdcHY4dQHiTwwuaYmZsHSAYgzYr9c29nIBwjzDZeYh25FftYLLLQUjtNPK9362GWMikGjs3Z1S6geM1ZDnGm21CFeCqaLr_9r4mMXBYKRFFvSb9e-Nctw/B0KpTfd5y8H-IIgU4EDizmS8oLjMql-8/15)
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

In 2023 alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Recently, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/KxPy5UDEQufOK9JTkgAGZfaFAbi-JxqbarkxvW0ffr3GKMHSEK4iycoykSjekQ80BbTbWNgInBV1XMnAeICl94VjlmSYeAKIDsm8OyVdTd7TOn3c_rOQrx4JGGToajdr1RCwo-rlYNXvMPZqgEfGk9r1Yqf17TnrhwouVOVRnSOgCYcuiDchEbVL5trHHD-p7KjBcDvzjtm8mGkThrEYOh_Nh2GnvzyWsYhtko-EwgJ0VOX6LTEfDbfl7GVH1DQdNXmi_vh5PqdvxIgTIBGxtNe5LbxLuFe5Yps-fzA-8DirUn9lQXcAHuXAe35PLVWo0IMsgdPEQAVP-c_R9VzjGUcHAekdacZuoTIi_-cSGYYtwWcIs3uYq5jhpxTrHiDjCV8SY5BGLM8VL42oeMcDk3F69bzoNoZuGcFiDnhcc3IjcFgTIPonL_gP6zkP6ThTAEux1HZ_Ds9osV2VcNPKA_m_BTC86MyfV6UC492dx7oZeqvz2EHOU-ey5qJyCNaexo1cS_A4J5YLMFCuuIoxkSDkhQQU8HW93VGzrYhMXwRBkvOF2Drg4bq8stMuMvANIvSdve8utCRpCrFr-1XI_swO-N_xbXp49CQf2ytEN0TJ1PuHhMrKv1ufbBs9DMM7rWwiM6PVUCNbkDwaGvjWJ54s7JRc-IeBTXqhnPGatSf9kjVrDA/BPsZ78s8eG0nG_OJPxDL3SCyLFgkv2KL/15)

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Donald Trump has gone too far →
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251218-1745-foote&t=1001&akid=1745%2E342411%2EDdgAaR ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Donald Trump has gone too far.

His hateful attacks on Representative Ilhan Omar — and Somali immigrants —
have crossed a line. Recently, he even called them “garbage.” We will not
stay silent.

The Squad Victory Fund is standing up for our progressive champions and
our Somali community. But we can’t do it alone. We need your voice to show
Trump and his MAGA machine that we are united, we are strong, and we will
not back down.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/defend-somali-immigrants/?source=em20251218-1745&t=1002&akid=1745%2E342411%2EDdgAaR ]Will you sign our petition today to defend Somali immigrants and make
it clear: hate has no place in our country? Every signature sends a
message that these attacks on our community will not go unanswered.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/defend-somali-immigrants/?source=em20251218-1745&t=1003&akid=1745%2E342411%2EDdgAaR ]ADD YOUR NAME

Together, we can fight back, stand with Ilhan Omar, and defend Somali
immigrants from Trump’s attacks.

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1745%2E342411%2EDdgAaR

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Redistricting Action
subject: What’s happening in Utah has no place in a democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Anti-democracy forces are refusing to back down — so neither can we.
|
---

_Today, we’re in the midst of a redistricting crisis — and our democracy needs to be actively defended every day. That’s why All On The Line is now**Redistricting Action** — a grassroots movement built for the critical fights ahead. Thank you for being part of it._
Peter,
Extreme politicians are ramping up their attacks on fair maps — and they’ve shown they’re willing to go after anybody who stands in the way of their brazen attempts to gerrymander.
The latest example comes out of Utah, where a judge struck down a gerrymandered map in favor of a fairer map that reflects the will of the people. Twenty minutes after this ruling, a Utah politician introduced a bill to impeach Judge Dianna Gibson — simply for upholding the rule of law and making a fair-minded decision.

subject: How was your 2025? We genuinely want to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
This will only take a moment

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1678%2E49239%2EQeBdPV)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10619?t=2&akid=1678%2E49239%2EQeBdPV)
---
We want to hear from you, null!
Haley has talked to countless Michiganders on the campaign trail this year, but **we still haven't heard from one very important person: YOU!**
That's why we launched a new short survey to hear about your 2025. Your priorities and feedback are critical to the success of this grassroots campaign – **[will you take a moment and answer a few quick questions about your year?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10620?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=1678%2E49239%2EQeBdPV)**
[**We need 75 responses from Cresco before midnight tonight to reach statistical significance. Looking forward to hearing from you, null:**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10620?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=1678%2E49239%2EQeBdPV)
| | [Take the Survey](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10620?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1678%2E49239%2EQeBdPV)
---
Thanks for your help,

Team Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10634?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1678%2E49239%2EQeBdPV) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10619?t=7&akid=1678%2E49239%2EQeBdPV)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

body:

We are living in unprecedented times. Never before has our country faced such deep threats to our democracy.

Health insurance costs are ballooning because they took money out of health care for a tax cut for rich people. People are worried about making ends meet. Housing costs are skyrocketing.

Meanwhile, Trump and his allies in Congress are more interested in going after their rivals than fixing these economic crises.

**It's a lot, and I understand why you might want a break.**

But we can’t afford to disengage or turn away. There are too many important fights that we must continue to wage — for an economy that works for everyone, for our democracy, and for the health and safety of us all.

**The future is not set; it is up to us, and we can make all the difference.**

And there are good reasons for hope. Millions of Americans have come out to protest against the president. Courts are ruling in our favor. And we scored important victories last month in California, New Jersey, and Virginia.

[**To prepare for the battles ahead, I'm humbly asking for your support today. So please, can I count on you to chip in any amount you can to Lisa Blunt Rochester and me to support my fight to defend our democracy and deliver for working people? Your support makes a huge difference ahead of our quarterly deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121556093/589836493/-673821994?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.18_Schiff-EOQ_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2QzODkwOS01ZmRjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xTmRFkO5xgFgF7gH_kpbZ7WZnkm2_BdtZ2XbznMSrPA=)

GOP Rep. Brandon Gill confronted the woke executive director of BJC (Baptist Joint Committee for Religious Liberty) Amanda Tyler for previous comments attacking white christian Americans.
"You stated, 'White christinas have been more a part of the problem than the solution,... do you remember that?!" Gill grilled Tyler.
Watch the tense moment here:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/87c9cdb5-d930-40ad-bd42-eefacfa9a79a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/87c9cdb5-d930-40ad-bd42-eefacfa9a79a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Suspect identified after six-day manhunt following Brown shooting: report**
A suspect in the Brown University shooting that left two students dead--Ella Cook, 19, a sophomore from Alabama, and Mukhammad Aziz Umurzokov, 18, an Uzbek American freshman--and nine others wounded **[has been identified by sources](https://substack.com/redirect/2ee7627f-0c1d-4ee0-9b1c-49d8d6b7a3a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after an ineffectual six-day manhunt, though authorities have not publicly named the perpetrator who escaped into Providence, Rhode Island streets after opening fire in a classroom Saturday.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2ee7627f-0c1d-4ee0-9b1c-49d8d6b7a3a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: FBI
* **Police struggled with grainy images, no cameras in shooting location:** For days, cops struggled to identify the masked suspect or obtain a single clear image despite releasing multiple grainy surveillance images, with Providence Police Chief Oscar Perez admitting Wednesday "He could be anywhere. We still don't know who the person is or where he is," while the university's over 1,200 security cameras scattered around its 145-acre campus notably did not include the section of the Barus & Holley building where the shooting occurred.
* **Campus security faces growing criticism over slow progress:** Campus security and local cops faced increasing criticism in the days following the slayings as they came up empty day after day in their search for a suspect, with the ineffectual manhunt dragging on through multiple light-on-info press conferences and authorities reduced to issuing photos of someone who may have merely come into contact with the killer.

# **Trump attends transfer for two Iowa National Guard members killed in Syria**
President Trump participated Wednesday in the return ceremony at Dover Air Force Base for **[two Iowa National Guard soldiers](https://substack.com/redirect/174edf8a-0c08-439e-93d8-419d3863b254?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** killed in an ISIS ambush in Syria over the weekend.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b83c47db-090f-4494-a4f9-1cc0b55426ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Fallen soldiers honored:** Sergeant Edgar Brian Torres-Tovar, 25, and Sergeant William Nathaniel Howard, 29, were killed alongside U.S. civilian interpreter Ayad Mansoor Sakat during a Saturday attack in Palmyra, Syria. War Secretary Pete Hegseth also attended the ceremony.
* **Attack details:** The service members were conducting a key leader engagement with local partners during counter-ISIS operations when the gunman opened fire in an area outside interim Syrian President Ahmed al-Sharaa's control, also wounding three others, according to Pentagon officials.
* **Family grief:** Meskwaki Nation Police Chief Jeffrey Bunn identified his son Nate (William Nathaniel Howard) in a Facebook post, writing "Our son Nate was one of the Soldiers that paid the ultimate sacrifice for all of us...He loved what he was doing and would be the first in and last out, no one left behind"

First Lady Melania Trump was scheduled to attend but ultimately unable to participate in the ceremony, which the Air Force describes as "not a ceremony; rather, it is a solemn movement of the transfer case by a carry team."
* * *
# **Trump adds mocking plaques to White House Presidential portraits**
President Trump recently revealed **[satirical plaques](https://substack.com/redirect/a229d08a-c76f-42bc-b765-b6063cae8de7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** beneath predecessor portraits in the White House "Presidential Walk of Fame," using his signature humor.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7cde5057-1a22-4cdd-a5b1-fc3671b54743?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Biden dubbed "worst President":** Two plaques under the 46th president's autopen portrait label "Sleepy Joe Biden" as "by far, the worst President in American History" who caused "the highest Inflation ever recorded," while calling him both "Sleepy," among other things.
* **Obama criticized :** Trump's plaques call the 44th president "one of the most divisive political figures in American History" whose "Unaffordable Care Act" cost Democrats congressional control, accusing him of spying on Trump's 2016 campaign and presiding over "the Russia, Russia Hoax, the worst political scandal in American History..."
* **Clinton family mentioned repeatedly:** Despite never serving as president, Hillary Clinton appears multiple times, including beneath Bill Clinton's portrait where a plaque declares "In 2016, President Clinton's wife, Hillary Clinton, lost the Presidency to President Donald J. Trump!"
* **CNN 's Kaitlan Collins commented on the new plaques, likening them to "Truth Social posts."**

A government shutdown, a weakening dollar, and a global rush into safe havens are reshaping the financial landscape. | | | [-](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/u/click?_t=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_m=24aa462f530140b4b218c0286a926201&_e=iTMSxFu1JvVmUYBBUdGJwDtRFFgHxhVbK_lPFfzuOAk45j19927cIQPKRBZ96IsCFxrqidZjLxD8jnkS5dHk8N3X4AKTaI8Q_g5YJxc6sFKdmGdJgdRjTxGW9PfdJL0IO4qlZV5xjPQeeKMRz4vHLc9KX71rKk905k22KEjQv_h7X_hVi-hvXsM-Cy0bN5F5q_yu992TxEeTH_ehd9xKrpq7l8EJ3OGEB0k8qTf6Qd9FXxRZwVCcxqYcUWJgUp9IxX01HlCZcH-PD4mSLfKX-LaqgVHrgmLK4LAcNY6Zx7WHZ2T50_7A4kRzg_s7KDegiXGr6uNQboKUvmKPDnsShN-LZ4cVwPn9ju5gTmHTEK0b9zZMfmsro1zr_I-3a9aP)

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

**Why Gold Is Surging to Record Highs**
_A government shutdown, a weakening dollar, and a global rush into safe havens are reshaping the financial landscape._
On October 1st, the U.S. government shut down. Within hours, gold hit new record highs. Stocks stumbled, the dollar weakened, and investors worldwide scrambled for protection. Gold answered that call.

This is not just a passing reaction. It is the latest surge in a powerful trend that has been building all year, and it could reshape retirement accounts and savings for years to come.
**The Perfect Storm for Gold**
* **Safe-haven demand:** Political gridlock shakes confidence, and gold remains the go-to store of value.
* **Dollar weakness:** A falling dollar makes gold more attractive across the globe.
* **Data blackout:** With the shutdown halting key economic reports, investors are left guessing, and gold thrives on uncertainty.
* **Central bank buying:** 2025 has already seen record global purchases, confirming gold's role as a core reserve asset.
* **Fed policy shifts:** Expectations of rate cuts reduce the cost of holding non-yielding assets like gold.

**Gold is proving once again why it has been the ultimate protection during moments when confidence in the system begins to crack.**
**History Repeats**
* In the 1970s, inflation drove gold up more than 600%.
* In 2008, while Wall Street burned, gold doubled.
* Now in 2025, gold has already added hundreds of dollars in a matter of weeks, and many analysts say this rally is just beginning.

**Why This Matters to You**
If you hold an IRA, a 401(k), or significant savings, your wealth is directly exposed to the dollar. Every new shutdown, every debt ceiling fight, and every policy misstep puts that dollar at greater risk. Meanwhile, the world's biggest financial players are shifting into gold.

**If central banks, billionaires, and global institutions are hoarding gold, why wouldn't you?**
**Your Free Guide from True Gold Republic**
We created a **FREE Wealth Protection Guide** that shows you:

* Why gold spiked during the shutdown and why the rally may continue.
* The hidden risks in every retirement account tied to the dollar.
* How to move physical gold and silver into your IRA or 401(k) quickly and securely.

As a bonus, you will also receive **The Shutdown Survival Blueprint** , revealing simple steps to protect your wealth before the next crisis makes headlines.

clean_body: Why Gold Is Surging to Record Highs. A government shutdown, a weakening dollar, and a global rush into safe havens are reshaping the financial landscape. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | Why Gold Is Surging to Record Highs A government shutdown, a weakening dollar, and a global rush into safe havens are reshaping the financial landscape. On October 1st, the U.S. government shut down. Within hours, gold hit new record highs. Stocks stumbled, the dollar weakened, and investors worldwide scrambled for protection. Gold answered that call. This is not just a passing reaction. It is the latest surge in a powerful trend that has been building all year, and it could reshape retirement accounts and savings for years to come. The Perfect Storm for Gold Safe-haven demand: Political gridlock shakes confidence, and gold remains the go-to store of value. Dollar weakness: A falling dollar makes gold more attractive across the globe. Data blackout: With the shutdown halting key economic reports, investors are left guessing, and gold thrives on uncertainty. Central bank buying: 2025 has already seen record global purchases, confirming gold's role as a core reserve asset. Fed policy shifts: Expectations of rate cuts reduce the cost of holding non-yielding assets like gold. Gold is proving once again why it has been the ultimate protection during moments when confidence in the system begins to crack. History Repeats In the 1970s, inflation drove gold up more than 600%. In 2008, while Wall Street burned, gold doubled. Now in 2025, gold has already added hundreds of dollars in a matter of weeks, and many analysts say this rally is just beginning. Why This Matters to You If you hold an IRA, a 401(k), or significant savings, your wealth is directly exposed to the dollar. Every new shutdown, every debt ceiling fight, and every policy misstep puts that dollar at greater risk. Meanwhile, the world's biggest financial players are shifting into gold. If central banks, billionaires, and global institutions are hoarding gold, why wouldn't you? Your Free Guide from True Gold Republic We created a FREE Wealth Protection Guide that shows you: Why gold spiked during the shutdown and why the rally may continue. The hidden risks in every retirement account tied to the dollar. How to move physical gold and silver into your IRA or 401(k) quickly and securely. As a bonus, you will also receive The Shutdown Survival Blueprint , revealing simple steps to protect your wealth before the next crisis makes headlines. | A+ BBB rating. 5-star client reviews. Secure, insured storage. Time Is Short Gold has already added nearly $400 in the last month. If the shutdown drags on, or if the Fed signals further easing, prices could surge even higher. Waiting could mean buying at a much higher cost. Do not wait until the next headline forces your hand. subject: I’m not done fighting
body:
| | Peter,

I ran for Congress because I was tired of watching politicians talk past the real issues facing working families and rural communities. I thought that we deserved to have someone in the room who had lived those challenges – someone who knew what it meant to worry about a childcare bill, a late paycheck, or a broken transmission.

That’s still why I’m here.

National Republicans have been trying to replace me since the day I was sworn in. Not because of my votes, but because they know I won’t take orders from party bosses or corporate PACs.

They want someone who will.
